125: func unlock_codex_entry(category: String, entry_id: String, source: String = "", chapter_id: String = "") -> bool:
126:     var normalized_category: String = category.to_lower().strip_edges()
127:     var normalized_id: String = entry_id.strip_edges()
128:     var resolved_chapter_id: String = _resolve_codex_chapter_id(chapter_id)

135: 
136:     var rows: Array[String] = _as_string_array(codex.get(normalized_category, []))
137:     if rows.has(normalized_id):
138:         var existing_meta: Dictionary = get_codex_meta()
139:         var existing_key: String = "%s:%s" % [normalized_category, normalized_id]
140:         if existing_meta.has(existing_key):
141:             var meta_row_var: Variant = existing_meta.get(existing_key, {})
142:             if meta_row_var is Dictionary:
143:                 var meta_row: Dictionary = (meta_row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
144:                 var changed: bool = false
145:                 if str(meta_row.get("chapter_id", "")).strip_edges() == "":
146:                     meta_row["chapter_id"] = resolved_chapter_id
147:                     changed = true
148:                 if str(meta_row.get("source", "")).strip_edges() == "" and source.strip_edges() != "":
149:                     meta_row["source"] = source.strip_edges()
150:                     changed = true
151:                 if changed:
152:                     existing_meta[existing_key] = meta_row
153:                     _meta["codex_meta"] = existing_meta
154:                     save_meta()
155:         return false
156: 
157:     rows.append(normalized_id)
158:     codex[normalized_category] = rows
159:     _meta["codex"] = codex
160: 
161:     var codex_meta: Dictionary = get_codex_meta()
162:     var meta_key: String = "%s:%s" % [normalized_category, normalized_id]
163:     codex_meta[meta_key] = _build_codex_meta_row(normalized_category, normalized_id, source, resolved_chapter_id)
164:     _meta["codex_meta"] = codex_meta
165: 
166:     if EventBus != null and EventBus.has_signal("codex_unlocked"):
167:         EventBus.codex_unlocked.emit(normalized_category, normalized_id)
168: 
169:     save_meta()
170:     return true

230: func get_upgrade_cost(upgrade_id: String) -> int:
231:     var row: Dictionary = _find_upgrade_row(upgrade_id)
232:     if row.is_empty():
233:         return -1
234: 
235:     var level: int = get_upgrade_level(upgrade_id)
236:     var max_level: int = int(row.get("max_level", 1))
237:     if level >= max_level:
238:         return -1
239: 
240:     var base_cost: int = int(row.get("base_cost", 50))
241:     var step_cost: int = int(row.get("cost_step", 25))
242:     return max(1, base_cost + step_cost * level)
243: 
244: 
245: func purchase_upgrade(upgrade_id: String) -> Dictionary:
246:     var row: Dictionary = _find_upgrade_row(upgrade_id)
247:     if row.is_empty():
248:         return {"ok": false, "reason": "missing_upgrade"}
249: 
250:     var cost: int = get_upgrade_cost(upgrade_id)
251:     if cost < 0:
252:         return {"ok": false, "reason": "max_level"}
253: 
254:     var currency: int = int(_meta.get("meta_currency", 0))
255:     if currency < cost:
256:         return {"ok": false, "reason": "not_enough_currency", "cost": cost, "currency": currency}
257: 
258:     var levels: Dictionary = get_upgrade_levels()
259:     var new_level: int = int(levels.get(upgrade_id, 0)) + 1
260:     levels[upgrade_id] = new_level
261:     _meta["upgrade_levels"] = levels
262:     _meta["meta_currency"] = currency - cost
263:     save_meta()
264: 
265:     return {
266:         "ok": true,
267:         "id": upgrade_id,
268:         "new_level": new_level,
269:         "cost": cost,
270:         "meta_currency": int(_meta.get("meta_currency", 0))
271:     }
272: 
273: 
274: func unlock_memory_fragment(fragment_id: String) -> bool:
275:     if fragment_id == "":
276:         return false
277: 
278:     var rows: Array[String] = get_unlocked_fragments()
279:     if rows.has(fragment_id):
280:         return false
281: 
282:     rows.append(fragment_id)
283:     _meta["unlocked_fragments"] = rows
284:     save_meta()
285:     return true
286: 
287: 
288: func load_meta() -> void:
289:     _meta = _default_meta()
290:     _last_run = {}
291: 
292:     if not FileAccess.file_exists(SAVE_PATH):
293:         save_meta()
294:         return
295: 
296:     var text: String = FileAccess.get_file_as_string(SAVE_PATH)
297:     var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(text)
298:     if not (parsed is Dictionary):
299:         push_warning("Meta save corrupted, fallback to default")
300:         save_meta()
301:         return
302: 
303:     var data: Dictionary = parsed
304:     _meta["meta_currency"] = int(data.get("meta_currency", 0))
305:     _meta["total_runs"] = int(data.get("total_runs", 0))
306:     _meta["total_kills"] = int(data.get("total_kills", 0))
307:     _meta["highest_room"] = int(data.get("highest_room", 1))
308:     _meta["best_level"] = int(data.get("best_level", 1))
309:     _meta["best_alignment"] = float(data.get("best_alignment", 0.0))
310:     _meta["total_victories"] = int(data.get("total_victories", 0))
311:     _meta["unlocked_achievements"] = _as_string_array(data.get("unlocked_achievements", []))
312:     _meta["unlocked_endings"] = _as_string_array(data.get("unlocked_endings", []))
313:     _meta["unlocked_fragments"] = _as_string_array(data.get("unlocked_fragments", []))
314:     _meta["selected_character_id"] = str(data.get("selected_character_id", "char_knight"))
315:     _meta["upgrade_levels"] = _as_int_dictionary(data.get("upgrade_levels", {}))
316:     _meta["input_bindings"] = _sanitize_input_bindings(data.get("input_bindings", {}))
317:     _meta["runtime_settings"] = _sanitize_runtime_settings(data.get("runtime_settings", {}))
318:     _meta["codex"] = _sanitize_codex(data.get("codex", {}))
319:     _meta["codex_meta"] = _sanitize_codex_meta(data.get("codex_meta", {}))
320:     _meta["codex_stats_filters"] = _sanitize_codex_stats_filters(data.get("codex_stats_filters", {}))
321:     _last_run = data.get("last_run", {})
322: 
323:     var selected_character_id: String = str(_meta.get("selected_character_id", "")).strip_edges()
324:     if selected_character_id != "":
325:         var codex: Dictionary = get_codex()
326:         var rows: Array[String] = _as_string_array(codex.get("characters", []))
327:         if not rows.has(selected_character_id):
328:             rows.append(selected_character_id)
329:             codex["characters"] = rows
330:             _meta["codex"] = codex
331: 
332:         var codex_meta: Dictionary = get_codex_meta()
333:         var selected_key: String = "characters:%s" % selected_character_id
334:         if not codex_meta.has(selected_key):
335:             codex_meta[selected_key] = _build_codex_meta_row("characters", selected_character_id, "profile_sync", "global")
336:             _meta["codex_meta"] = codex_meta
337: 
338: 
339: func save_meta() -> void:
340:     var file: FileAccess = FileAccess.open(SAVE_PATH, FileAccess.WRITE)
341:     if file == null:
342:         push_warning("Cannot write save file: %s" % SAVE_PATH)
343:         return
344: 
345:     var payload: Dictionary = _meta.duplicate(true)
346:     payload["last_run"] = _last_run
347:     file.store_string(JSON.stringify(payload, "  "))
348: 
349: 
350: func submit_run_result(result: Dictionary) -> Dictionary:
351:     var rooms_cleared: int = int(result.get("rooms_cleared", 0))
352:     var kills: int = int(result.get("kills", 0))
353:     var level_reached: int = int(result.get("level_reached", 1))
354:     var alignment: float = float(result.get("alignment", 0.0))
355:     var outcome: String = str(result.get("outcome", "death"))
356:     var ending_id: String = ""
357:     var ending_new_unlock: bool = false
358:     var route_style_id: String = _resolve_last_route_style(result)
359:     var ending_payoff: Dictionary = {}
360:     var ending_epilogue_chain: Array[String] = []
361:     var fragment_triggers: Array[Dictionary] = _sanitize_fragment_trigger_log(result.get("fragment_triggers", []))
362: 
363:     var reward: int = _calc_meta_reward(result)
364: 
365:     _meta["meta_currency"] = int(_meta.get("meta_currency", 0)) + reward
366:     _meta["total_runs"] = int(_meta.get("total_runs", 0)) + 1
367:     _meta["total_kills"] = int(_meta.get("total_kills", 0)) + kills
368:     _meta["highest_room"] = maxi(int(_meta.get("highest_room", 1)), rooms_cleared + 1)
369:     _meta["best_level"] = maxi(int(_meta.get("best_level", 1)), level_reached)
370:     if outcome == "victory":
371:         _meta["total_victories"] = int(_meta.get("total_victories", 0)) + 1
372:         ending_id = _resolve_ending(alignment)
373:         ending_new_unlock = _unlock_ending(ending_id)
374:         ending_payoff = _get_ending_payoff_payload(ending_id, alignment, route_style_id)
375:         ending_epilogue_chain = _get_ending_epilogue_chain(ending_id)
376:     if absf(alignment) > absf(float(_meta.get("best_alignment", 0.0))):
377:         _meta["best_alignment"] = alignment
378: 
379:     var unlocked_in_run: Array[String] = _process_achievements(result)
380: 
381:     _last_run = {
382:         "outcome": outcome,
383:         "rooms_cleared": rooms_cleared,
384:         "kills": kills,
385:         "level_reached": level_reached,
386:         "gold": int(result.get("gold", 0)),
387:         "ore": int(result.get("ore", 0)),
388:         "alignment": alignment,
389:         "meta_reward": reward,
390:         "ending_id": ending_id,
391:         "ending_new_unlock": ending_new_unlock,
392:         "ending_epilogue": _get_ending_epilogue(ending_id, ending_new_unlock),
393:         "ending_payoff": ending_payoff,
394:         "ending_epilogue_chain": ending_epilogue_chain,
395:         "fragment_triggers": fragment_triggers,
396:         "new_achievements": unlocked_in_run,
397:         "narrative_choices": result.get("narrative_choices", []),
398:         "chapter_effect_timeline": result.get("chapter_effect_timeline", []),
399:         "chapter_route_styles": result.get("chapter_route_styles", {}),
400:         "route_style_timeline": result.get("route_style_timeline", [])
401:     }
402: 
403:     save_meta()
404:     return _last_run.duplicate(true)
405: 
406: 
407: func reset_meta() -> void:
408:     _meta = _default_meta()
409:     _last_run = {}
410:     save_meta()
411: 
412: 
413: func _calc_meta_reward(result: Dictionary) -> int:
414:     var kills: int = int(result.get("kills", 0))
415:     var rooms_cleared: int = int(result.get("rooms_cleared", 0))
416:     var level_reached: int = int(result.get("level_reached", 1))
417:     var gold: int = int(result.get("gold", 0))
418:     var ore: int = int(result.get("ore", 0))
419:     var outcome: String = str(result.get("outcome", "death"))
420: 
421:     var reward: int = 12
422:     reward += int(kills * 0.25)
423:     reward += rooms_cleared * 9
424:     reward += max(0, level_reached - 1) * 2
425:     reward += int(gold * 0.1)
426:     reward += ore * 3
427:     if outcome == "victory":
428:         reward += 60
429: 
430:     return maxi(5, reward)
431: 
432: 
433: func _default_meta() -> Dictionary:
434:     return {
435:         "meta_currency": 0,
436:         "total_runs": 0,
437:         "total_kills": 0,
438:         "highest_room": 1,
439:         "best_level": 1,
440:         "best_alignment": 0.0,
441:         "total_victories": 0,
442:         "unlocked_achievements": [],
443:         "unlocked_endings": [],
444:         "unlocked_fragments": [],
445:         "selected_character_id": "char_knight",
446:         "upgrade_levels": {},
447:         "input_bindings": _default_input_bindings(),
448:         "codex": {
449:             "characters": ["char_knight"],
450:             "weapons": [],
451:             "passives": [],
452:             "enemies": [],
453:             "accessories": []
454:         },
455:         "codex_meta": {
456:             "characters:char_knight": {
457:                 "category": "characters",
458:             "entry_id": "char_knight",
459:             "source": "default",
460:             "chapter_id": "global",
461:             "discovered_at": "init",
462:             "run_index": 0
463:         }
464:         },
465:         "codex_stats_filters": {
466:             "source": "all",
467:             "chapter": "all"
468:         },
469:         "runtime_settings": _default_runtime_settings()
470:     }
471: 
472: 
473: func _default_runtime_settings() -> Dictionary:
474:     return {
475:         "master_volume": 1.0,
476:         "bgm_volume": 1.0,
477:         "sfx_volume": 1.0,
478:         "ambience_volume": 1.0,
479:         "screen_shake": 1.0,
480:         "ui_scale": 1.0
481:     }
482: 
483: 
484: func _default_input_bindings() -> Dictionary:
485:     if GameManager != null and GameManager.has_method("get_default_input_bindings"):
486:         return GameManager.get_default_input_bindings()
487:     return {
488:         "move_up": {"keys": [KEY_W, KEY_UP], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_DPAD_UP]},
489:         "move_down": {"keys": [KEY_S, KEY_DOWN], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_DPAD_DOWN]},
490:         "move_left": {"keys": [KEY_A, KEY_LEFT], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_DPAD_LEFT]},
491:         "move_right": {"keys": [KEY_D, KEY_RIGHT], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_DPAD_RIGHT]},
492:         "sprint": {"keys": [KEY_SHIFT], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_RIGHT_SHOULDER]},
493:         "interact": {"keys": [KEY_E], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_A]},
494:         "pause": {"keys": [KEY_ESCAPE], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_START]}
495:     }
496: 
497: 
498: func _sanitize_input_bindings(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
499:     var source: Dictionary = {}
500:     if value is Dictionary:
501:         source = value
502: 
503:     if GameManager != null and GameManager.has_method("sanitize_input_bindings"):
504:         return GameManager.sanitize_input_bindings(source)
505:     return _default_input_bindings()
506: 
507: 
508: func _sanitize_runtime_settings(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
509:     var defaults: Dictionary = _default_runtime_settings()
510:     var source: Dictionary = {}
511:     if value is Dictionary:
512:         source = value
513: 
514:     var out: Dictionary = defaults.duplicate(true)
515:     out["master_volume"] = clampf(float(source.get("master_volume", out["master_volume"])), 0.0, 1.0)
516:     out["bgm_volume"] = clampf(float(source.get("bgm_volume", out["bgm_volume"])), 0.0, 1.0)
517:     out["sfx_volume"] = clampf(float(source.get("sfx_volume", out["sfx_volume"])), 0.0, 1.0)
518:     out["ambience_volume"] = clampf(float(source.get("ambience_volume", out["ambience_volume"])), 0.0, 1.0)
519:     out["screen_shake"] = clampf(float(source.get("screen_shake", out["screen_shake"])), 0.0, 1.0)
520:     out["ui_scale"] = clampf(float(source.get("ui_scale", out["ui_scale"])), 0.8, 1.5)
521:     return out
522: 
523: 
524: func apply_runtime_settings() -> void:
525:     var settings: Dictionary = get_runtime_settings()
526:     if AudioManager != null and AudioManager.has_method("apply_runtime_settings"):
527:         AudioManager.apply_runtime_settings(settings)
528: 
529:     var scale: float = clampf(float(settings.get("ui_scale", 1.0)), 0.8, 1.5)
530:     if get_tree() != null and get_tree().root != null:
531:         get_tree().root.content_scale_factor = scale
532: 
533:     if EventBus != null and EventBus.has_signal("settings_changed"):
534:         EventBus.settings_changed.emit(settings)
535: 
536: 
537: func apply_input_bindings() -> void:
538:     var bindings: Dictionary = get_input_bindings()
539:     if GameManager != null and GameManager.has_method("apply_input_bindings"):
540:         GameManager.apply_input_bindings(bindings)
541: 
542: 
543: func _on_memory_fragment_found(fragment_id: String) -> void:
544:     unlock_memory_fragment(fragment_id)
545: 
546: 
547: func _on_enemy_killed(enemy_id: String, _position: Vector2) -> void:
548:     unlock_codex_entry("enemies", enemy_id, "enemy_kill", _resolve_codex_chapter_id(""))
549: 
550: 
551: func _on_accessory_acquired(accessory_id: String) -> void:
552:     unlock_codex_entry("accessories", accessory_id, "accessory_pickup", _resolve_codex_chapter_id(""))
553: 
554: 
555: func _process_achievements(result: Dictionary) -> Array[String]:
556:     var unlocked: Array[String] = _as_string_array(_meta.get("unlocked_achievements", []))
557:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("achievements", {})
558:     var rows: Array = config.get("achievements", [])
559:     var new_unlocks: Array[String] = []
560: 
561:     for item: Variant in rows:
562:         if not (item is Dictionary):
563:             continue
564:         var row: Dictionary = item
565:         var ach_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
566:         var condition: String = str(row.get("condition", ""))
567:         if ach_id == "" or condition == "":
568:             continue
569:         if unlocked.has(ach_id):
570:             continue
571:         if not _check_achievement_condition(condition, result):
572:             continue
573: 
574:         unlocked.append(ach_id)
575:         new_unlocks.append(ach_id)
576:         EventBus.achievement_unlocked.emit(ach_id, str(row.get("title", ach_id)))
577: 
578:     _meta["unlocked_achievements"] = unlocked
579:     return new_unlocks
580: 
581: 
582: func _check_achievement_condition(condition: String, result: Dictionary) -> bool:
583:     if condition.begins_with("clear_floor_"):
584:         var needed_room: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "clear_floor_")
585:         return int(result.get("rooms_cleared", 0)) >= needed_room
586: 
587:     if condition.begins_with("alignment_ge_"):
588:         var needed_alignment: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "alignment_ge_")
589:         return float(result.get("alignment", 0.0)) >= float(needed_alignment)
590: 
591:     if condition.begins_with("alignment_le_"):
592:         var max_alignment: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "alignment_le_")
593:         return float(result.get("alignment", 0.0)) <= float(max_alignment)
594: 
595:     if condition.begins_with("kills_ge_"):
596:         var needed_kills: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "kills_ge_")
597:         return int(result.get("kills", 0)) >= needed_kills
598: 
599:     if condition.begins_with("reach_level_"):
600:         var needed_level: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "reach_level_")
601:         return int(result.get("level_reached", 1)) >= needed_level
602: 
603:     if condition == "victory_once":
604:         return str(result.get("outcome", "")) == "victory"
605: 
606:     return false
607: 
608: 
609: func _resolve_ending(alignment: float) -> String:
610:     if alignment >= 60.0:
611:         return ENDING_REDEEM
612:     if alignment <= -60.0:
613:         return ENDING_FALL
614:     return ENDING_BALANCE
615: 
616: 
617: func _unlock_ending(ending_id: String) -> bool:
618:     if ending_id == "":
619:         return false
620:     var endings: Array[String] = _as_string_array(_meta.get("unlocked_endings", []))
621:     if endings.has(ending_id):
622:         return false
623: 
624:     endings.append(ending_id)
625:     _meta["unlocked_endings"] = endings
626:     EventBus.ending_unlocked.emit(ending_id)
627:     return true
628: 
629: 
630: func _get_ending_epilogue(ending_id: String, newly_unlocked: bool) -> String:
631:     if ending_id == "":
632:         return ""
633: 
634:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
635:     var ending_rows_var: Variant = config.get("endings", {})
636:     if ending_rows_var is Dictionary:
637:         var row_var: Variant = (ending_rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
638:         if row_var is Dictionary:
639:             var row: Dictionary = row_var
640:             if newly_unlocked:
641:                 return str(row.get("epilogue_first_unlock", row.get("story", "")))
642:             return str(row.get("epilogue_repeat", row.get("story", "")))
643: 
644:     if newly_unlocked:
645:         return "A new ending is engraved into the memory archive."
646:     return "The ending echoes differently on this repeated cycle."
647: 
648: 
649: func _get_ending_payoff_payload(ending_id: String, alignment: float, route_style: String) -> Dictionary:
650:     if ending_id == "":
651:         return {}
652: 
653:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
654:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("ending_payoff_profiles", {})
655:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
656:         return {}
657: 
658:     var row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
659:     if not (row_var is Dictionary):
660:         return {}
661: 
662:     var row: Dictionary = (row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
663:     row["ending_id"] = ending_id
664:     row["arc_id"] = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
665:     row["style"] = route_style
666:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
667:     return row
668: 
669: 
670: func _get_ending_epilogue_chain(ending_id: String) -> Array[String]:
671:     if ending_id == "":
672:         return []
673: 
674:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
675:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("epilogue_chains", {})
676:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
677:         return []
678: 
679:     var chain_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, [])
680:     var rows: Array[String] = []
681:     if chain_var is Array:
682:         for item: Variant in chain_var:
683:             var text: String = str(item).strip_edges()
684:             if text != "":
685:                 rows.append(text)
686:     return rows
687: 
688: 
689: func _resolve_last_route_style(result: Dictionary) -> String:
690:     var direct_style: String = str(result.get("route_style", "")).strip_edges().to_lower()
691:     if direct_style != "":
692:         return direct_style
693: 
694:     var timeline_var: Variant = result.get("route_style_timeline", [])
695:     if timeline_var is Array and not (timeline_var as Array).is_empty():
696:         var timeline: Array = timeline_var
697:         for i in range(timeline.size() - 1, -1, -1):
698:             var row_var: Variant = timeline[i]
699:             if not (row_var is Dictionary):
700:                 continue
701:             var style_id: String = str((row_var as Dictionary).get("style_id", "")).strip_edges().to_lower()
702:             if style_id != "":
703:                 return style_id
704: 
705:     var chapter_styles_var: Variant = result.get("chapter_route_styles", {})
706:     if chapter_styles_var is Dictionary:
707:         var chapter_styles: Dictionary = chapter_styles_var
708:         for chapter_key in ["chapter_4", "chapter_3", "chapter_2", "chapter_1"]:
709:             var style_id: String = str(chapter_styles.get(chapter_key, "")).strip_edges().to_lower()
710:             if style_id != "":
711:                 return style_id
712: 
713:     return "neutral"
714: 
715: 
716: func _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment: float) -> String:
717:     if alignment >= 60.0:
718:         return ENDING_REDEEM.trim_prefix("nar_ending_")
719:     if alignment <= -60.0:
720:         return ENDING_FALL.trim_prefix("nar_ending_")
721:     return ENDING_BALANCE.trim_prefix("nar_ending_")
722: 
723: 
724: func _get_route_style_echo(route_style: String) -> String:
725:     match route_style:
726:         "vanguard":
727:             return "Vanguard routes favor safer pressure and disciplined pacing."
728:         "raider":
729:             return "Raider routes trade stability for burst rewards and sharper pressure."
730:         _:
731:             return "Neutral routes keep both ending paths open while you shape the run."
732: 
733: 
734: func _sanitize_fragment_trigger_log(value: Variant) -> Array[Dictionary]:
735:     var rows: Array[Dictionary] = []
736:     if not (value is Array):
737:         return rows
738: 
739:     for item: Variant in value:
740:         if not (item is Dictionary):
741:             continue
742:         var row: Dictionary = item
743:         var fragment_id: String = str(row.get("fragment_id", "")).strip_edges()
744:         if fragment_id == "":
745:             continue
746:         rows.append({
747:             "chapter_id": str(row.get("chapter_id", "")).strip_edges(),
748:             "trigger_type": str(row.get("trigger_type", "")).strip_edges(),
749:             "arc_id": str(row.get("arc_id", "")).strip_edges(),
750:             "style": str(row.get("style", "")).strip_edges(),
751:             "fragment_id": fragment_id,
752:             "fragment_title": str(row.get("fragment_title", fragment_id)).strip_edges(),
753:             "fragment_text": str(row.get("fragment_text", "")).strip_edges(),
754:             "newly_unlocked": bool(row.get("newly_unlocked", false)),
755:             "room_index": int(row.get("room_index", 0))
756:         })
757:     return rows
758: 
759: 
760: func _extract_suffix_int(value: String, prefix: String) -> int:
761:     var suffix: String = value.trim_prefix(prefix)
762:     if suffix.is_valid_int():
763:         return int(suffix)
764:     return 0
765: 
766: 
767: func _as_string_array(value: Variant) -> Array[String]:
768:     var result: Array[String] = []
769:     if value is Array:
770:         for item: Variant in value:
771:             result.append(str(item))
772:     return result
773: 
774: 
775: func _as_int_dictionary(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
776:     var result: Dictionary = {}
777:     if value is Dictionary:
778:         var source: Dictionary = value
779:         for key: Variant in source.keys():
780:             result[str(key)] = int(source.get(key, 0))
781:     return result
782: 
783: 
784: func _sanitize_codex(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
785:     var template: Dictionary = {
786:         "characters": [],
787:         "weapons": [],
788:         "passives": [],
789:         "enemies": [],
790:         "accessories": []
791:     }
792: 
793:     var source: Dictionary = {}
794:     if value is Dictionary:
795:         source = value
796: 
797:     var out: Dictionary = template.duplicate(true)
798:     for key: Variant in out.keys():
799:         var key_name: String = str(key)
800:         out[key_name] = _as_string_array(source.get(key_name, []))
801:     return out
802: 
803: 
804: func _sanitize_codex_meta(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
805:     var out: Dictionary = {}
806:     if not (value is Dictionary):
807:         return out
808: 
809:     var source: Dictionary = value
810:     for key_var: Variant in source.keys():
811:         var key: String = str(key_var)
812:         var row_var: Variant = source.get(key_var, {})
813:         if not (row_var is Dictionary):
814:             continue
815:         var row: Dictionary = row_var
816:         out[key] = {
817:             "category": str(row.get("category", "")),
818:             "entry_id": str(row.get("entry_id", "")),
819:             "source": str(row.get("source", "")),
820:             "chapter_id": _resolve_codex_chapter_id(str(row.get("chapter_id", ""))),
821:             "discovered_at": str(row.get("discovered_at", "")),
822:             "run_index": int(row.get("run_index", 0))
823:         }
824:     return out
825: 
826: 
827: func _sanitize_codex_stats_filters(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
828:     var source: Dictionary = {}
829:     if value is Dictionary:
830:         source = value
831: 
832:     var source_id: String = str(source.get("source", "all")).strip_edges().to_lower()
833:     var chapter_id: String = str(source.get("chapter", "all")).strip_edges().to_lower()
834:     if source_id == "":
835:         source_id = "all"
836:     if chapter_id == "":
837:         chapter_id = "all"
838: 
839:     return {
840:         "source": source_id,
841:         "chapter": chapter_id
842:     }
843: 
844: 
845: func _build_codex_meta_row(category: String, entry_id: String, source: String, chapter_id: String = "") -> Dictionary:
846:     var now_text: String = Time.get_datetime_string_from_system(true, true)
847:     var run_index: int = int(_meta.get("total_runs", 0)) + 1
848:     return {
849:         "category": category,
850:         "entry_id": entry_id,
851:         "source": source.strip_edges(),
852:         "chapter_id": _resolve_codex_chapter_id(chapter_id),
853:         "discovered_at": now_text,
854:         "run_index": run_index
855:     }
856: 
857: 
858: func _resolve_codex_chapter_id(chapter_id: String) -> String:
859:     var normalized: String = chapter_id.strip_edges().to_lower()
860:     if _is_valid_chapter_id(normalized):
861:         return normalized
862: 
863:     if GameManager != null:
864:         var runtime_chapter: String = str(GameManager.current_chapter_id).strip_edges().to_lower()
865:         if _is_valid_chapter_id(runtime_chapter):
866:             return runtime_chapter
867: 
868:     return "global"
869: 
870: 
871: func _is_valid_chapter_id(chapter_id: String) -> bool:
872:     if chapter_id == "global":
873:         return true
874:     if not chapter_id.begins_with("chapter_"):
875:         return false
876:     var suffix: String = chapter_id.trim_prefix("chapter_")
877:     if not suffix.is_valid_int():
878:         return false
879:     return int(suffix) > 0
880: 
881: 
882: func _sort_codex_recent_desc(a: Dictionary, b: Dictionary) -> bool:
883:     var run_a: int = int(a.get("run_index", 0))
884:     var run_b: int = int(b.get("run_index", 0))
885:     if run_a != run_b:
886:         return run_a > run_b
887: 
888:     var time_a: String = str(a.get("discovered_at", ""))
889:     var time_b: String = str(b.get("discovered_at", ""))
890:     if time_a != time_b:
891:         return time_a > time_b
892: 
893:     var entry_a: String = str(a.get("entry_id", ""))
894:     var entry_b: String = str(b.get("entry_id", ""))
895:     return entry_a < entry_b
896: 
897: 
898: func _find_upgrade_row(upgrade_id: String) -> Dictionary:
899:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("meta_upgrades", {})
900:     var rows: Variant = config.get("upgrades", [])
901:     if not (rows is Array):
902:         return {}
903: 
904:     for item: Variant in rows:
905:         if not (item is Dictionary):
906:             continue
907:         var row: Dictionary = item
908:         if str(row.get("id", "")) == upgrade_id:
909:             return row
910: 
911:     return {}

(End of file - total 911 lines)
</content>
```

135:         lines.append("New Achievements: %s" % ", ".join(ids))
136: 
137:     var fragment_triggers_var: Variant = run_result.get("fragment_triggers", [])
138:     if fragment_triggers_var is Array and not (fragment_triggers_var as Array).is_empty():
139:         var fragment_lines: Array[String] = []
140:         for item: Variant in fragment_triggers_var:
141:             if not (item is Dictionary):
142:                 continue
143:             var row: Dictionary = item
144:             var title: String = str(row.get("fragment_title", row.get("fragment_id", "memory"))).strip_edges()
145:             if title == "":
146:                 continue
147:             var prefix: String = "Echoed"
148:             if bool(row.get("newly_unlocked", false)):
149:                 prefix = "Unlocked"
150:             fragment_lines.append("%s: %s [%s/%s]" % [
151:                 prefix,
152:                 title,
153:                 str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter")),
154:                 str(row.get("trigger_type", "trigger"))
155:             ])
156:         if not fragment_lines.is_empty():
157:             lines.append("Fragments:\n%s" % "\n".join(PackedStringArray(fragment_lines)))
158: 
159:     if lines.is_empty():
160:         lines.append("No new unlocks this run")
161:     _unlock_label.text = "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
162: 
163:     visible = true
164:     _active = true
165: 
166: 
167: func _unhandled_input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
168:     if not _active:
169:         return
170: 
171:     if _timeline_grouped_view and event is InputEventKey:
172:         var key_event: InputEventKey = event
173:         if key_event.pressed and not key_event.echo:
174:             if key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_Q:
175:                 _shift_grouped_anchor(-1)
176:                 return
177:             if key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_E:
178:                 _shift_grouped_anchor(1)
179:                 return
180:             if key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_3 or key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_KP_3:
181:                 _toggle_grouped_anchor_scope()
182:                 return
183: 
184:     if event.is_action_pressed("narrative_choice_1"):
185:         _cycle_timeline_filter()
186:         return
187: 
188:     if event.is_action_pressed("narrative_choice_2"):
189:         _toggle_timeline_view()
190:         return
191: 
192:     if event.is_action_pressed("interact") or event.is_action_pressed("pause"):
193:         _request_back()
194: 
195: 
196: func _on_back_button_pressed() -> void:
197:     _request_back()
198: 
199: 
200: func _request_back() -> void:
201:     if not _active:
202:         return
203:     _active = false
204:     visible = false
205:     back_to_menu_requested.emit()
206: 
207: 
208: func _on_timeline_filter_button_pressed() -> void:
209:     _cycle_timeline_filter()
210: 
211: 
212: func _on_timeline_view_button_pressed() -> void:
213:     _toggle_timeline_view()
214: 
215: 
216: func _on_timeline_anchor_button_pressed() -> void:
217:     _shift_grouped_anchor(1)
218: 
219: 
220: func _on_timeline_scope_button_pressed() -> void:
221:     _toggle_grouped_anchor_scope()
222: 
223: 
224: func _cycle_timeline_filter() -> void:
225:     _timeline_filter_index = (_timeline_filter_index + 1) % TIMELINE_FILTER_ORDER.size()
226:     _refresh_timeline_view()
227: 
228: 
229: func _toggle_timeline_view() -> void:
230:     _timeline_grouped_view = not _timeline_grouped_view
231:     _refresh_timeline_view()
232: 
233: 
234: func _toggle_grouped_anchor_scope() -> void:
235:     if not _timeline_grouped_view:
236:         return
237:     _grouped_anchor_only_scope = not _grouped_anchor_only_scope
238:     _refresh_timeline_view()
239: 
240: 
241: func _refresh_timeline_view() -> void:
242:     var mode: String = TIMELINE_FILTER_ORDER[_timeline_filter_index]
243:     _rebuild_grouped_chapter_order(mode)
244: 
245:     if _timeline_grouped_view:
246:         _effects_timeline_label.text = _build_grouped_timeline_summary(_timeline_rows, mode)
247:     else:
248:         _effects_timeline_label.text = _build_chapter_effect_timeline_summary(_timeline_rows, mode)
249: 
250:     _apply_timeline_filter_theme(mode)
251:     _apply_anchor_faction_theme()
252: 
253:     if _timeline_filter_button != null:
254:         var tag: String = _get_timeline_mode_tag(mode)
255:         _timeline_filter_button.text = "%s Timeline Filter: %s (click / [1])" % [tag, mode.to_upper()]
256: 
257:     if _timeline_view_button != null:
258:         var view_text: String = "Timeline View: %s (click / [2])" % ("GROUPED" if _timeline_grouped_view else "FLAT")
259:         if _timeline_grouped_view:
260:             var chapter_hint: String = _chapter_anchor_title(_get_active_grouped_chapter_id())
261:             if chapter_hint == "":
262:                 chapter_hint = "none"
263:             view_text += " | Anchor: %s (Q/E)" % chapter_hint
264:         _timeline_view_button.text = view_text
265: 
266:     if _timeline_anchor_button != null:
267:         var faction_tag: String = _get_ending_faction_tag(_current_ending_id)
268:         var anchor_hint: String = _chapter_anchor_title(_get_active_grouped_chapter_id())
269:         if anchor_hint == "":
270:             anchor_hint = "none"
271:         _timeline_anchor_button.disabled = (not _timeline_grouped_view) or _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty()
272:         _timeline_anchor_button.text = "%s Anchor Next: %s (click / E)" % [faction_tag, anchor_hint]
273: 
274:     if _timeline_scope_button != null:
275:         _timeline_scope_button.disabled = (not _timeline_grouped_view) or _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty()
276:         var scope_text: String = "ANCHOR ONLY" if _grouped_anchor_only_scope else "ALL CHAPTERS"
277:         _timeline_scope_button.text = "Scope: %s (click / [3])" % scope_text
278: 
279:     if _hint_label != null:
280:         if _timeline_grouped_view:
281:             _hint_label.text = "[1] Filter | [2] View | [3] Scope | Q/E anchor | Esc to return"
282:         else:
283:             _hint_label.text = "[1] Switch filter | [2] Switch view | E / Esc to return"
284: 
285: 
286: func _get_ending_title(ending_id: String) -> String:
287:     var configured: Dictionary = _get_ending_row(ending_id)
288:     if not configured.is_empty():
289:         return str(configured.get("title", "Ending"))
290: 
291:     match ending_id:
292:         "nar_ending_redeem":
293:             return "Ending: REDEEM"
294:         "nar_ending_fall":
295:             return "Ending: FALL"
296:         "nar_ending_balance":
297:             return "Ending: BALANCE"
298:         _:
299:             return "Ending: %s" % ending_id
300: 
301: 
302: func _get_ending_story(ending_id: String) -> String:
303:     var configured: Dictionary = _get_ending_row(ending_id)
304:     if not configured.is_empty():
305:         return str(configured.get("story", "A new fate is recorded."))
306: 
307:     match ending_id:
308:         "nar_ending_redeem":
309:             return "You rise with broken wings healed by grace. The abyss closes, but your oath remains."
310:         "nar_ending_fall":
311:             return "You wear the void as a crown. Salvation is denied, and power becomes your final prayer."
312:         "nar_ending_balance":
313:             return "Neither halo nor abyss claims you. You walk the narrow dusk, guarding both worlds."
314:         _:
315:             return "A new fate is recorded."
316: 
317: 
318: func _get_ending_row(ending_id: String) -> Dictionary:
319:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
320:     var ending_rows: Variant = config.get("endings", {})
321:     if ending_rows is Dictionary:
322:         var row: Variant = (ending_rows as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
323:         if row is Dictionary:
324:             return row
325:     return {}
326: 
327: 
328: func _build_choices_summary(raw_choices: Variant) -> String:
329:     if not (raw_choices is Array):
330:         return "Narrative Choices: none"
331: 
332:     var choices: Array = raw_choices
333:     if choices.is_empty():
334:         return "Narrative Choices: none"
335: 
336:     var lines: Array[String] = ["Narrative Choices:"]
337:     var display_limit: int = mini(6, choices.size())
338:     for i in range(display_limit):
339:         var item: Variant = choices[i]
340:         if not (item is Dictionary):
341:             continue
342:         var row: Dictionary = item
343:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter"))
344:         var segment_id: String = str(row.get("segment_id", "segment"))
345:         var choice_id: String = str(row.get("choice_id", "choice"))
346:         var alignment_delta: float = float(row.get("alignment_delta", 0.0))
347:         lines.append("- %s / %s -> %s (%+.0f)" % [chapter_id, segment_id, choice_id, alignment_delta])
348: 
349:     if choices.size() > display_limit:
350:         lines.append("... +%d more" % (choices.size() - display_limit))
351: 
352:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
353: 
354: 
355: func _build_route_style_summary(raw_styles: Variant, raw_timeline: Variant) -> String:
356:     var styles: Dictionary = {}
357:     if raw_styles is Dictionary:
358:         styles = raw_styles
359: 
360:     var lines: Array[String] = ["Route Style Evolution:"]
361:     var chapter_parts: Array[String] = []
362:     for idx in range(1, 5):
363:         var chapter_id: String = "chapter_%d" % idx
364:         var style_id: String = str(styles.get(chapter_id, "neutral"))
365:         chapter_parts.append("CH%d:%s" % [idx, _route_style_label_for_id(style_id)])
366:     lines.append("  " + " | ".join(PackedStringArray(chapter_parts)))
367: 
368:     if raw_timeline is Array and not (raw_timeline as Array).is_empty():
369:         var timeline: Array = raw_timeline
370:         lines.append("Locks:")
371:         var limit: int = mini(6, timeline.size())
372:         for i in range(limit):
373:             var row_var: Variant = timeline[i]
374:             if not (row_var is Dictionary):
375:                 continue
376:             var row: Dictionary = row_var
377:             lines.append("- R%d %s -> %s (slot %d)" % [
378:                 int(row.get("room_index", 0)),
379:                 str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter")),
380:                 _route_style_label_for_id(str(row.get("style_id", "neutral"))),
381:                 int(row.get("selected_slot", 0)) + 1
382:             ])
383:         if timeline.size() > limit:
384:             lines.append("... +%d more" % (timeline.size() - limit))
385:     else:
386:         lines.append("Locks: none (all chapters remained NEUTRAL)")
387: 
388:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
389: 
390: 
391: func _route_style_label_for_id(style_id: String) -> String:
392:     match style_id:
393:         "vanguard":
394:             return "VANGUARD"
395:         "raider":
396:             return "RAIDER"
397:         _:
398:             return "NEUTRAL"
399: 
400: 
401: func _build_chapter_effect_timeline_summary(raw_timeline: Variant, mode: String) -> String:
402:     if not (raw_timeline is Array):
403:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
404: 
405:     var timeline: Array = raw_timeline
406:     if timeline.is_empty():
407:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
408: 
409:     var counts: Dictionary = _count_timeline_modes(timeline)
410:     var lines: Array[String] = [
411:         _build_timeline_mode_header(mode),
412:         "Segments -> BOON:%d  CURSE:%d  MIXED:%d" % [
413:             int(counts.get("boon", 0)),
414:             int(counts.get("curse", 0)),
415:             int(counts.get("mixed", 0))
416:         ]
417:     ]
418:     var display_limit: int = 8
419:     var shown: int = 0
420:     var matched_total: int = 0
421:     for i in range(timeline.size()):
422:         var item: Variant = timeline[i]
423:         if not (item is Dictionary):
424:             continue
425: 
426:         var row: Dictionary = item
427:         if not _timeline_row_matches_mode(row, mode):
428:             continue
429:         matched_total += 1
430: 
431:         var room_index: int = int(row.get("room_index", 0))
432:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter"))
433:         var icon: String = str(row.get("icon", "[~]"))
434:         var title: String = str(row.get("title", "Chapter Effect"))
435:         var duration_rooms: int = int(row.get("duration_rooms", 1))
436:         var desc: String = str(row.get("desc", ""))
437: 
438:         var body: String = "- R%d %s %s %s (%dR)" % [room_index, chapter_id, icon, title, duration_rooms]
439:         if desc != "":
440:             body += " | %s" % desc
441:         lines.append(body)
442:         shown += 1
443:         if shown >= display_limit:
444:             break
445: 
446:     if shown == 0:
447:         lines.append("- none under current filter")
448:     elif matched_total > shown:
449:         lines.append("... +%d more" % (matched_total - shown))
450: 
451:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
452: 
453: 
454: func _build_grouped_timeline_summary(raw_timeline: Variant, mode: String) -> String:
455:     if not (raw_timeline is Array):
456:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
457: 
458:     var timeline: Array = raw_timeline
459:     if timeline.is_empty():
460:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
461: 
462:     var counts: Dictionary = _count_timeline_modes(timeline)
463:     var grouped: Dictionary = {}
464:     var filtered_rows: Array = []
465: 
466:     for item: Variant in timeline:
467:         if not (item is Dictionary):
468:             continue
469:         var row: Dictionary = item
470:         if not _timeline_row_matches_mode(row, mode):
471:             continue
472:         filtered_rows.append(row)
473:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter_unknown"))
474:         if not grouped.has(chapter_id):
475:             grouped[chapter_id] = []
476:         (grouped[chapter_id] as Array).append(row)
477: 
478:     var lines: Array[String] = [
479:         _build_timeline_mode_header(mode),
480:         "Segments -> BOON:%d  CURSE:%d  MIXED:%d" % [
481:             int(counts.get("boon", 0)),
482:             int(counts.get("curse", 0)),
483:             int(counts.get("mixed", 0))
484:         ],
485:         "View: Grouped by chapter (collapsed preview)"
486:     ]
487: 
488:     if filtered_rows.is_empty():
489:         lines.append("- none under current filter")
490:         return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
491: 
492:     var chapter_order: Array[String] = _grouped_chapter_order
493:     if chapter_order.is_empty():
494:         chapter_order = ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]
495:     var anchor_id: String = _get_active_grouped_chapter_id()
496:     if _grouped_anchor_only_scope and anchor_id != "":
497:         chapter_order = [anchor_id]
498:     var faction_tag: String = _get_ending_faction_tag(_current_ending_id)
499: 
500:     var total_lines_limit: int = 12
501:     var emitted_rows: int = 0
502:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in chapter_order:
503:         var chapter_id: String = str(chapter_id_var)
504:         if not grouped.has(chapter_id):
505:             continue
506:         var chapter_rows: Array = grouped[chapter_id]
507:         if chapter_rows.is_empty():
508:             continue
509: 
510:         var is_anchor: bool = chapter_id == anchor_id
511:         lines.append("")
512:         lines.append("%s%s [%s] (%d)" % ["> " if is_anchor else "  ", faction_tag, _chapter_anchor_title(chapter_id), chapter_rows.size()])
513: 
514:         var chapter_limit: int = mini(4 if is_anchor else 1, chapter_rows.size())
515:         for i in range(chapter_limit):
516:             var row: Dictionary = chapter_rows[i]
517:             lines.append(_format_timeline_row(row, "    - "))
518:             emitted_rows += 1
519:             if emitted_rows >= total_lines_limit:
520:                 break
521: 
522:         if chapter_rows.size() > chapter_limit:
523:             lines.append("    ... +%d more" % (chapter_rows.size() - chapter_limit))
524: 
525:         if emitted_rows >= total_lines_limit:
526:             lines.append("... timeline preview truncated")
527:             break
528: 
529:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
530: 
531: 
532: func _format_timeline_row(row: Dictionary, prefix: String) -> String:
533:     var room_index: int = int(row.get("room_index", 0))
534:     var icon: String = str(row.get("icon", "[~]"))
535:     var title: String = str(row.get("title", "Chapter Effect"))
536:     var duration_rooms: int = int(row.get("duration_rooms", 1))
537:     var desc: String = str(row.get("desc", ""))
538: 
539:     var body: String = "%sR%d %s %s (%dR)" % [prefix, room_index, icon, title, duration_rooms]
540:     if desc != "":
541:         body += " | %s" % desc
542:     return body
543: 
544: 
545: func _build_timeline_mode_header(mode: String) -> String:
546:     var tag: String = _get_timeline_mode_tag(mode)
547:     match mode:
548:         "boon":
549:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Blessing Route" % tag
550:         "curse":
551:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Burden Route" % tag
552:         "mixed":
553:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Hybrid Route" % tag
554:         _:
555:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Full Replay" % tag
556: 
557: 
558: func _count_timeline_modes(timeline: Array) -> Dictionary:
559:     var counts: Dictionary = {
560:         "boon": 0,
561:         "curse": 0,
562:         "mixed": 0
563:     }
564:     for item: Variant in timeline:
565:         if not (item is Dictionary):
566:             continue
567:         var mode: String = _resolve_timeline_row_mode(item)
568:         counts[mode] = int(counts.get(mode, 0)) + 1
569:     return counts
570: 
571: 
572: func _rebuild_grouped_chapter_order(mode: String) -> void:
573:     var previous_anchor_id: String = _get_active_grouped_chapter_id()
574: 
575:     var preferred: Array[String] = ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]
576:     var dynamic: Array[String] = []
577:     for item: Variant in _timeline_rows:
578:         if not (item is Dictionary):
579:             continue
580:         var row: Dictionary = item
581:         if not _timeline_row_matches_mode(row, mode):
582:             continue
583:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter_unknown"))
584:         if chapter_id == "":
585:             chapter_id = "chapter_unknown"
586:         if not dynamic.has(chapter_id):
587:             dynamic.append(chapter_id)
588: 
589:     _grouped_chapter_order.clear()
590:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in preferred:
591:         var chapter_id: String = str(chapter_id_var)
592:         if dynamic.has(chapter_id):
593:             _grouped_chapter_order.append(chapter_id)
594: 
595:     var overflow: Array[String] = []
596:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in dynamic:
597:         var chapter_id: String = str(chapter_id_var)
598:         if not _grouped_chapter_order.has(chapter_id):
599:             overflow.append(chapter_id)
600:     overflow.sort()
601:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in overflow:
602:         _grouped_chapter_order.append(str(chapter_id_var))
603: 
604:     if _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty():
605:         _grouped_anchor_index = 0
606:         return
607: 
608:     if previous_anchor_id != "" and _grouped_chapter_order.has(previous_anchor_id):
609:         _grouped_anchor_index = _grouped_chapter_order.find(previous_anchor_id)
610:     else:
611:         _grouped_anchor_index = clampi(_grouped_anchor_index, 0, _grouped_chapter_order.size() - 1)
612: 
613: 
614: func _shift_grouped_anchor(step: int) -> void:
615:     if not _timeline_grouped_view or _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty():
616:         return
617:     _grouped_anchor_index = posmod(_grouped_anchor_index + step, _grouped_chapter_order.size())
618:     _refresh_timeline_view()
619: 
620: 
621: func _get_active_grouped_chapter_id() -> String:
622:     if _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty():
623:         return ""
624:     var safe_index: int = clampi(_grouped_anchor_index, 0, _grouped_chapter_order.size() - 1)
625:     return _grouped_chapter_order[safe_index]
626: 
627: 
628: func _chapter_anchor_title(chapter_id: String) -> String:
629:     if chapter_id.begins_with("chapter_"):
630:         var suffix: String = chapter_id.trim_prefix("chapter_")
631:         if suffix.is_valid_int():
632:             return "CH%s" % suffix
633:     if chapter_id == "":
634:         return ""
635:     return chapter_id.to_upper()
636: 
637: 
638: func _resolve_timeline_row_mode(row: Dictionary) -> String:
639:     var score: float = _timeline_row_score(row)
640:     if score >= 0.25:
641:         return "boon"
642:     if score <= -0.25:
643:         return "curse"
644:     return "mixed"
645: 
646: 
647: func _timeline_row_score(row: Dictionary) -> float:
648:     if row.has("score"):
649:         return float(row.get("score", 0.0))
650: 
651:     var icon: String = str(row.get("icon", "[~]"))
652:     if icon == "[+]":
653:         return 1.0
654:     if icon == "[-]":
655:         return -1.0
656:     return 0.0
657: 
658: 
659: func _timeline_row_matches_mode(row: Dictionary, mode: String) -> bool:
660:     if mode == "all":
661:         return true
662: 
663:     var score: float = _timeline_row_score(row)
664: 
665:     if mode == "boon":
666:         return score >= 0.25
667:     if mode == "curse":
668:         return score <= -0.25
669:     if mode == "mixed":
670:         return score > -0.25 and score < 0.25
671:     return true
672: 
673: 
674: func _get_timeline_mode_tag(mode: String) -> String:
675:     var row: Dictionary = _get_timeline_theme(mode)
676:     return str(row.get("tag", "[ALL]"))
677: 
678: 
679: func _apply_timeline_filter_theme(mode: String) -> void:
680:     var row: Dictionary = _get_timeline_theme(mode)
681:     var tint: Color = row.get("tint", TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME["all"]["tint"])
682:     if _effects_timeline_label != null:
683:         _effects_timeline_label.modulate = tint
684:     if _timeline_filter_button != null:
685:         _timeline_filter_button.modulate = tint
686:     if _timeline_view_button != null:
687:         _timeline_view_button.modulate = tint
688:     if _timeline_scope_button != null:
689:         _timeline_scope_button.modulate = tint
690: 
691: 
692: func _apply_anchor_faction_theme() -> void:
693:     var theme: Dictionary = _get_ending_faction_theme(_current_ending_id)
694:     var tint: Color = theme.get("tint", ENDING_FACTION_THEME["default"]["tint"])
695:     if _timeline_anchor_button != null:
696:         _timeline_anchor_button.modulate = tint
697: 
698: 
699: func _get_timeline_theme(mode: String) -> Dictionary:
700:     if TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME.has(mode):
701:         return TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME[mode]
702:     return TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME["all"]
703: 
704: 
705: func _get_ending_faction_theme(ending_id: String) -> Dictionary:
706:     if ENDING_FACTION_THEME.has(ending_id):
707:         return ENDING_FACTION_THEME[ending_id]
708:     return ENDING_FACTION_THEME["default"]

711: func _get_ending_faction_tag(ending_id: String) -> String:
712:     var row: Dictionary = _get_ending_faction_theme(ending_id)
713:     return str(row.get("tag", "[ARCHIVE]"))

3492:     elif _current_room_type == ROOM_TYPE_TREASURE and _treasure_challenge_enabled:

3494:     return base_intensity * _chapter_effect_hazard_mult * _route_hazard_mult * _get_room_hazard_pressure(_room_index)
3495: 
3496: 
3497: func _get_resistance(stats: Node, property_name: String) -> float:
3498:     if stats == null or stats.get(property_name) == null:
3499:         return 0.0
3500:     return clampf(float(stats.get(property_name)), 0.0, 0.75)
3501: 
3502: 
3503: func _apply_room_theme(index: int) -> void:
3504:     var chapter_row: Dictionary = _get_chapter_environment_row(index)
3505:     var palette_var: Variant = chapter_row.get("tile_palette", [])
3506:     if not (palette_var is Array):
3507:         _target_background_color = Color(0.10, 0.09, 0.13, 1.0)
3508:         _render_ground_tiles_for_room(index)
3509:         _render_ground_detail_tiles_for_room(index)
3510:         return
3511: 
3512:     var palette: Array = palette_var
3513:     if palette.is_empty():
3514:         _target_background_color = Color(0.10, 0.09, 0.13, 1.0)
3515:         _render_ground_tiles_for_room(index)
3516:         _render_ground_detail_tiles_for_room(index)
3517:         return
3518: 
3519:     _target_background_color = Color.html(str(palette[0]))
3520:     _render_ground_tiles_for_room(index)
3521:     _render_ground_detail_tiles_for_room(index)
3522: 
3523: 
3524: func _initialize_tile_layers() -> void:
3525:     _load_tileset_resources()
3526: 
3527:     if _ground_tilemap != null:
3528:         var ground_tileset: TileSet = _get_ground_tileset_for_room(_room_index)
3529:         if ground_tileset != null:
3530:             _ground_tilemap.tile_set = ground_tileset
3531:     if _ground_detail_tilemap != null:
3532:         var ground_detail_tileset: TileSet = _get_ground_detail_tileset_for_room(_room_index)
3533:         if ground_detail_tileset != null:
3534:             _ground_detail_tilemap.tile_set = ground_detail_tileset
3535:     if _door_tilemap != null:
3536:         var door_tileset: TileSet = _get_door_tileset_for_room(_room_index)
3537:         if door_tileset != null:
3538:             _door_tilemap.tile_set = door_tileset
3539:     if _hazard_tilemap != null:
3540:         var hazard_tileset: TileSet = _get_hazard_tileset_for_room(_room_index)
3541:         if hazard_tileset != null:
3542:             _hazard_tilemap.tile_set = hazard_tileset
3543:         _hazard_tilemap.modulate = Color(0.18, 0.34, 0.50, 0.0)
3544:     if _ambient_fx_tilemap != null:
3545:         var ambient_tileset: TileSet = _get_ambient_fx_tileset_for_room(_room_index)
3546:         if ambient_tileset != null:
3547:             _ambient_fx_tilemap.tile_set = ambient_tileset
3548:         _ambient_fx_tilemap.modulate = Color(0.82, 0.88, 0.95, 0.0)
3549:         _ambient_fx_tilemap.position = Vector2.ZERO
3550:     _ambient_fx_scroll_offset = Vector2.ZERO
3551:     _visual_profile_anim_time = 0.0
3552:     _render_ground_tiles_for_room(_room_index)
3553:     _render_ground_detail_tiles_for_room(_room_index)
3554:     _render_door_tiles(false)

3556:     _render_ambient_fx_tiles()

<type>file</type>
<content>1: extends GutTest
2: 
3: const GAME_WORLD_SCENE_PATH := "res://scenes/game/game_world.tscn"
4: const NARRATIVE_SYSTEM_SCRIPT := preload("res://scripts/systems/narrative_system.gd")
5: 
6: 
7: func _instantiate_world() -> Node:
8: 	var scene: PackedScene = load(GAME_WORLD_SCENE_PATH)
9: 	assert_not_null(scene, "game_world scene should load")
10: 	if scene == null:
11: 		return null
12: 
13: 	var world: Node = scene.instantiate()
14: 	assert_not_null(world, "game_world scene should instantiate")
15: 	if world == null:
16: 		return null
17: 
18: 	add_child_autofree(world)
19: 	await get_tree().process_frame
20: 	return world
21: 
22: 
23: func _set_room_plan(world: Node, room_index: int, chapter_id: String, room_type: String, next_rooms: Array = []) -> void:
24: 	var room_plan_map_var: Variant = world.get("_room_plan_map")
25: 	var room_plan_map: Dictionary = {}
26: 	if room_plan_map_var is Dictionary:
27: 		room_plan_map = (room_plan_map_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
28: 
29: 	room_plan_map[room_index] = {
30: 		"chapter_id": chapter_id,
31: 		"chapter_index": int(chapter_id.trim_prefix("chapter_")),
32: 		"room_type": room_type,
33: 		"show_intro": false,
34: 		"next_rooms": next_rooms,
35: 		"previous_rooms": []
36: 	}
37: 	world.set("_room_plan_map", room_plan_map)
38: 
39: 
40: func test_narrative_system_route_arc_and_camp_reflection_helpers() -> void:
41: 	var system: Node = NARRATIVE_SYSTEM_SCRIPT.new()
42: 	assert_not_null(system, "narrative system should instantiate")
43: 	if system == null:
44: 		return
45: 
46: 	add_child_autofree(system)
47: 	await get_tree().process_frame
48: 
49: 	system.record_choice("chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "keep_the_oath", 12.0)
50: 	system.record_choice("chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "answer_the_choir", 9.0)
51: 
52: 	var route_arc: Dictionary = system.get_route_arc_summary(72.0, "vanguard")
53: 	assert_eq(str(route_arc.get("arc_id", "")), "redeem", "high alignment should resolve to redeem route arc")
54: 	assert_string_contains(str(route_arc.get("style_echo", "")), "Vanguard", "route arc should include route style echo")
55: 
56: 	var unlocked_fragments: Array[String] = ["memory_ch1_boss", "memory_ch2_boss"]
57: 	var reflection: Dictionary = system.get_camp_reflection("chapter_3", 72.0, "vanguard", unlocked_fragments)
58: 	assert_eq(str(reflection.get("arc_id", "")), "redeem", "camp reflection should track redeem arc")
59: 	assert_string_contains(str(reflection.get("fragment_progress", "")), "Fragment progress:", "camp reflection should include fragment progress summary")
60: 	assert_string_contains(str(reflection.get("recent_choice_summary", "")), "Recent vows:", "camp reflection should include recent choice summary")
61: 
62: 
63: func test_camp_text_and_transition_panel_include_stage5_narrative_summaries() -> void:
64: 	var world: Node = await _instantiate_world()
65: 	if world == null:
66: 		return
67: 
68: 	_set_room_plan(world, 10, "chapter_3", "safe_camp", [12])
69: 	_set_room_plan(world, 12, "chapter_3", "boss", [])
70: 	world.set("_room_index", 10)
71: 	world.set("_current_room_type", "safe_camp")
72: 	world.set("_alignment", 68.0)
73: 	world.set("_current_route_style", "vanguard")
74: 
75: 	var narrative_system: Node = world.get_node_or_null("NarrativeSystem")
76: 	assert_not_null(narrative_system, "game world should expose NarrativeSystem")
77: 	if narrative_system == null:
78: 		return
79: 
80: 	narrative_system.call("record_choice", "chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "keep_the_oath", 12.0)
81: 	narrative_system.call("record_choice", "chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "answer_the_choir", 9.0)
82: 
83: 	world.call("_update_camp_text")
84: 	var status_label: Label = world.get_node_or_null("HUD/MarginContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/RoomStatusValue")
85: 	assert_not_null(status_label, "room status label should exist")
86: 	if status_label == null:
87: 		return
88: 
89: 	assert_string_contains(status_label.text, "Route arc:", "camp text should include route arc line")
90: 	assert_string_contains(status_label.text, "Camp reflection:", "camp text should include camp reflection line")
91: 	assert_string_contains(status_label.text, "Fragment progress:", "camp text should include fragment progress line")
92: 	assert_string_contains(status_label.text, "Recent vows:", "camp text should include recent choice summary")
93: 
94: 	world.set("_room_index", 12)
95: 	world.set("_current_room_type", "boss")
96: 	world.call("_begin_chapter_transition", 3)
97: 
98: 	var transition_panel: Control = world.get_node_or_null("ChapterTransitionPanel")
99: 	assert_not_null(transition_panel, "chapter transition panel should exist")
100: 	if transition_panel == null:
101: 		return
102: 
103: 	var body_label: Label = transition_panel.get_node_or_null("CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/Body")
104: 	assert_not_null(body_label, "transition body label should exist")
105: 	if body_label == null:
106: 		return
107: 
108: 	assert_string_contains(body_label.text, "Route arc:", "transition body should include route arc summary")
109: 	assert_string_contains(body_label.text, "Fragment progress:", "transition body should include fragment progress summary")
110: 	assert_string_contains(body_label.text, "Recent vows:", "transition body should include recent choice summary")

1296:         if stats.get("armor") != null:

1298:         if stats.get("frostbite_resistance") != null:

72:     var outcome: String = str(run_result.get("outcome", "death")).to_upper()
73:     _title_label.text = "Run %s" % outcome
74: 
75:     _summary_label.text = "Rooms %d | Kills %d | Lv %d | Meta +%d" % [
76:         int(run_result.get("rooms_cleared", 0)),
77:         int(run_result.get("kills", 0)),
78:         int(run_result.get("level_reached", 1)),
79:         int(run_result.get("meta_reward", 0))
80:     ]
81: 
82:     var lines: Array[String] = []
83:     _choices_label.text = _build_choices_summary(run_result.get("narrative_choices", []))
84:     _route_style_label.text = _build_route_style_summary(
85:         run_result.get("chapter_route_styles", {}),
86:         run_result.get("route_style_timeline", [])
87:     )
88:     _timeline_rows = []
89:     var timeline_var: Variant = run_result.get("chapter_effect_timeline", [])
90:     if timeline_var is Array:
91:         _timeline_rows = timeline_var
92:     _timeline_filter_index = posmod(_timeline_filter_index, TIMELINE_FILTER_ORDER.size())
93:     _grouped_anchor_index = 0
94:     _grouped_chapter_order.clear()
95:     _refresh_timeline_view()
96: 
97:     var ending_id: String = str(run_result.get("ending_id", ""))
98:     _current_ending_id = ending_id
99:     if ending_id != "":
100:         var epilogue: String = str(run_result.get("ending_epilogue", ""))
101:         var ending_body: String = "%s\n%s" % [_get_ending_title(ending_id), _get_ending_story(ending_id)]
102:         var payoff_var: Variant = run_result.get("ending_payoff", {})
103:         if payoff_var is Dictionary and not (payoff_var as Dictionary).is_empty():
104:             var payoff: Dictionary = payoff_var
105:             ending_body += "\n\nPayoff: %s\n%s" % [
106:                 str(payoff.get("title", "Final Payoff")),
107:                 str(payoff.get("summary", ""))
108:             ]
109:             var legacy: String = str(payoff.get("legacy", "")).strip_edges()
110:             if legacy != "":
111:                 ending_body += "\nLegacy: %s" % legacy
112:             var fragment_hook: String = str(payoff.get("fragment_hook", "")).strip_edges()
113:             if fragment_hook != "":
114:                 ending_body += "\nFragment Hook: %s" % fragment_hook
115:         if epilogue != "":
116:             ending_body += "\n\nEpilogue: %s" % epilogue
117:         var epilogue_chain_var: Variant = run_result.get("ending_epilogue_chain", [])
118:         if epilogue_chain_var is Array and not (epilogue_chain_var as Array).is_empty():
119:             var chain_rows: Array[String] = []
120:             for item: Variant in epilogue_chain_var:

<type>file</type>
<content>1: extends GutTest
2: 
3: const GAME_WORLD_SCENE_PATH := "res://scenes/game/game_world.tscn"
4: const NARRATIVE_SYSTEM_SCRIPT := preload("res://scripts/systems/narrative_system.gd")
5: 
6: 
7: func _instantiate_world() -> Node:
8: 	var scene: PackedScene = load(GAME_WORLD_SCENE_PATH)
9: 	assert_not_null(scene, "game_world scene should load")
10: 	if scene == null:
11: 		return null
12: 
13: 	var world: Node = scene.instantiate()
14: 	assert_not_null(world, "game_world scene should instantiate")
15: 	if world == null:
16: 		return null
17: 
18: 	add_child_autofree(world)
19: 	await get_tree().process_frame
20: 	return world
21: 
22: 
23: func _set_room_plan(world: Node, room_index: int, chapter_id: String, room_type: String, next_rooms: Array = []) -> void:
24: 	var room_plan_map_var: Variant = world.get("_room_plan_map")
25: 	var room_plan_map: Dictionary = {}
26: 	if room_plan_map_var is Dictionary:
27: 		room_plan_map = (room_plan_map_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
28: 
29: 	room_plan_map[room_index] = {
30: 		"chapter_id": chapter_id,
31: 		"chapter_index": int(chapter_id.trim_prefix("chapter_")),
32: 		"room_type": room_type,
33: 		"show_intro": false,
34: 		"next_rooms": next_rooms,
35: 		"previous_rooms": []
36: 	}
37: 	world.set("_room_plan_map", room_plan_map)
38: 
39: 
40: func test_narrative_system_route_arc_and_camp_reflection_helpers() -> void:
41: 	var system: Node = NARRATIVE_SYSTEM_SCRIPT.new()
42: 	assert_not_null(system, "narrative system should instantiate")
43: 	if system == null:
44: 		return
45: 
46: 	add_child_autofree(system)
47: 	await get_tree().process_frame
48: 
49: 	system.record_choice("chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "keep_the_oath", 12.0)
50: 	system.record_choice("chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "answer_the_choir", 9.0)
51: 
52: 	var route_arc: Dictionary = system.get_route_arc_summary(72.0, "vanguard")
53: 	assert_eq(str(route_arc.get("arc_id", "")), "redeem", "high alignment should resolve to redeem route arc")
54: 	assert_string_contains(str(route_arc.get("style_echo", "")), "Vanguard", "route arc should include route style echo")
55: 
56: 	var unlocked_fragments: Array[String] = ["memory_ch1_boss", "memory_ch2_boss"]
57: 	var reflection: Dictionary = system.get_camp_reflection("chapter_3", 72.0, "vanguard", unlocked_fragments)
58: 	assert_eq(str(reflection.get("arc_id", "")), "redeem", "camp reflection should track redeem arc")
59: 	assert_string_contains(str(reflection.get("fragment_progress", "")), "Fragment progress:", "camp reflection should include fragment progress summary")
60: 	assert_string_contains(str(reflection.get("recent_choice_summary", "")), "Recent vows:", "camp reflection should include recent choice summary")
61: 
62: 
63: func test_camp_text_and_transition_panel_include_stage5_narrative_summaries() -> void:
64: 	var world: Node = await _instantiate_world()
65: 	if world == null:
66: 		return
67: 
68: 	_set_room_plan(world, 10, "chapter_3", "safe_camp", [12])
69: 	_set_room_plan(world, 12, "chapter_3", "boss", [])
70: 	world.set("_room_index", 10)
71: 	world.set("_current_room_type", "safe_camp")
72: 	world.set("_alignment", 68.0)
73: 	world.set("_current_route_style", "vanguard")
74: 
75: 	var narrative_system: Node = world.get_node_or_null("NarrativeSystem")
76: 	assert_not_null(narrative_system, "game world should expose NarrativeSystem")
77: 	if narrative_system == null:
78: 		return
79: 
80: 	narrative_system.call("record_choice", "chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "keep_the_oath", 12.0)
81: 	narrative_system.call("record_choice", "chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "answer_the_choir", 9.0)
82: 
83: 	world.call("_update_camp_text")
84: 	var status_label: Label = world.get_node_or_null("HUD/MarginContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/RoomStatusValue")
85: 	assert_not_null(status_label, "room status label should exist")
86: 	if status_label == null:
87: 		return
88: 
89: 	assert_string_contains(status_label.text, "Route arc:", "camp text should include route arc line")
90: 	assert_string_contains(status_label.text, "Camp reflection:", "camp text should include camp reflection line")
91: 	assert_string_contains(status_label.text, "Fragment progress:", "camp text should include fragment progress line")
92: 	assert_string_contains(status_label.text, "Recent vows:", "camp text should include recent choice summary")
93: 
94: 	world.set("_room_index", 12)
95: 	world.set("_current_room_type", "boss")
96: 	world.call("_begin_chapter_transition", 3)
97: 
98: 	var transition_panel: Control = world.get_node_or_null("ChapterTransitionPanel")
99: 	assert_not_null(transition_panel, "chapter transition panel should exist")
100: 	if transition_panel == null:
101: 		return
102: 
103: 	var body_label: Label = transition_panel.get_node_or_null("CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/Body")
104: 	assert_not_null(body_label, "transition body label should exist")
105: 	if body_label == null:
106: 		return
107: 
108: 	assert_string_contains(body_label.text, "Route arc:", "transition body should include route arc summary")
109: 	assert_string_contains(body_label.text, "Fragment progress:", "transition body should include fragment progress summary")
110: 	assert_string_contains(body_label.text, "Recent vows:", "transition body should include recent choice summary")

null:\n+\t\treturn null\n+\n+\tvar panel: Control = scene.instantiate() as Control\n+\tassert_not_null(panel, \"run_result_panel scene should instantiate\")\n+\tif panel == null:\n+\t\treturn null\n+\n+\tadd_child_autofree(panel)\n+\tawait get_tree().process_frame\n+\treturn panel\n+\n+\n+func _set_room_plan(world: Node, room_index: int, chapter_id: String, room_type: String, next_rooms: Array = []) -> void:\n+\tvar room_plan_map_var: Variant = world.get(\"_room_plan_map\")\n+\tvar room_plan_map: Dictionary = {}\n+\tif room_plan_map_var is Dictionary:\n+\t\troom_plan_map = (room_plan_map_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)\n+\n+\troom_plan_map[room_index] = {\n+\t\t\"chapter_id\": chapter_id,\n+\t\t\"chapter_index\": int(chapter_id.trim_prefix(\"chapter_\")),\n+\t\t\"room_type\": room_type,\n+\t\t\"show_intro\": false,\n+\t\t\"next_rooms\": next_rooms,\n+\t\t\"previous_rooms\": []\n+\t}\n+\tworld.set(\"_room_plan_map\", room_plan_map)\n+\n+\n+func test_save_manager_persists_stage5_payoff_fields_on_victory() -> void:\n+\tif SaveManager == null:\n+\t\tpending(\"SaveManager singleton not available\")\n+\t\treturn\n+\n+\tSaveManager.reset_meta()\n+\tvar result: Dictionary = SaveManager.submit_run_result({\n+\t\t\"outcome\": \"victory\",\n+\t\t\"rooms_cleared\": 15,\n+\t\t\"kills\": 320,\n+\t\t\"level_reached\": 12,\n+\t\t\"gold\": 210,\n+\t\t\"ore\": 42,\n+\t\t\"alignment\": 74.0,\n+\t\t\"route_style\": \"vanguard\",\n+\t\t\"fragment_triggers\": [{\n+\t\t\t\"chapter_id\": \"chapter_3\",\n+\t\t\t\"trigger_type\": \"camp\",\n+\t\t\t\"arc_id\": \"redeem\",\n+\t\t\t\"style\": \"vanguard\",\n+\t\t\t\"fragment_id\": \"memory_camp_oracle\",\n+\t\t\t\"fragment_title\": \"Fragment XXXIII: Quiet Beneath Embers\",\n+\t\t\t\"fragment_text\": \"When the altar dimmed...\",\n+\t\t\t\"newly_unlocked\": true,\n+\t\t\t\"room_index\": 10\n+\t\t}]\n+\t})\n+\n+\tassert_eq(str(result.get(\"ending_id\", \"\")), \"nar_ending_redeem\", \"high alignment victory should resolve to redeem ending\")\n+\tassert_eq(str(result.get(\"route_style\", \"\")), \"vanguard\", \"last run should persist resolved route_style\")\n+\tvar payoff: Dictionary = result.get(\"ending_payoff\", {})\n+\tassert_false(payoff.is_empty(), \"ending payoff should be persisted\")\n+\tassert_eq(str(payoff.get(\"arc_id\", \"\")), \"redeem\", \"ending payoff should include resolved route arc\")\n+\tassert_eq(str(payoff.get(\"style\", \"\")), \"vanguard\", \"ending payoff should include route style\")\n+\tvar chain: Array = result.get(\"ending_epilogue_chain\", [])\n+\tassert_gte(chain.size(), 3, \"ending epilogue chain should be persisted\")\n+\tvar triggers: Array = result.get(\"fragment_triggers\", [])\n+\tassert_eq(triggers.size(), 1, \"fragment trigger log should be persisted\")\n+\n+\n+func test_game_world_fragment_pacing_and_run_result_panel_show_stage5_details() -> void:\n+\tif SaveManager == null:\n+\t\tpending(\"SaveManager singleton not available\")\n+\t\treturn\n+\n+\tSaveManager.reset_meta()\n+\tvar world: Node = await _instantiate_world()\n+\tif world == null:\n+\t\treturn\n+\n+\t_set_room_plan(world, 10, \"chapter_3\", \"safe_camp\", [11])\n+\t_set_room_plan(world, 11, \"chapter_3\", \"event\", [12])\n+\t_set_room_plan(world, 12, \"chapter_3\", \"boss\", [])\n+\tworld.set(\"_alignment\", 72.0)\n+\tworld.set(\"_current_route_style\", \"vanguard\")\n+\n+\tvar narrative_system: Node = world.get_node_or_null(\"NarrativeSystem\")\n+\tassert_not_null(narrative_system, \"NarrativeSystem should exist in game world\")\n+\tif narrative_system == null:\n+\t\treturn\n+\n+\tnarrative_system.call(\"record_choice\", \"chapter_3\", \"nar_evt_whispers\", \"keep_the_oath\", 12.0)\n+\tnarrative_system.call(\"record_choice\", \"chapter_3\", \"nar_evt_whispers\", \"answer_the_choir\", 9.0)\n+\n+\tworld.set(\"_room_index\", 10)\n+\tworld.set(\"_current_room_type\", \"safe_camp\")\n+\tworld.call(\"_enter_safe_camp_room\")\n+\n+\tvar trigger_log: Array = world.get(\"_run_fragment_triggers\")\n+\tassert_gte(trigger_log.size(), 1, \"camp pacing should add a fragment trigger entry\")\n+\tvar latest_line: String = str(world.call(\"_get_latest_fragment_trigger_line\"))\n+\tassert_string_contains(latest_line, \"Memory\", \"latest fragment trigger line should be human-readable\")\n+\n+\tworld.set(\"_room_index\", 11)\n+\tworld.set(\"_current_room_type\", \"event\")\n+\tworld.call(\"_on_event_closed\")\n+\ttrigger_log = world.get(\"_run_fragment_triggers\")\n+\tassert_gte(trigger_log.size(), 2, \"event pacing should append a fragment trigger entry\")\n+\n+\tworld.set(\"_room_index\", 12)\n+\tworld.set(\"_current_room_type\", \"boss\")\n+\tworld.call(\"_on_transition_closed\")\n+\ttrigger_log = world.get(\"_run_fragment_triggers\")\n+\tassert_gte(trigger_log.size(), 3, \"transition pacing should append a fragment trigger entry\")\n+\n+\tvar run_result: Dictionary = SaveManager.submit_run_result({\n+\t\t\"outcome\": \"victory\",\n+\t\t\"rooms_cleared\": 15,\n+\t\t\"kills\": 290,\n+\t\t\"level_reached\": 11,\n+\t\t\"gold\": 180,\n+\t\t\"ore\": 36,\n+\t\t\"alignment\": float(world.get(\"_alignment\")),\n+\t\t\"route_style\": str(world.call(\"_resolve_run_route_style_for_payoff\")),\n+\t\t\"fragment_triggers\": trigger_log,\n+\t\t\"narrative_choices\": narrative_system.call(\"get_run_choices\"),\n+\t\t\"chapter_effect_timeline\": [],\n+\t\t\"chapter_route_styles\": {},\n+\t\t\"route_style_timeline\": []\n+\t})\n+\n+\tvar panel: Control = await _instantiate_run_result_panel()\n+\tif panel == null:\n+\t\treturn\n+\tpanel.call(\"show_result\", run_result)\n+\n+\tvar ending_label: Label = panel.get_node_or_null(\"CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/EndingStory\")\n+\tvar unlock_label: Label = panel.get_node_or_null(\"CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/Unlocks\")\n+\tassert_not_null(ending_label, \"EndingStory label should exist\")\n+\tassert_not_null(unlock_label, \"Unlocks label should exist\")\n+\tif ending_label == null or unlock_label == null:\n+\t\treturn\n+\n+\tassert_string_contains(ending_label.text, \"Payoff:\", \"run result panel should render ending payoff summary\")\n+\tassert_string_contains(ending_label.text, \"Epilogue Chain:\", \"run result panel should render epilogue chain\")\n+\tassert_string_contains(unlock_label.text, \"Fragments:\", \"run result panel should render fragment trigger list\")\n*** End Patch"
