```
213: 
214: 
215: func update_runtime_settings(patch: Dictionary) -> Dictionary:
216:     var current: Dictionary = get_runtime_settings()
217:     for key: Variant in patch.keys():
218:         current[str(key)] = patch.get(key)
219:     _meta["runtime_settings"] = _sanitize_runtime_settings(current)
220:     save_meta()
221:     apply_runtime_settings()
222:     return get_runtime_settings()
223: 
224: 
225: func get_upgrade_level(upgrade_id: String) -> int:
226:     var levels: Dictionary = get_upgrade_levels()
227:     return int(levels.get(upgrade_id, 0))
228: 
229: 
230: func get_upgrade_cost(upgrade_id: String) -> int:
231:     var row: Dictionary = _find_upgrade_row(upgrade_id)
232:     if row.is_empty():
233:         return -1
234: 
235:     var level: int = get_upgrade_level(upgrade_id)
236:     var max_level: int = int(row.get("max_level", 1))
237:     if level >= max_level:
238:         return -1
239: 
240:     var base_cost: int = int(row.get("base_cost", 50))
241:     var step_cost: int = int(row.get("cost_step", 25))
242:     return max(1, base_cost + step_cost * level)
243: 
244: 
245: func purchase_upgrade(upgrade_id: String) -> Dictionary:
246:     var row: Dictionary = _find_upgrade_row(upgrade_id)
247:     if row.is_empty():
248:         return {"ok": false, "reason": "missing_upgrade"}
249: 
250:     var cost: int = get_upgrade_cost(upgrade_id)
251:     if cost < 0:
252:         return {"ok": false, "reason": "max_level"}
253: 
254:     var currency: int = int(_meta.get("meta_currency", 0))
255:     if currency < cost:
256:         return {"ok": false, "reason": "not_enough_currency", "cost": cost, "currency": currency}
257: 
258:     var levels: Dictionary = get_upgrade_levels()
259:     var new_level: int = int(levels.get(upgrade_id, 0)) + 1
260:     levels[upgrade_id] = new_level
261:     _meta["upgrade_levels"] = levels
262:     _meta["meta_currency"] = currency - cost
263:     save_meta()
264: 
265:     return {
266:         "ok": true,
267:         "id": upgrade_id,
268:         "new_level": new_level,
269:         "cost": cost,
270:         "meta_currency": int(_meta.get("meta_currency", 0))
271:     }
272: 
273: 
274: func unlock_memory_fragment(fragment_id: String) -> bool:
275:     if fragment_id == "":
276:         return false
277: 
278:     var rows: Array[String] = get_unlocked_fragments()
279:     if rows.has(fragment_id):
280:         return false
281: 
282:     rows.append(fragment_id)
283:     _meta["unlocked_fragments"] = rows
284:     save_meta()
285:     return true
286: 
287: 
288: func load_meta() -> void:
289:     _meta = _default_meta()
290:     _last_run = {}
291: 
292:     if not FileAccess.file_exists(SAVE_PATH):
293:         save_meta()
294:         return
295: 
296:     var text: String = FileAccess.get_file_as_string(SAVE_PATH)
297:     var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(text)
298:     if not (parsed is Dictionary):
299:         push_warning("Meta save corrupted, fallback to default")
300:         save_meta()
301:         return
302: 
303:     var data: Dictionary = parsed
304:     _meta["meta_currency"] = int(data.get("meta_currency", 0))
305:     _meta["total_runs"] = int(data.get("total_runs", 0))
306:     _meta["total_kills"] = int(data.get("total_kills", 0))
307:     _meta["highest_room"] = int(data.get("highest_room", 1))
308:     _meta["best_level"] = int(data.get("best_level", 1))
309:     _meta["best_alignment"] = float(data.get("best_alignment", 0.0))
310:     _meta["total_victories"] = int(data.get("total_victories", 0))
311:     _meta["unlocked_achievements"] = _as_string_array(data.get("unlocked_achievements", []))
312:     _meta["unlocked_endings"] = _as_string_array(data.get("unlocked_endings", []))
313:     _meta["unlocked_fragments"] = _as_string_array(data.get("unlocked_fragments", []))
314:     _meta["selected_character_id"] = str(data.get("selected_character_id", "char_knight"))
315:     _meta["upgrade_levels"] = _as_int_dictionary(data.get("upgrade_levels", {}))
316:     _meta["input_bindings"] = _sanitize_input_bindings(data.get("input_bindings", {}))
317:     _meta["runtime_settings"] = _sanitize_runtime_settings(data.get("runtime_settings", {}))
318:     _meta["codex"] = _sanitize_codex(data.get("codex", {}))
319:     _meta["codex_meta"] = _sanitize_codex_meta(data.get("codex_meta", {}))
320:     _meta["codex_stats_filters"] = _sanitize_codex_stats_filters(data.get("codex_stats_filters", {}))
321:     _last_run = data.get("last_run", {})
322: 
323:     var selected_character_id: String = str(_meta.get("selected_character_id", "")).strip_edges()
324:     if selected_character_id != "":
325:         var codex: Dictionary = get_codex()
326:         var rows: Array[String] = _as_string_array(codex.get("characters", []))
327:         if not rows.has(selected_character_id):
328:             rows.append(selected_character_id)
329:             codex["characters"] = rows
330:             _meta["codex"] = codex
331: 
332:         var codex_meta: Dictionary = get_codex_meta()
333:         var selected_key: String = "characters:%s" % selected_character_id
334:         if not codex_meta.has(selected_key):
335:             codex_meta[selected_key] = _build_codex_meta_row("characters", selected_character_id, "profile_sync", "global")
336:             _meta["codex_meta"] = codex_meta
337: 
338: 
339: func save_meta() -> void:
340:     var file: FileAccess = FileAccess.open(SAVE_PATH, FileAccess.WRITE)
341:     if file == null:
342:         push_warning("Cannot write save file: %s" % SAVE_PATH)
343:         return
344: 
345:     var payload: Dictionary = _meta.duplicate(true)
346:     payload["last_run"] = _last_run
347:     file.store_string(JSON.stringify(payload, "  "))
348: 
349: 
350: func submit_run_result(result: Dictionary) -> Dictionary:
351:     var rooms_cleared: int = int(result.get("rooms_cleared", 0))
352:     var kills: int = int(result.get("kills", 0))
353:     var level_reached: int = int(result.get("level_reached", 1))
354:     var alignment: float = float(result.get("alignment", 0.0))
355:     var outcome: String = str(result.get("outcome", "death"))
356:     var ending_id: String = ""
357:     var ending_new_unlock: bool = false
358:     var route_style_id: String = _resolve_last_route_style(result)
359:     var ending_payoff: Dictionary = {}
360:     var ending_epilogue_chain: Array[String] = []
361:     var fragment_triggers: Array[Dictionary] = _sanitize_fragment_trigger_log(result.get("fragment_triggers", []))
362:     var epilogue_branch: Dictionary = {}
363:     var fragment_recap: Dictionary = _get_fragment_recap_payload(fragment_triggers, alignment, route_style_id)
364:     var hidden_layer_hook: Dictionary = _get_hidden_layer_hook_payload(alignment, route_style_id)
365: 
366:     var reward: int = _calc_meta_reward(result)
367: 
368:     _meta["meta_currency"] = int(_meta.get("meta_currency", 0)) + reward
369:     _meta["total_runs"] = int(_meta.get("total_runs", 0)) + 1
370:     _meta["total_kills"] = int(_meta.get("total_kills", 0)) + kills
371:     _meta["highest_room"] = maxi(int(_meta.get("highest_room", 1)), rooms_cleared + 1)
372:     _meta["best_level"] = maxi(int(_meta.get("best_level", 1)), level_reached)
373:     if outcome == "victory":
374:         _meta["total_victories"] = int(_meta.get("total_victories", 0)) + 1
375:         ending_id = _resolve_ending(alignment)
376:         ending_new_unlock = _unlock_ending(ending_id)
377:         ending_payoff = _get_ending_payoff_payload(ending_id, alignment, route_style_id)
378:         ending_epilogue_chain = _get_ending_epilogue_chain(ending_id)
379:         epilogue_branch = _get_epilogue_branch_payload(ending_id, ending_new_unlock, route_style_id)
380:         hidden_layer_hook = _get_hidden_layer_hook_payload(alignment, route_style_id)
381:     if absf(alignment) > absf(float(_meta.get("best_alignment", 0.0))):
382:         _meta["best_alignment"] = alignment
383: 
384:     var unlocked_in_run: Array[String] = _process_achievements(result)
385: 
386:     _last_run = {
387:         "outcome": outcome,
388:         "rooms_cleared": rooms_cleared,
389:         "kills": kills,
390:         "level_reached": level_reached,
391:         "gold": int(result.get("gold", 0)),
392:         "ore": int(result.get("ore", 0)),
393:         "alignment": alignment,
394:         "meta_reward": reward,
395:         "ending_id": ending_id,
396:         "ending_new_unlock": ending_new_unlock,
397:         "ending_epilogue": _get_ending_epilogue(ending_id, ending_new_unlock),
398:         "ending_payoff": ending_payoff,
399:         "ending_epilogue_chain": ending_epilogue_chain,
400:         "epilogue_branch": epilogue_branch,
401:         "fragment_recap": fragment_recap,
402:         "hidden_layer_hook": hidden_layer_hook,
403:         "fragment_triggers": fragment_triggers,
404:         "route_style": route_style_id,
405:         "new_achievements": unlocked_in_run,
406:         "narrative_choices": result.get("narrative_choices", []),
407:         "chapter_effect_timeline": result.get("chapter_effect_timeline", []),
408:         "chapter_route_styles": result.get("chapter_route_styles", {}),
409:         "route_style_timeline": result.get("route_style_timeline", [])
410:     }
411: 
412:     save_meta()
413:     return _last_run.duplicate(true)
414: 
415: 
416: func reset_meta() -> void:
417:     _meta = _default_meta()
418:     _last_run = {}
419:     save_meta()
420: 
421: 
422: func _calc_meta_reward(result: Dictionary) -> int:
423:     var kills: int = int(result.get("kills", 0))
424:     var rooms_cleared: int = int(result.get("rooms_cleared", 0))
425:     var level_reached: int = int(result.get("level_reached", 1))
426:     var gold: int = int(result.get("gold", 0))
427:     var ore: int = int(result.get("ore", 0))
428:     var outcome: String = str(result.get("outcome", "death"))
429: 
430:     var reward: int = 12
431:     reward += int(kills * 0.25)
432:     reward += rooms_cleared * 9
433:     reward += max(0, level_reached - 1) * 2
434:     reward += int(gold * 0.1)
435:     reward += ore * 3
436:     if outcome == "victory":
437:         reward += 60
438: 
439:     return maxi(5, reward)
440: 
441: 
442: func _default_meta() -> Dictionary:
443:     return {
444:         "meta_currency": 0,
445:         "total_runs": 0,
446:         "total_kills": 0,
447:         "highest_room": 1,
448:         "best_level": 1,
449:         "best_alignment": 0.0,
450:         "total_victories": 0,
451:         "unlocked_achievements": [],
452:         "unlocked_endings": [],
453:         "unlocked_fragments": [],
454:         "selected_character_id": "char_knight",
455:         "upgrade_levels": {},
456:         "input_bindings": _default_input_bindings(),
457:         "codex": {
458:             "characters": ["char_knight"],
459:             "weapons": [],
460:             "passives": [],
461:             "enemies": [],
462:             "accessories": []
463:         },
464:         "codex_meta": {
465:             "characters:char_knight": {
466:                 "category": "characters",
467:             "entry_id": "char_knight",
468:             "source": "default",
469:             "chapter_id": "global",
470:             "discovered_at": "init",
471:             "run_index": 0
472:         }
473:         },
474:         "codex_stats_filters": {
475:             "source": "all",
476:             "chapter": "all"
477:         },
478:         "runtime_settings": _default_runtime_settings()
479:     }
480: 
481: 
482: func _default_runtime_settings() -> Dictionary:
483:     return {
484:         "master_volume": 1.0,
485:         "bgm_volume": 1.0,
486:         "sfx_volume": 1.0,
487:         "ambience_volume": 1.0,
488:         "screen_shake": 1.0,
489:         "ui_scale": 1.0
490:     }
491: 
492: 
493: func _default_input_bindings() -> Dictionary:
494:     if GameManager != null and GameManager.has_method("get_default_input_bindings"):
495:         return GameManager.get_default_input_bindings()
496:     return {
497:         "move_up": {"keys": [KEY_W, KEY_UP], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_DPAD_UP]},
498:         "move_down": {"keys": [KEY_S, KEY_DOWN], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_DPAD_DOWN]},
499:         "move_left": {"keys": [KEY_A, KEY_LEFT], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_DPAD_LEFT]},
500:         "move_right": {"keys": [KEY_D, KEY_RIGHT], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_DPAD_RIGHT]},
501:         "sprint": {"keys": [KEY_SHIFT], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_RIGHT_SHOULDER]},
502:         "interact": {"keys": [KEY_E], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_A]},
503:         "pause": {"keys": [KEY_ESCAPE], "joypad_buttons": [JOY_BUTTON_START]}
504:     }
505: 
506: 
507: func _sanitize_input_bindings(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
508:     var source: Dictionary = {}
509:     if value is Dictionary:
510:         source = value
511: 
512:     if GameManager != null and GameManager.has_method("sanitize_input_bindings"):
513:         return GameManager.sanitize_input_bindings(source)
514:     return _default_input_bindings()
515: 
516: 
517: func _sanitize_runtime_settings(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
518:     var defaults: Dictionary = _default_runtime_settings()
519:     var source: Dictionary = {}
520:     if value is Dictionary:
521:         source = value
522: 
523:     var out: Dictionary = defaults.duplicate(true)
524:     out["master_volume"] = clampf(float(source.get("master_volume", out["master_volume"])), 0.0, 1.0)
525:     out["bgm_volume"] = clampf(float(source.get("bgm_volume", out["bgm_volume"])), 0.0, 1.0)
526:     out["sfx_volume"] = clampf(float(source.get("sfx_volume", out["sfx_volume"])), 0.0, 1.0)
527:     out["ambience_volume"] = clampf(float(source.get("ambience_volume", out["ambience_volume"])), 0.0, 1.0)
528:     out["screen_shake"] = clampf(float(source.get("screen_shake", out["screen_shake"])), 0.0, 1.0)
529:     out["ui_scale"] = clampf(float(source.get("ui_scale", out["ui_scale"])), 0.8, 1.5)
530:     return out
531: 
532: 
533: func apply_runtime_settings() -> void:
534:     var settings: Dictionary = get_runtime_settings()
535:     if AudioManager != null and AudioManager.has_method("apply_runtime_settings"):
536:         AudioManager.apply_runtime_settings(settings)
537: 
538:     var scale: float = clampf(float(settings.get("ui_scale", 1.0)), 0.8, 1.5)
539:     if get_tree() != null and get_tree().root != null:
540:         get_tree().root.content_scale_factor = scale
541: 
542:     if EventBus != null and EventBus.has_signal("settings_changed"):
543:         EventBus.settings_changed.emit(settings)
544: 
545: 
546: func apply_input_bindings() -> void:
547:     var bindings: Dictionary = get_input_bindings()
548:     if GameManager != null and GameManager.has_method("apply_input_bindings"):
549:         GameManager.apply_input_bindings(bindings)
550: 
551: 
552: func _on_memory_fragment_found(fragment_id: String) -> void:
553:     unlock_memory_fragment(fragment_id)
554: 
555: 
556: func _on_enemy_killed(enemy_id: String, _position: Vector2) -> void:
557:     unlock_codex_entry("enemies", enemy_id, "enemy_kill", _resolve_codex_chapter_id(""))
558: 
559: 
560: func _on_accessory_acquired(accessory_id: String) -> void:
561:     unlock_codex_entry("accessories", accessory_id, "accessory_pickup", _resolve_codex_chapter_id(""))
562: 
563: 
564: func _process_achievements(result: Dictionary) -> Array[String]:
565:     var unlocked: Array[String] = _as_string_array(_meta.get("unlocked_achievements", []))
566:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("achievements", {})
567:     var rows: Array = config.get("achievements", [])
568:     var new_unlocks: Array[String] = []
569: 
570:     for item: Variant in rows:
571:         if not (item is Dictionary):
572:             continue
573:         var row: Dictionary = item
574:         var ach_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
575:         var condition: String = str(row.get("condition", ""))
576:         if ach_id == "" or condition == "":
577:             continue
578:         if unlocked.has(ach_id):
579:             continue
580:         if not _check_achievement_condition(condition, result):
581:             continue
582: 
583:         unlocked.append(ach_id)
584:         new_unlocks.append(ach_id)
585:         EventBus.achievement_unlocked.emit(ach_id, str(row.get("title", ach_id)))
586: 
587:     _meta["unlocked_achievements"] = unlocked
588:     return new_unlocks
589: 
590: 
591: func _check_achievement_condition(condition: String, result: Dictionary) -> bool:
592:     if condition.begins_with("clear_floor_"):
593:         var needed_room: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "clear_floor_")
594:         return int(result.get("rooms_cleared", 0)) >= needed_room
595: 
596:     if condition.begins_with("alignment_ge_"):
597:         var needed_alignment: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "alignment_ge_")
598:         return float(result.get("alignment", 0.0)) >= float(needed_alignment)
599: 
600:     if condition.begins_with("alignment_le_"):
601:         var max_alignment: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "alignment_le_")
602:         return float(result.get("alignment", 0.0)) <= float(max_alignment)
603: 
604:     if condition.begins_with("kills_ge_"):
605:         var needed_kills: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "kills_ge_")
606:         return int(result.get("kills", 0)) >= needed_kills
607: 
608:     if condition.begins_with("reach_level_"):
609:         var needed_level: int = _extract_suffix_int(condition, "reach_level_")
610:         return int(result.get("level_reached", 1)) >= needed_level
611: 
612:     if condition == "victory_once":
613:         return str(result.get("outcome", "")) == "victory"
614: 
615:     return false
616: 
617: 
618: func _resolve_ending(alignment: float) -> String:
619:     if alignment >= 60.0:
620:         return ENDING_REDEEM
621:     if alignment <= -60.0:
622:         return ENDING_FALL
623:     return ENDING_BALANCE
624: 
625: 
626: func _unlock_ending(ending_id: String) -> bool:
627:     if ending_id == "":
628:         return false
629:     var endings: Array[String] = _as_string_array(_meta.get("unlocked_endings", []))
630:     if endings.has(ending_id):
631:         return false
632: 
633:     endings.append(ending_id)
634:     _meta["unlocked_endings"] = endings
635:     EventBus.ending_unlocked.emit(ending_id)
636:     return true
637: 
638: 
639: func _get_ending_epilogue(ending_id: String, newly_unlocked: bool) -> String:
640:     if ending_id == "":
641:         return ""
642: 
643:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
644:     var ending_rows_var: Variant = config.get("endings", {})
645:     if ending_rows_var is Dictionary:
646:         var row_var: Variant = (ending_rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
647:         if row_var is Dictionary:
648:             var row: Dictionary = row_var
649:             if newly_unlocked:
650:                 return str(row.get("epilogue_first_unlock", row.get("story", "")))
651:             return str(row.get("epilogue_repeat", row.get("story", "")))
652: 
653:     if newly_unlocked:
654:         return "A new ending is engraved into the memory archive."
655:     return "The ending echoes differently on this repeated cycle."
656: 
657: 
658: func _get_ending_payoff_payload(ending_id: String, alignment: float, route_style: String) -> Dictionary:
659:     if ending_id == "":
660:         return {}
661: 
662:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
663:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("ending_payoff_profiles", {})
664:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
665:         return {}
666: 
667:     var row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
668:     if not (row_var is Dictionary):
669:         return {}
670: 
671:     var row: Dictionary = (row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
672:     row["ending_id"] = ending_id
673:     row["arc_id"] = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
674:     row["style"] = route_style
675:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
676:     return row
677: 
678: 
679: func _get_ending_epilogue_chain(ending_id: String) -> Array[String]:
680:     if ending_id == "":
681:         return []
682: 
683:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
684:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("epilogue_chains", {})
685:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
686:         return []
687: 
688:     var chain_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, [])
689:     var rows: Array[String] = []
690:     if chain_var is Array:
691:         for item: Variant in chain_var:
692:             var text: String = str(item).strip_edges()
693:             if text != "":
694:                 rows.append(text)
695:     return rows
696: 
697: 
698: func _get_epilogue_branch_payload(ending_id: String, newly_unlocked: bool, route_style: String) -> Dictionary:
699:     if ending_id == "":
700:         return {}
701: 
702:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
703:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("epilogue_branch_profiles", {})
704:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
705:         return {}
706: 
707:     var ending_row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
708:     if not (ending_row_var is Dictionary):
709:         return {}
710: 
711:     var branch_key: String = "first_unlock" if newly_unlocked else "repeat_unlock"
712:     var branch_row_var: Variant = (ending_row_var as Dictionary).get(branch_key, {})
713:     if not (branch_row_var is Dictionary):
714:         return {}
715: 
716:     var row: Dictionary = (branch_row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
717:     row["ending_id"] = ending_id
718:     row["branch_key"] = branch_key
719:     row["archive_hook"] = str((ending_row_var as Dictionary).get("archive_hook", ""))
720:     row["style"] = route_style
721:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
722:     return row
723: 
724: 
725: func _get_fragment_recap_payload(fragment_triggers: Array[Dictionary], alignment: float, route_style: String) -> Dictionary:
726:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
727:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("fragment_recap_profiles", {})
728:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
729:         return {}
730: 
731:     var arc_id: String = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
732:     var row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(arc_id, {})
733:     if not (row_var is Dictionary):
734:         return {}
735: 
736:     var trigger_count: int = fragment_triggers.size()
737:     var newly_unlocked_count: int = 0
738:     var trigger_types: Array[String] = []
739:     for row: Dictionary in fragment_triggers:
740:         if bool(row.get("newly_unlocked", false)):
741:             newly_unlocked_count += 1
742:         var trigger_type: String = str(row.get("trigger_type", "")).strip_edges()
743:         if trigger_type != "" and not trigger_types.has(trigger_type):
744:             trigger_types.append(trigger_type)
745: 
746:     var recap: Dictionary = (row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
747:     recap["arc_id"] = arc_id
748:     recap["style"] = route_style
749:     recap["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
750:     recap["trigger_count"] = trigger_count
751:     recap["new_unlock_count"] = newly_unlocked_count
752:     recap["trigger_types"] = trigger_types
753:     return recap
754: 
755: 
756: func _get_hidden_layer_hook_payload(alignment: float, route_style: String) -> Dictionary:
757:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
758:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("hidden_layer_hooks", {})
759:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
760:         return {}
761: 
762:     var arc_id: String = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
763:     var row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(arc_id, {})
764:     if not (row_var is Dictionary):
765:         return {}
766: 
767:     var row: Dictionary = (row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
768:     row["arc_id"] = arc_id
769:     row["style"] = route_style
770:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
771:     row["ready"] = _as_string_array(_meta.get("unlocked_endings", [])).has("nar_ending_%s" % arc_id)
772:     return row
773: 
774: 
775: func _resolve_last_route_style(result: Dictionary) -> String:
776:     var direct_style: String = str(result.get("route_style", "")).strip_edges().to_lower()
777:     if direct_style != "":
778:         return direct_style
779: 
780:     var timeline_var: Variant = result.get("route_style_timeline", [])
781:     if timeline_var is Array and not (timeline_var as Array).is_empty():
782:         var timeline: Array = timeline_var
783:         for i in range(timeline.size() - 1, -1, -1):
784:             var row_var: Variant = timeline[i]
785:             if not (row_var is Dictionary):
786:                 continue
787:             var style_id: String = str((row_var as Dictionary).get("style_id", "")).strip_edges().to_lower()
788:             if style_id != "":
789:                 return style_id
790: 
791:     var chapter_styles_var: Variant = result.get("chapter_route_styles", {})
792:     if chapter_styles_var is Dictionary:
793:         var chapter_styles: Dictionary = chapter_styles_var
794:         for chapter_key in ["chapter_4", "chapter_3", "chapter_2", "chapter_1"]:
795:             var style_id: String = str(chapter_styles.get(chapter_key, "")).strip_edges().to_lower()
796:             if style_id != "":
797:                 return style_id
798: 
799:     return "neutral"
800: 
801: 
802: func _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment: float) -> String:
803:     if alignment >= 60.0:
804:         return ENDING_REDEEM.trim_prefix("nar_ending_")
805:     if alignment <= -60.0:
806:         return ENDING_FALL.trim_prefix("nar_ending_")
807:     return ENDING_BALANCE.trim_prefix("nar_ending_")
808: 
809: 
810: func _get_route_style_echo(route_style: String) -> String:
811:     match route_style:
812:         "vanguard":
813:             return "Vanguard routes favor safer pressure and disciplined pacing."
814:         "raider":
815:             return "Raider routes trade stability for burst rewards and sharper pressure."
816:         _:
817:             return "Neutral routes keep both ending paths open while you shape the run."
818: 
819: 
820: func _sanitize_fragment_trigger_log(value: Variant) -> Array[Dictionary]:
821:     var rows: Array[Dictionary] = []
822:     if not (value is Array):
823:         return rows
824: 
825:     for item: Variant in value:
826:         if not (item is Dictionary):
827:             continue
828:         var row: Dictionary = item
829:         var fragment_id: String = str(row.get("fragment_id", "")).strip_edges()
830:         if fragment_id == "":
831:             continue
832:         rows.append({
833:             "chapter_id": str(row.get("chapter_id", "")).strip_edges(),
834:             "trigger_type": str(row.get("trigger_type", "")).strip_edges(),
835:             "arc_id": str(row.get("arc_id", "")).strip_edges(),
836:             "style": str(row.get("style", "")).strip_edges(),
837:             "fragment_id": fragment_id,
838:             "fragment_title": str(row.get("fragment_title", fragment_id)).strip_edges(),
839:             "fragment_text": str(row.get("fragment_text", "")).strip_edges(),
840:             "newly_unlocked": bool(row.get("newly_unlocked", false)),
841:             "room_index": int(row.get("room_index", 0))
842:         })
843:     return rows
844: 
845: 
846: func _extract_suffix_int(value: String, prefix: String) -> int:
847:     var suffix: String = value.trim_prefix(prefix)
848:     if suffix.is_valid_int():
849:         return int(suffix)
850:     return 0
851: 
852: 
853: func _as_string_array(value: Variant) -> Array[String]:
854:     var result: Array[String] = []
855:     if value is Array:
856:         for item: Variant in value:
857:             result.append(str(item))
858:     return result
859: 
860: 
861: func _as_int_dictionary(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
862:     var result: Dictionary = {}
863:     if value is Dictionary:
864:         var source: Dictionary = value
865:         for key: Variant in source.keys():
866:             result[str(key)] = int(source.get(key, 0))
867:     return result
868: 
869: 
870: func _sanitize_codex(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
871:     var template: Dictionary = {
872:         "characters": [],
873:         "weapons": [],
874:         "passives": [],
875:         "enemies": [],
876:         "accessories": []
877:     }
878: 
879:     var source: Dictionary = {}
880:     if value is Dictionary:
881:         source = value
882: 
883:     var out: Dictionary = template.duplicate(true)
884:     for key: Variant in out.keys():
885:         var key_name: String = str(key)
886:         out[key_name] = _as_string_array(source.get(key_name, []))
887:     return out
888: 
889: 
890: func _sanitize_codex_meta(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
891:     var out: Dictionary = {}
892:     if not (value is Dictionary):
893:         return out
894: 
895:     var source: Dictionary = value
896:     for key_var: Variant in source.keys():
897:         var key: String = str(key_var)
898:         var row_var: Variant = source.get(key_var, {})
899:         if not (row_var is Dictionary):
900:             continue
901:         var row: Dictionary = row_var
902:         out[key] = {
903:             "category": str(row.get("category", "")),
904:             "entry_id": str(row.get("entry_id", "")),
905:             "source": str(row.get("source", "")),
906:             "chapter_id": _resolve_codex_chapter_id(str(row.get("chapter_id", ""))),
907:             "discovered_at": str(row.get("discovered_at", "")),
908:             "run_index": int(row.get("run_index", 0))
909:         }
910:     return out
911: 
912: 
913: func _sanitize_codex_stats_filters(value: Variant) -> Dictionary:
914:     var source: Dictionary = {}
915:     if value is Dictionary:
916:         source = value
917: 
918:     var source_id: String = str(source.get("source", "all")).strip_edges().to_lower()
919:     var chapter_id: String = str(source.get("chapter", "all")).strip_edges().to_lower()
920:     if source_id == "":
921:         source_id = "all"
922:     if chapter_id == "":
923:         chapter_id = "all"
924: 
925:     return {
926:         "source": source_id,
927:         "chapter": chapter_id
928:     }
929: 
930: 
931: func _build_codex_meta_row(category: String, entry_id: String, source: String, chapter_id: String = "") -> Dictionary:
932:     var now_text: String = Time.get_datetime_string_from_system(true, true)
933:     var run_index: int = int(_meta.get("total_runs", 0)) + 1
934:     return {
935:         "category": category,
936:         "entry_id": entry_id,
937:         "source": source.strip_edges(),
938:         "chapter_id": _resolve_codex_chapter_id(chapter_id),
939:         "discovered_at": now_text,
940:         "run_index": run_index
941:     }
942: 
943: 
944: func _resolve_codex_chapter_id(chapter_id: String) -> String:
945:     var normalized: String = chapter_id.strip_edges().to_lower()
946:     if _is_valid_chapter_id(normalized):
947:         return normalized
948: 
949:     if GameManager != null:
950:         var runtime_chapter: String = str(GameManager.current_chapter_id).strip_edges().to_lower()
951:         if _is_valid_chapter_id(runtime_chapter):
952:             return runtime_chapter
953: 
954:     return "global"
955: 
956: 
957: func _is_valid_chapter_id(chapter_id: String) -> bool:
958:     if chapter_id == "global":
959:         return true
960:     if not chapter_id.begins_with("chapter_"):
961:         return false
962:     var suffix: String = chapter_id.trim_prefix("chapter_")
963:     if not suffix.is_valid_int():
964:         return false
965:     return int(suffix) > 0
966: 
967: 
968: func _sort_codex_recent_desc(a: Dictionary, b: Dictionary) -> bool:
969:     var run_a: int = int(a.get("run_index", 0))
970:     var run_b: int = int(b.get("run_index", 0))
971:     if run_a != run_b:
972:         return run_a > run_b
973: 
974:     var time_a: String = str(a.get("discovered_at", ""))
975:     var time_b: String = str(b.get("discovered_at", ""))
976:     if time_a != time_b:
977:         return time_a > time_b
978: 
979:     var entry_a: String = str(a.get("entry_id", ""))
980:     var entry_b: String = str(b.get("entry_id", ""))
981:     return entry_a < entry_b
982: 
983: 
984: func _find_upgrade_row(upgrade_id: String) -> Dictionary:
985:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("meta_upgrades", {})
986:     var rows: Variant = config.get("upgrades", [])
987:     if not (rows is Array):
988:         return {}
989: 
990:     for item: Variant in rows:
991:         if not (item is Dictionary):
992:             continue
993:         var row: Dictionary = item
994:         if str(row.get("id", "")) == upgrade_id:
995:             return row
996: 
997:     return {}

(End of file - total 997 lines)
</content>
```

```
1284: func _apply_transition_blessing(choice_id: String) -> void:
1285:     _clear_active_blessing_effects()
1286: 
1287:     var stats: Node = _player.get_node_or_null("StatsComponent")
1288:     var health: Node = _player.get_node_or_null("HealthComponent")
1289:     var weapon: Node = _player.get_node_or_null("AutoWeapon")
1290:     if stats == null:
1291:         _active_blessing_id = "none"
1292:         return
1293: 
1294:     if choice_id == "holy_vow":
1295:         _active_blessing_id = "holy_vow"
1296:         if stats.get("armor") != null:
1297:             stats.armor = minf(0.75, stats.armor + 0.05)
1298:         if stats.get("frostbite_resistance") != null:
1299:             stats.frostbite_resistance = minf(0.75, stats.frostbite_resistance + 0.04)
1300:         if health != null and health.has_method("heal"):
1301:             health.heal(20.0)
1302:     elif choice_id == "void_oath":
1303:         _active_blessing_id = "void_oath"
1304:         if weapon != null and weapon.get("base_damage") != null:
1305:             weapon.base_damage += 1.8
1306:         if stats.get("crit_chance") != null:
1307:             stats.crit_chance = minf(0.95, stats.crit_chance + 0.04)
1308:         if stats.get("armor") != null:
1309:             stats.armor = maxf(0.0, stats.armor - 0.04)
1310:         if stats.get("void_resistance") != null:
1311:             stats.void_resistance = minf(0.75, stats.void_resistance + 0.05)
1312:     else:
1313:         _active_blessing_id = "none"
1314: 
1315:     if health != null and health.get("current_hp") != null and health.get("max_hp") != null:
1316:         EventBus.health_changed.emit(float(health.current_hp), float(health.max_hp))
1317: 
1318: 
1319: func _clear_active_blessing_effects() -> void:
1320:     if _active_blessing_id == "none":

1322: 
1323:     var stats: Node = _player.get_node_or_null("StatsComponent")
1324:     var weapon: Node = _player.get_node_or_null("AutoWeapon")

1348: func _queue_chapter_effect(effect_data: Dictionary) -> void:
1349:     if effect_data.is_empty():
1350:         return
1351: 
1352:     var duration_rooms: int = maxi(1, int(effect_data.get("duration_rooms", 2)))
1353:     var effects_var: Variant = effect_data.get("effects", {})
1354:     if not (effects_var is Dictionary):
1355:         return
1356: 
1357:     var packed_effect: Dictionary = {
1358:         "id": str(effect_data.get("id", "effect_unknown")),
1359:         "title": str(effect_data.get("title", "Chapter Effect")),
1360:         "desc": str(effect_data.get("desc", "")),
1361:         "remaining_rooms": duration_rooms,
1362:         "effects": (effects_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
1363:     }
1364:     var icon: String = "[~]"
1365:     var score: float = 0.0
1366:     var packed_effects_var: Variant = packed_effect.get("effects", {})
1367:     if packed_effects_var is Dictionary:
1368:         icon = _get_chapter_effect_icon(packed_effects_var)
1369:         score = _evaluate_chapter_effect_score(packed_effects_var)
1370: 
1371:     _active_chapter_effects.append(packed_effect)
1372:     _chapter_effect_timeline.append({
1373:         "room_index": _room_index,
1374:         "chapter_id": _get_chapter_id_for_room(_room_index),
1375:         "effect_id": str(packed_effect.get("id", "effect_unknown")),
1376:         "title": str(packed_effect.get("title", "Chapter Effect")),
1377:         "desc": str(packed_effect.get("desc", "")),
1378:         "duration_rooms": duration_rooms,
1379:         "icon": icon,
1380:         "score": score
1381:     })
1382:     _camp_message = "Gained chapter effect: %s (%d rooms)" % [packed_effect["title"], duration_rooms]
1383: 
1384: 
1385: func _advance_chapter_effects_for_room() -> void:
1386:     _chapter_effect_spawn_rate_mult = 1.0
1387:     _chapter_effect_enemy_hp_mult = 1.0
1388:     _chapter_effect_enemy_damage_mult = 1.0
1389:     _chapter_effect_hazard_mult = 1.0
1390:     _chapter_effect_move_speed_mult = 1.0
1391:     _chapter_effect_damage_bonus = 0.0
1392:     _chapter_effect_armor_bonus = 0.0
1393:     _chapter_effects_this_room.clear()
1394: 
1395:     var retained_effects: Array[Dictionary] = []
1396:     for item: Variant in _active_chapter_effects:
1397:         if not (item is Dictionary):
1398:             continue
1399: 
1400:         var row: Dictionary = (item as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
1401:         var remaining_rooms: int = int(row.get("remaining_rooms", 0))
1402:         if remaining_rooms <= 0:
1403:             continue
1404: 
1405:         var effects_var: Variant = row.get("effects", {})
1406:         var effects_map: Dictionary = {}
1407:         if effects_var is Dictionary:
1408:             effects_map = (effects_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
1409:             _accumulate_chapter_effect_modifiers(effects_var)
1410: 
1411:         _chapter_effects_this_room.append({
1412:             "id": str(row.get("id", "effect")),
1413:             "title": str(row.get("title", "Chapter Effect")),
1414:             "remaining_rooms": remaining_rooms,
1415:             "icon": _get_chapter_effect_icon(effects_map),
1416:             "score": _evaluate_chapter_effect_score(effects_map)
1417:         })
1418: 
1419:         row["remaining_rooms"] = remaining_rooms - 1
1420:         if int(row.get("remaining_rooms", 0)) > 0:
1421:             retained_effects.append(row)
1422: 
1423:     _active_chapter_effects = retained_effects
1424:     _apply_chapter_effect_runtime()
1425: 
1426: 
1427: func _accumulate_chapter_effect_modifiers(effects: Dictionary) -> void:
1428:     _chapter_effect_spawn_rate_mult *= maxf(0.55, float(effects.get("enemy_spawn_rate_mult", 1.0)))
1429:     _chapter_effect_enemy_hp_mult *= maxf(0.55, float(effects.get("enemy_hp_mult", 1.0)))
1430:     _chapter_effect_enemy_damage_mult *= maxf(0.55, float(effects.get("enemy_damage_mult", 1.0)))
1431:     _chapter_effect_hazard_mult *= maxf(0.5, float(effects.get("hazard_intensity_mult", 1.0)))
1432:     _chapter_effect_move_speed_mult *= clampf(float(effects.get("move_speed_mult", 1.0)), 0.6, 1.4)
1433:     _chapter_effect_damage_bonus += float(effects.get("damage_bonus_pct", 0.0))
1434:     _chapter_effect_armor_bonus += float(effects.get("armor_bonus", 0.0))
1435: 
1436: 
1437: func _apply_chapter_effect_runtime() -> void:
1438:     var stats: Node = _player.get_node_or_null("StatsComponent")
1439:     var weapon: Node = _player.get_node_or_null("AutoWeapon")
1440: 
1441:     if _spawner != null and _spawner.has_method("set_runtime_modifiers"):
1442:         _spawner.set_runtime_modifiers(_chapter_effect_spawn_rate_mult, _chapter_effect_enemy_hp_mult, _chapter_effect_enemy_damage_mult)
1443: 
1444:     if weapon != null and weapon.get("external_damage_bonus_pct") != null:
1445:         weapon.external_damage_bonus_pct = _chapter_effect_damage_bonus
1446: 
1447:     var desired_armor_bonus: float = clampf(_chapter_effect_armor_bonus, -0.3, 0.3)
1448:     if stats != null and stats.get("armor") != null:
1449:         var delta: float = desired_armor_bonus - _chapter_effect_applied_armor_bonus
1450:         if not is_zero_approx(delta):
1451:             stats.armor = clampf(stats.armor + delta, 0.0, 0.75)
1452:         _chapter_effect_applied_armor_bonus = desired_armor_bonus
1453:     else:
1454:         _chapter_effect_applied_armor_bonus = 0.0
1455: 
1456: 
1457: func _get_active_chapter_effects_text() -> String:
1458:     if _chapter_effects_this_room.is_empty():
1459:         return "none"
1460: 
1461:     var rows: Array[String] = []
1462:     for item: Variant in _chapter_effects_this_room:
1463:         if not (item is Dictionary):
1464:             continue
1465:         var row: Dictionary = item
1466:         rows.append("%s %s(%d)" % [
1467:             str(row.get("icon", "[~]")),
1468:             str(row.get("title", "Effect")),
1469:             int(row.get("remaining_rooms", 1))
1470:         ])
1471:     if rows.is_empty():
1472:         return "none"
1473:     return ", ".join(PackedStringArray(rows))
1474: 
1475: 
1476: func _get_pending_chapter_effects_text() -> String:
1477:     if _active_chapter_effects.is_empty():
1478:         return "none"
1479: 
1480:     var rows: Array[String] = []
1481:     for item: Variant in _active_chapter_effects:
1482:         if not (item is Dictionary):
1483:             continue
1484:         var row: Dictionary = item
1485:         var effects_var: Variant = row.get("effects", {})
1486:         var icon: String = "[~]"
1487:         if effects_var is Dictionary:
1488:             icon = _get_chapter_effect_icon(effects_var)
1489:         rows.append("%s(%d)" % [
1490:             "%s %s" % [icon, str(row.get("title", "Effect"))],
1491:             int(row.get("remaining_rooms", 0))
1492:         ])
1493:     if rows.is_empty():
1494:         return "none"
1495:     return ", ".join(PackedStringArray(rows))
1496: 
1497: 
1498: func _get_chapter_effect_icon(effects: Dictionary) -> String:
1499:     var score: float = _evaluate_chapter_effect_score(effects)
1500:     if score >= 0.25:
1501:         return "[+]"
1502:     if score <= -0.25:
1503:         return "[-]"
1504:     return "[~]"
1505: 
1506: 
1507: func _evaluate_chapter_effect_score(effects: Dictionary) -> float:
1508:     if effects.is_empty():
1509:         return 0.0
1510: 
1511:     var score: float = 0.0
1512:     score += float(effects.get("damage_bonus_pct", 0.0)) * 1.0
1513:     score += float(effects.get("armor_bonus", 0.0)) * 1.2
1514: 
1515:     var move_mult: float = float(effects.get("move_speed_mult", 1.0))
1516:     score += (move_mult - 1.0) * 1.4
1517: 
1518:     var spawn_mult: float = float(effects.get("enemy_spawn_rate_mult", 1.0))
1519:     score += (1.0 - spawn_mult) * 0.9
1520: 
1521:     var hp_mult: float = float(effects.get("enemy_hp_mult", 1.0))
1522:     score += (1.0 - hp_mult) * 0.9
1523: 
1524:     var dmg_mult: float = float(effects.get("enemy_damage_mult", 1.0))
1525:     score += (1.0 - dmg_mult) * 1.1
1526: 
1527:     var hazard_mult: float = float(effects.get("hazard_intensity_mult", 1.0))
1528:     score += (1.0 - hazard_mult) * 1.1
1529:     return score
1530: 
1531: 
1532: func _get_active_blessing_text() -> String:
1533:     match _active_blessing_id:
1534:         "holy_vow":
1535:             return "Holy Vow (+armor, +frost resist, +heal)"
1536:         "void_oath":
1537:             return "Void Oath (+damage, +crit, -armor)"
1538:         _:
1539:             return "None"
```

```
104:             var payoff: Dictionary = payoff_var
105:             ending_body += "\n\nPayoff: %s\n%s" % [
106:                 str(payoff.get("title", "Final Payoff")),
107:                 str(payoff.get("summary", ""))
108:             ]
109:             var legacy: String = str(payoff.get("legacy", "")).strip_edges()
110:             if legacy != "":
111:                 ending_body += "\nLegacy: %s" % legacy
112:             var fragment_hook: String = str(payoff.get("fragment_hook", "")).strip_edges()
113:             if fragment_hook != "":
114:                 ending_body += "\nFragment Hook: %s" % fragment_hook
115:         if epilogue != "":
116:             ending_body += "\n\nEpilogue: %s" % epilogue
117:         var epilogue_chain_var: Variant = run_result.get("ending_epilogue_chain", [])
118:         if epilogue_chain_var is Array and not (epilogue_chain_var as Array).is_empty():
119:             var chain_rows: Array[String] = []
120:             for item: Variant in epilogue_chain_var:
121:                 var text: String = str(item).strip_edges()
122:                 if text != "":
123:                     chain_rows.append("- %s" % text)
124:             if not chain_rows.is_empty():
125:                 ending_body += "\n\nEpilogue Chain:\n%s" % "\n".join(PackedStringArray(chain_rows))
126:         _ending_label.text = ending_body
127:     else:
128:         _ending_label.text = "No ending unlocked in this run"
129: 
130:     var new_achievements_var: Variant = run_result.get("new_achievements", [])
131:     if new_achievements_var is Array and not (new_achievements_var as Array).is_empty():
132:         var ids: PackedStringArray = PackedStringArray()
133:         for ach_id: Variant in new_achievements_var:
134:             ids.append(str(ach_id))
135:         lines.append("New Achievements: %s" % ", ".join(ids))
136: 
137:     var fragment_triggers_var: Variant = run_result.get("fragment_triggers", [])
138:     if fragment_triggers_var is Array and not (fragment_triggers_var as Array).is_empty():
139:         var fragment_lines: Array[String] = []
140:         for item: Variant in fragment_triggers_var:
141:             if not (item is Dictionary):
142:                 continue
143:             var row: Dictionary = item
144:             var title: String = str(row.get("fragment_title", row.get("fragment_id", "memory"))).strip_edges()
145:             if title == "":
146:                 continue
147:             var prefix: String = "Echoed"
148:             if bool(row.get("newly_unlocked", false)):
149:                 prefix = "Unlocked"
150:             fragment_lines.append("%s: %s [%s/%s]" % [
151:                 prefix,
152:                 title,
153:                 str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter")),
154:                 str(row.get("trigger_type", "trigger"))
155:             ])
156:         if not fragment_lines.is_empty():
157:             lines.append("Fragments:\n%s" % "\n".join(PackedStringArray(fragment_lines)))
158: 
159:     if lines.is_empty():
160:         lines.append("No new unlocks this run")
161:     _unlock_label.text = "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
162: 
163:     visible = true
164:     _active = true
165: 
166: 
167: func _unhandled_input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
168:     if not _active:
169:         return
170: 
171:     if _timeline_grouped_view and event is InputEventKey:
172:         var key_event: InputEventKey = event
173:         if key_event.pressed and not key_event.echo:
174:             if key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_Q:
175:                 _shift_grouped_anchor(-1)
176:                 return
177:             if key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_E:
178:                 _shift_grouped_anchor(1)
179:                 return
180:             if key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_3 or key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_KP_3:
181:                 _toggle_grouped_anchor_scope()
182:                 return
183: 
184:     if event.is_action_pressed("narrative_choice_1"):
185:         _cycle_timeline_filter()
186:         return
187: 
188:     if event.is_action_pressed("narrative_choice_2"):
189:         _toggle_timeline_view()
190:         return
191: 
192:     if event.is_action_pressed("interact") or event.is_action_pressed("pause"):
193:         _request_back()
194: 
195: 
196: func _on_back_button_pressed() -> void:
197:     _request_back()
198: 
199: 
200: func _request_back() -> void:
201:     if not _active:
202:         return
203:     _active = false
204:     visible = false
205:     back_to_menu_requested.emit()
206: 
207: 
208: func _on_timeline_filter_button_pressed() -> void:
209:     _cycle_timeline_filter()
210: 
211: 
212: func _on_timeline_view_button_pressed() -> void:
213:     _toggle_timeline_view()
214: 
215: 
216: func _on_timeline_anchor_button_pressed() -> void:
217:     _shift_grouped_anchor(1)
218: 
219: 
220: func _on_timeline_scope_button_pressed() -> void:
221:     _toggle_grouped_anchor_scope()
222: 
223: 
224: func _cycle_timeline_filter() -> void:
225:     _timeline_filter_index = (_timeline_filter_index + 1) % TIMELINE_FILTER_ORDER.size()
226:     _refresh_timeline_view()
227: 
228: 
229: func _toggle_timeline_view() -> void:
230:     _timeline_grouped_view = not _timeline_grouped_view
231:     _refresh_timeline_view()
232: 
233: 
234: func _toggle_grouped_anchor_scope() -> void:
235:     if not _timeline_grouped_view:
236:         return
237:     _grouped_anchor_only_scope = not _grouped_anchor_only_scope
238:     _refresh_timeline_view()
239: 
240: 
241: func _refresh_timeline_view() -> void:
242:     var mode: String = TIMELINE_FILTER_ORDER[_timeline_filter_index]
243:     _rebuild_grouped_chapter_order(mode)
244: 
245:     if _timeline_grouped_view:
246:         _effects_timeline_label.text = _build_grouped_timeline_summary(_timeline_rows, mode)
247:     else:
248:         _effects_timeline_label.text = _build_chapter_effect_timeline_summary(_timeline_rows, mode)
249: 
250:     _apply_timeline_filter_theme(mode)
251:     _apply_anchor_faction_theme()
252: 
253:     if _timeline_filter_button != null:
254:         var tag: String = _get_timeline_mode_tag(mode)
255:         _timeline_filter_button.text = "%s Timeline Filter: %s (click / [1])" % [tag, mode.to_upper()]
256: 
257:     if _timeline_view_button != null:
258:         var view_text: String = "Timeline View: %s (click / [2])" % ("GROUPED" if _timeline_grouped_view else "FLAT")
259:         if _timeline_grouped_view:
260:             var chapter_hint: String = _chapter_anchor_title(_get_active_grouped_chapter_id())
261:             if chapter_hint == "":
262:                 chapter_hint = "none"
263:             view_text += " | Anchor: %s (Q/E)" % chapter_hint
264:         _timeline_view_button.text = view_text
265: 
266:     if _timeline_anchor_button != null:
267:         var faction_tag: String = _get_ending_faction_tag(_current_ending_id)
268:         var anchor_hint: String = _chapter_anchor_title(_get_active_grouped_chapter_id())
269:         if anchor_hint == "":
270:             anchor_hint = "none"
271:         _timeline_anchor_button.disabled = (not _timeline_grouped_view) or _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty()
272:         _timeline_anchor_button.text = "%s Anchor Next: %s (click / E)" % [faction_tag, anchor_hint]
273: 
274:     if _timeline_scope_button != null:
275:         _timeline_scope_button.disabled = (not _timeline_grouped_view) or _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty()
276:         var scope_text: String = "ANCHOR ONLY" if _grouped_anchor_only_scope else "ALL CHAPTERS"
277:         _timeline_scope_button.text = "Scope: %s (click / [3])" % scope_text
278: 
279:     if _hint_label != null:
280:         if _timeline_grouped_view:
281:             _hint_label.text = "[1] Filter | [2] View | [3] Scope | Q/E anchor | Esc to return"
282:         else:
283:             _hint_label.text = "[1] Switch filter | [2] Switch view | E / Esc to return"
284: 
285: 
286: func _get_ending_title(ending_id: String) -> String:
287:     var configured: Dictionary = _get_ending_row(ending_id)
288:     if not configured.is_empty():
289:         return str(configured.get("title", "Ending"))
290: 
291:     match ending_id:
292:         "nar_ending_redeem":
293:             return "Ending: REDEEM"
294:         "nar_ending_fall":
295:             return "Ending: FALL"
296:         "nar_ending_balance":
297:             return "Ending: BALANCE"
298:         _:
299:             return "Ending: %s" % ending_id
300: 
301: 
302: func _get_ending_story(ending_id: String) -> String:
303:     var configured: Dictionary = _get_ending_row(ending_id)
304:     if not configured.is_empty():
305:         return str(configured.get("story", "A new fate is recorded."))
306: 
307:     match ending_id:
308:         "nar_ending_redeem":
309:             return "You rise with broken wings healed by grace. The abyss closes, but your oath remains."
310:         "nar_ending_fall":
311:             return "You wear the void as a crown. Salvation is denied, and power becomes your final prayer."
312:         "nar_ending_balance":
313:             return "Neither halo nor abyss claims you. You walk the narrow dusk, guarding both worlds."
314:         _:
315:             return "A new fate is recorded."
316: 
317: 
318: func _get_ending_row(ending_id: String) -> Dictionary:
319:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
320:     var ending_rows: Variant = config.get("endings", {})
321:     if ending_rows is Dictionary:
322:         var row: Variant = (ending_rows as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
323:         if row is Dictionary:
324:             return row
325:     return {}
326: 
327: 
328: func _build_choices_summary(raw_choices: Variant) -> String:
329:     if not (raw_choices is Array):
330:         return "Narrative Choices: none"
331: 
332:     var choices: Array = raw_choices
333:     if choices.is_empty():
334:         return "Narrative Choices: none"
335: 
336:     var lines: Array[String] = ["Narrative Choices:"]
337:     var display_limit: int = mini(6, choices.size())
338:     for i in range(display_limit):
339:         var item: Variant = choices[i]
340:         if not (item is Dictionary):
341:             continue
342:         var row: Dictionary = item
343:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter"))
344:         var segment_id: String = str(row.get("segment_id", "segment"))
345:         var choice_id: String = str(row.get("choice_id", "choice"))
346:         var alignment_delta: float = float(row.get("alignment_delta", 0.0))
347:         lines.append("- %s / %s -> %s (%+.0f)" % [chapter_id, segment_id, choice_id, alignment_delta])
348: 
349:     if choices.size() > display_limit:
350:         lines.append("... +%d more" % (choices.size() - display_limit))
351: 
352:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
353: 
354: 
355: func _build_route_style_summary(raw_styles: Variant, raw_timeline: Variant) -> String:
356:     var styles: Dictionary = {}
357:     if raw_styles is Dictionary:
358:         styles = raw_styles
359: 
360:     var lines: Array[String] = ["Route Style Evolution:"]
361:     var chapter_parts: Array[String] = []
362:     for idx in range(1, 5):
363:         var chapter_id: String = "chapter_%d" % idx
364:         var style_id: String = str(styles.get(chapter_id, "neutral"))
365:         chapter_parts.append("CH%d:%s" % [idx, _route_style_label_for_id(style_id)])
366:     lines.append("  " + " | ".join(PackedStringArray(chapter_parts)))
367: 
368:     if raw_timeline is Array and not (raw_timeline as Array).is_empty():
369:         var timeline: Array = raw_timeline
370:         lines.append("Locks:")
371:         var limit: int = mini(6, timeline.size())
372:         for i in range(limit):
373:             var row_var: Variant = timeline[i]
374:             if not (row_var is Dictionary):
375:                 continue
376:             var row: Dictionary = row_var
377:             lines.append("- R%d %s -> %s (slot %d)" % [
378:                 int(row.get("room_index", 0)),
379:                 str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter")),
380:                 _route_style_label_for_id(str(row.get("style_id", "neutral"))),
381:                 int(row.get("selected_slot", 0)) + 1
382:             ])
383:         if timeline.size() > limit:
384:             lines.append("... +%d more" % (timeline.size() - limit))
385:     else:
386:         lines.append("Locks: none (all chapters remained NEUTRAL)")
387: 
388:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
389: 
390: 
391: func _route_style_label_for_id(style_id: String) -> String:
392:     match style_id:
393:         "vanguard":
394:             return "VANGUARD"
395:         "raider":
396:             return "RAIDER"
397:         _:
398:             return "NEUTRAL"
399: 
400: 
401: func _build_chapter_effect_timeline_summary(raw_timeline: Variant, mode: String) -> String:
402:     if not (raw_timeline is Array):
403:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
404: 
405:     var timeline: Array = raw_timeline
406:     if timeline.is_empty():
407:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
408: 
409:     var counts: Dictionary = _count_timeline_modes(timeline)
410:     var lines: Array[String] = [
411:         _build_timeline_mode_header(mode),
412:         "Segments -> BOON:%d  CURSE:%d  MIXED:%d" % [
413:             int(counts.get("boon", 0)),
414:             int(counts.get("curse", 0)),
415:             int(counts.get("mixed", 0))
416:         ]
417:     ]
418:     var display_limit: int = 8
419:     var shown: int = 0
420:     var matched_total: int = 0
421:     for i in range(timeline.size()):
422:         var item: Variant = timeline[i]
423:         if not (item is Dictionary):
424:             continue
425: 
426:         var row: Dictionary = item
427:         if not _timeline_row_matches_mode(row, mode):
428:             continue
429:         matched_total += 1
430: 
431:         var room_index: int = int(row.get("room_index", 0))
432:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter"))
433:         var icon: String = str(row.get("icon", "[~]"))
434:         var title: String = str(row.get("title", "Chapter Effect"))
435:         var duration_rooms: int = int(row.get("duration_rooms", 1))
436:         var desc: String = str(row.get("desc", ""))
437: 
438:         var body: String = "- R%d %s %s %s (%dR)" % [room_index, chapter_id, icon, title, duration_rooms]
439:         if desc != "":
440:             body += " | %s" % desc
441:         lines.append(body)
442:         shown += 1
443:         if shown >= display_limit:
444:             break
445: 
446:     if shown == 0:
447:         lines.append("- none under current filter")
448:     elif matched_total > shown:
449:         lines.append("... +%d more" % (matched_total - shown))
450: 
451:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
452: 
453: 
454: func _build_grouped_timeline_summary(raw_timeline: Variant, mode: String) -> String:
455:     if not (raw_timeline is Array):
456:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
457: 
458:     var timeline: Array = raw_timeline
459:     if timeline.is_empty():
460:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
461: 
462:     var counts: Dictionary = _count_timeline_modes(timeline)
463:     var grouped: Dictionary = {}
464:     var filtered_rows: Array = []
465: 
466:     for item: Variant in timeline:
467:         if not (item is Dictionary):
468:             continue
469:         var row: Dictionary = item
470:         if not _timeline_row_matches_mode(row, mode):
471:             continue
472:         filtered_rows.append(row)
473:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter_unknown"))
474:         if not grouped.has(chapter_id):
475:             grouped[chapter_id] = []
476:         (grouped[chapter_id] as Array).append(row)
477: 
478:     var lines: Array[String] = [
479:         _build_timeline_mode_header(mode),
480:         "Segments -> BOON:%d  CURSE:%d  MIXED:%d" % [
481:             int(counts.get("boon", 0)),
482:             int(counts.get("curse", 0)),
483:             int(counts.get("mixed", 0))
484:         ],
485:         "View: Grouped by chapter (collapsed preview)"
486:     ]
487: 
488:     if filtered_rows.is_empty():
489:         lines.append("- none under current filter")
490:         return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
491: 
492:     var chapter_order: Array[String] = _grouped_chapter_order
493:     if chapter_order.is_empty():
494:         chapter_order = ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]
495:     var anchor_id: String = _get_active_grouped_chapter_id()
496:     if _grouped_anchor_only_scope and anchor_id != "":
497:         chapter_order = [anchor_id]
498:     var faction_tag: String = _get_ending_faction_tag(_current_ending_id)
499: 
500:     var total_lines_limit: int = 12
501:     var emitted_rows: int = 0
502:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in chapter_order:
503:         var chapter_id: String = str(chapter_id_var)
504:         if not grouped.has(chapter_id):
505:             continue
506:         var chapter_rows: Array = grouped[chapter_id]
507:         if chapter_rows.is_empty():
508:             continue
509: 
510:         var is_anchor: bool = chapter_id == anchor_id
511:         lines.append("")
512:         lines.append("%s%s [%s] (%d)" % ["> " if is_anchor else "  ", faction_tag, _chapter_anchor_title(chapter_id), chapter_rows.size()])
513: 
514:         var chapter_limit: int = mini(4 if is_anchor else 1, chapter_rows.size())
515:         for i in range(chapter_limit):
516:             var row: Dictionary = chapter_rows[i]
517:             lines.append(_format_timeline_row(row, "    - "))
518:             emitted_rows += 1
519:             if emitted_rows >= total_lines_limit:
520:                 break
521: 
522:         if chapter_rows.size() > chapter_limit:
523:             lines.append("    ... +%d more" % (chapter_rows.size() - chapter_limit))
524: 
525:         if emitted_rows >= total_lines_limit:
526:             lines.append("... timeline preview truncated")
527:             break
528: 
529:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
530: 
531: 
532: func _format_timeline_row(row: Dictionary, prefix: String) -> String:
533:     var room_index: int = int(row.get("room_index", 0))
534:     var icon: String = str(row.get("icon", "[~]"))
535:     var title: String = str(row.get("title", "Chapter Effect"))
536:     var duration_rooms: int = int(row.get("duration_rooms", 1))
537:     var desc: String = str(row.get("desc", ""))
538: 
539:     var body: String = "%sR%d %s %s (%dR)" % [prefix, room_index, icon, title, duration_rooms]
540:     if desc != "":
541:         body += " | %s" % desc
542:     return body
543: 
544: 
545: func _build_timeline_mode_header(mode: String) -> String:
546:     var tag: String = _get_timeline_mode_tag(mode)
547:     match mode:
548:         "boon":
549:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Blessing Route" % tag
550:         "curse":
551:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Burden Route" % tag
552:         "mixed":
553:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Hybrid Route" % tag
554:         _:
555:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Full Replay" % tag
556: 
557: 
558: func _count_timeline_modes(timeline: Array) -> Dictionary:
559:     var counts: Dictionary = {
560:         "boon": 0,
561:         "curse": 0,
562:         "mixed": 0
563:     }
564:     for item: Variant in timeline:
565:         if not (item is Dictionary):
566:             continue
567:         var mode: String = _resolve_timeline_row_mode(item)
568:         counts[mode] = int(counts.get(mode, 0)) + 1
569:     return counts
570: 
571: 
572: func _rebuild_grouped_chapter_order(mode: String) -> void:
573:     var previous_anchor_id: String = _get_active_grouped_chapter_id()
574: 
575:     var preferred: Array[String] = ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]
576:     var dynamic: Array[String] = []
577:     for item: Variant in _timeline_rows:
578:         if not (item is Dictionary):
579:             continue
580:         var row: Dictionary = item
581:         if not _timeline_row_matches_mode(row, mode):
582:             continue
583:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter_unknown"))
584:         if chapter_id == "":
585:             chapter_id = "chapter_unknown"
586:         if not dynamic.has(chapter_id):
587:             dynamic.append(chapter_id)
588: 
589:     _grouped_chapter_order.clear()
590:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in preferred:
591:         var chapter_id: String = str(chapter_id_var)
592:         if dynamic.has(chapter_id):
593:             _grouped_chapter_order.append(chapter_id)
594: 
595:     var overflow: Array[String] = []
596:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in dynamic:
597:         var chapter_id: String = str(chapter_id_var)
598:         if not _grouped_chapter_order.has(chapter_id):
599:             overflow.append(chapter_id)
600:     overflow.sort()
601:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in overflow:
602:         _grouped_chapter_order.append(str(chapter_id_var))
603: 
604:     if _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty():
605:         _grouped_anchor_index = 0
606:         return
607: 
608:     if previous_anchor_id != "" and _grouped_chapter_order.has(previous_anchor_id):
609:         _grouped_anchor_index = _grouped_chapter_order.find(previous_anchor_id)
610:     else:
611:         _grouped_anchor_index = clampi(_grouped_anchor_index, 0, _grouped_chapter_order.size() - 1)
612: 
613: 
614: func _shift_grouped_anchor(step: int) -> void:
615:     if not _timeline_grouped_view or _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty():
616:         return
617:     _grouped_anchor_index = posmod(_grouped_anchor_index + step, _grouped_chapter_order.size())
618:     _refresh_timeline_view()
619: 
620: 
621: func _get_active_grouped_chapter_id() -> String:
622:     if _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty():
623:         return ""
624:     var safe_index: int = clampi(_grouped_anchor_index, 0, _grouped_chapter_order.size() - 1)
625:     return _grouped_chapter_order[safe_index]
626: 
627: 
628: func _chapter_anchor_title(chapter_id: String) -> String:
629:     if chapter_id.begins_with("chapter_"):
630:         var suffix: String = chapter_id.trim_prefix("chapter_")
631:         if suffix.is_valid_int():
632:             return "CH%s" % suffix
633:     if chapter_id == "":
634:         return ""
635:     return chapter_id.to_upper()
636: 
637: 
638: func _resolve_timeline_row_mode(row: Dictionary) -> String:
639:     var score: float = _timeline_row_score(row)
640:     if score >= 0.25:
641:         return "boon"
642:     if score <= -0.25:
643:         return "curse"
644:     return "mixed"
645: 
646: 
647: func _timeline_row_score(row: Dictionary) -> float:
648:     if row.has("score"):
649:         return float(row.get("score", 0.0))
650: 
651:     var icon: String = str(row.get("icon", "[~]"))
652:     if icon == "[+]":
653:         return 1.0
654:     if icon == "[-]":
655:         return -1.0
656:     return 0.0
657: 
658: 
659: func _timeline_row_matches_mode(row: Dictionary, mode: String) -> bool:
660:     if mode == "all":
661:         return true
662: 
663:     var score: float = _timeline_row_score(row)
664: 
665:     if mode == "boon":
666:         return score >= 0.25
667:     if mode == "curse":
668:         return score <= -0.25
669:     if mode == "mixed":
670:         return score > -0.25 and score < 0.25
671:     return true
672: 
673: 
674: func _get_timeline_mode_tag(mode: String) -> String:
675:     var row: Dictionary = _get_timeline_theme(mode)
676:     return str(row.get("tag", "[ALL]"))
677: 
678: 
679: func _apply_timeline_filter_theme(mode: String) -> void:
680:     var row: Dictionary = _get_timeline_theme(mode)
681:     var tint: Color = row.get("tint", TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME["all"]["tint"])
682:     if _effects_timeline_label != null:
683:         _effects_timeline_label.modulate = tint
684:     if _timeline_filter_button != null:
685:         _timeline_filter_button.modulate = tint
686:     if _timeline_view_button != null:
687:         _timeline_view_button.modulate = tint
688:     if _timeline_scope_button != null:
689:         _timeline_scope_button.modulate = tint
690: 
691: 
692: func _apply_anchor_faction_theme() -> void:
693:     var theme: Dictionary = _get_ending_faction_theme(_current_ending_id)
694:     var tint: Color = theme.get("tint", ENDING_FACTION_THEME["default"]["tint"])
695:     if _timeline_anchor_button != null:
696:         _timeline_anchor_button.modulate = tint
697: 
698: 
699: func _get_timeline_theme(mode: String) -> Dictionary:
700:     if TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME.has(mode):
701:         return TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME[mode]
702:     return TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME["all"]
703: 
704: 
705: func _get_ending_faction_theme(ending_id: String) -> Dictionary:
706:     if ENDING_FACTION_THEME.has(ending_id):
707:         return ENDING_FACTION_THEME[ending_id]
708:     return ENDING_FACTION_THEME["default"]
709: 
710: 
711: func _get_ending_faction_tag(ending_id: String) -> String:
712:     var row: Dictionary = _get_ending_faction_theme(ending_id)
713:     return str(row.get("tag", "[ARCHIVE]"))

(End of file - total 713 lines)
</content>

```
```
<path>D:\Desktop\Project\Game\angel-fallen\scripts\ui\memory_altar_panel.gd</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: extends Control
2: 
3: signal altar_closed
4: 
5: @onready var _title_label: Label = $CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/Title
6: @onready var _body_label: Label = $CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/Body
7: @onready var _counter_label: Label = $CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/Counter
8: @onready var _hint_label: Label = $CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/Hint
9: 
10: var _active: bool = false
11: var _fragment_ids: Array[String] = []
12: var _cursor: int = 0
13: 
14: 
15: func _ready() -> void:
16:     visible = false
17: 
18: 
19: func show_archive(fragment_ids: Array[String], start_index: int = 0) -> void:
20:     _fragment_ids = fragment_ids.duplicate()
21:     if _fragment_ids.is_empty():
22:         _title_label.text = "Memory Altar"
23:         _body_label.text = "No memory fragments unlocked yet.\nDefeat chapter bosses and resolve events to recover memories."
24:         _counter_label.text = "0 / 0"
25:         _hint_label.text = "Press E/Esc to close"
26:     else:
27:         _cursor = clampi(start_index, 0, _fragment_ids.size() - 1)
28:         _render_current_fragment()
29: 
30:     _active = true
31:     visible = true
32: 
33: 
34: func _unhandled_input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
35:     if not _active:
36:         return
37: 
38:     if event.is_action_pressed("narrative_choice_1"):
39:         _prev_fragment()
40:         return
41:     if event.is_action_pressed("narrative_choice_2"):
42:         _next_fragment()
43:         return
44:     if event.is_action_pressed("interact") or event.is_action_pressed("pause"):
45:         _close_panel()
46: 
47: 
48: func _on_prev_button_pressed() -> void:
49:     _prev_fragment()
50: 
51: 
52: func _on_next_button_pressed() -> void:
53:     _next_fragment()
54: 
55: 
56: func _on_close_button_pressed() -> void:
57:     _close_panel()
58: 
59: 
60: func _prev_fragment() -> void:
61:     if _fragment_ids.is_empty():
62:         return
63:     _cursor = posmod(_cursor - 1, _fragment_ids.size())
64:     _render_current_fragment()
65: 
66: 
67: func _next_fragment() -> void:
68:     if _fragment_ids.is_empty():
69:         return
70:     _cursor = posmod(_cursor + 1, _fragment_ids.size())
71:     _render_current_fragment()
72: 
73: 
74: func _render_current_fragment() -> void:
75:     if _fragment_ids.is_empty():
76:         return
77: 
78:     var fragment_id: String = _fragment_ids[_cursor]
79:     var row: Dictionary = _get_fragment_row(fragment_id)
80:     var title: String = str(row.get("title", fragment_id))
81:     var text: String = str(row.get("text", "No memory text."))
82: 
83:     _title_label.text = "Memory Altar"
84:     _body_label.text = "%s\n\n%s" % [title, text]
85:     _counter_label.text = "%d / %d" % [_cursor + 1, _fragment_ids.size()]
86:     _hint_label.text = "1: Prev  2: Next  |  E/Esc: Close"
87: 
88: 
89: func _get_fragment_row(fragment_id: String) -> Dictionary:
90:     var content: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
91:     var rows_var: Variant = content.get("memory_fragments", {})
92:     if rows_var is Dictionary:
93:         var row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(fragment_id, {})
94:         if row_var is Dictionary:
95:             return row_var
96:     return {}
97: 
98: 
99: func _close_panel() -> void:
100:     if not _active:
101:         return
102:     _active = false
103:     visible = false
104:     altar_closed.emit()

(End of file - total 104 lines)
</content>
```

**Tool: read**

**Input:**
```json
{
```
```json
  "filePath": "D:\\Desktop\\Project\\Game\\angel-fallen\\test\\unit\\test_narrative_route_style_config.gd"
}
```

**Output:**
```
<path>D:\Desktop\Project\Game\angel-fallen\test\unit\test_narrative_route_style_config.gd</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: extends GutTest
2: 
3: const NARRATIVE_CONFIG_PATH := "res://data/balance/narrative_content.json"
4: 
5: 
6: func _load_narrative_config() -> Dictionary:
7: 	var file := FileAccess.open(NARRATIVE_CONFIG_PATH, FileAccess.READ)
8: 	assert_not_null(file, "narrative_content.json should be readable")
9: 	if file == null:
10: 		return {}
11: 	var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(file.get_as_text())
12: 	assert_typeof(parsed, TYPE_DICTIONARY, "narrative_content.json should parse as Dictionary")
13: 	if parsed is Dictionary:
14: 		return parsed
15: 	return {}
16: 
17: 
18: func test_narrative_route_styles_have_expected_profiles() -> void:
19: 	var cfg := _load_narrative_config()
20: 	var route_styles: Dictionary = cfg.get("route_styles", {})
21: 	assert_typeof(route_styles, TYPE_DICTIONARY, "route_styles should be Dictionary")
22: 
23: 	for style_id in ["neutral", "vanguard", "raider"]:
24: 		assert_true(route_styles.has(style_id), "route_styles should include %s" % style_id)
25: 		var row: Dictionary = route_styles.get(style_id, {})
26: 		assert_typeof(row, TYPE_DICTIONARY, "%s route style should be Dictionary" % style_id)
27: 
28: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("event_weight_mult", 0.0)), 0.5, "%s event_weight_mult lower bound" % style_id)
29: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("event_weight_mult", 99.0)), 1.8, "%s event_weight_mult upper bound" % style_id)
30: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("hazard_mult", 0.0)), 0.6, "%s hazard_mult lower bound" % style_id)
31: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("hazard_mult", 99.0)), 1.5, "%s hazard_mult upper bound" % style_id)
32: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("gold_drop_mult", 0.0)), 0.5, "%s gold_drop_mult lower bound" % style_id)
33: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("gold_drop_mult", 99.0)), 2.0, "%s gold_drop_mult upper bound" % style_id)
34: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("ore_drop_mult", 0.0)), 0.5, "%s ore_drop_mult lower bound" % style_id)
35: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("ore_drop_mult", 99.0)), 2.0, "%s ore_drop_mult upper bound" % style_id)
36: 
37: 		assert_true(row.has("theme_tint"), "%s should define theme_tint" % style_id)
38: 		assert_typeof(row.get("theme_tint", ""), TYPE_STRING, "%s theme_tint should be string" % style_id)
39: 		assert_true(str(row.get("theme_tint", "")).length() > 0, "%s theme_tint should not be empty" % style_id)
40: 
41: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("theme_blend", -1.0)), 0.0, "%s theme_blend lower bound" % style_id)
42: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("theme_blend", 99.0)), 0.5, "%s theme_blend upper bound" % style_id)
43: 
44: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("boss_hp_mult", 0.0)), 0.7, "%s boss_hp_mult lower bound" % style_id)
45: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("boss_hp_mult", 99.0)), 1.4, "%s boss_hp_mult upper bound" % style_id)
46: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("boss_damage_mult", 0.0)), 0.7, "%s boss_damage_mult lower bound" % style_id)
47: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("boss_damage_mult", 99.0)), 1.5, "%s boss_damage_mult upper bound" % style_id)
48: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("boss_speed_mult", 0.0)), 0.7, "%s boss_speed_mult lower bound" % style_id)
49: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("boss_speed_mult", 99.0)), 1.5, "%s boss_speed_mult upper bound" % style_id)
50: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("boss_scale_mult", 0.0)), 0.85, "%s boss_scale_mult lower bound" % style_id)
51: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("boss_scale_mult", 99.0)), 1.25, "%s boss_scale_mult upper bound" % style_id)
52: 
53: 		assert_true(row.has("boss_color"), "%s should define boss_color" % style_id)
54: 		assert_typeof(row.get("boss_color", ""), TYPE_STRING, "%s boss_color should be string" % style_id)
55: 		assert_true(str(row.get("boss_color", "")).length() > 0, "%s boss_color should not be empty" % style_id)
```
