57: 
58: func test_chapter_events_define_route_weight_bias_keys() -> void:
59: 	var cfg := _load_narrative_config()
60: 	var chapter_events: Dictionary = cfg.get("chapter_events", {})
61: 	assert_typeof(chapter_events, TYPE_DICTIONARY, "chapter_events should be Dictionary")
62: 
63: 	for chapter_id in ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]:
64: 		assert_true(chapter_events.has(chapter_id), "%s should exist in chapter_events" % chapter_id)
65: 		var rows: Array = chapter_events.get(chapter_id, [])
66: 		assert_typeof(rows, TYPE_ARRAY, "%s chapter events should be an Array" % chapter_id)
67: 		assert_gt(rows.size(), 0, "%s chapter events should not be empty" % chapter_id)
68: 
69: 		for i in range(rows.size()):
70: 			var row_var: Variant = rows[i]
71: 			assert_typeof(row_var, TYPE_DICTIONARY, "%s[%d] should be Dictionary" % [chapter_id, i])
72: 			if not (row_var is Dictionary):
73: 				continue
74: 			var row: Dictionary = row_var
75: 			for route_key in ["weight_if_route_vanguard", "weight_if_route_raider"]:
76: 				assert_true(row.has(route_key), "%s[%d] should include %s" % [chapter_id, i, route_key])
77: 				var weight_value: float = float(row.get(route_key, -1.0))
78: 				assert_gt(weight_value, 0.0, "%s[%d].%s should be > 0" % [chapter_id, i, route_key])
79: 				assert_lte(weight_value, 3.0, "%s[%d].%s should be <= 3.0" % [chapter_id, i, route_key])
80: 
81: 
82: func test_route_arc_profiles_exist_for_all_alignment_outcomes() -> void:
83: 	var cfg := _load_narrative_config()
84: 	var rows: Dictionary = cfg.get("route_arc_profiles", {})
85: 	assert_typeof(rows, TYPE_DICTIONARY, "route_arc_profiles should be Dictionary")
86: 
87: 	for arc_id in ["balance", "redeem", "fall"]:
88: 		assert_true(rows.has(arc_id), "route_arc_profiles should include %s" % arc_id)
89: 		var row: Dictionary = rows.get(arc_id, {})
90: 		assert_false(row.is_empty(), "%s route arc profile should not be empty" % arc_id)
91: 		for field_name in ["title", "summary", "camp_focus", "fragment_hint"]:
92: 			assert_true(str(row.get(field_name, "")).strip_edges() != "", "%s.%s should be non-empty" % [arc_id, field_name])
93: 
94: 
95: func test_camp_reflections_cover_all_mainline_chapters_and_route_arcs() -> void:
96: 	var cfg := _load_narrative_config()
97: 	var rows: Dictionary = cfg.get("camp_reflections", {})
98: 	assert_typeof(rows, TYPE_DICTIONARY, "camp_reflections should be Dictionary")
99: 
100: 	for chapter_id in ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]:
101: 		assert_true(rows.has(chapter_id), "camp_reflections should include %s" % chapter_id)
102: 		var chapter_row: Dictionary = rows.get(chapter_id, {})
103: 		assert_false(chapter_row.is_empty(), "%s camp reflection row should not be empty" % chapter_id)
104: 		for arc_id in ["balance", "redeem", "fall"]:
105: 			var row: Dictionary = chapter_row.get(arc_id, {})
106: 			assert_false(row.is_empty(), "%s.%s camp reflection should not be empty" % [chapter_id, arc_id])
107: 			for field_name in ["title", "body", "fragment_hint"]:
108: 				assert_true(str(row.get(field_name, "")).strip_edges() != "", "%s.%s.%s should be non-empty" % [chapter_id, arc_id, field_name])
109: 
110: 
111: func test_ending_payoff_profiles_and_epilogue_chains_cover_all_endings() -> void:
112: 	var cfg := _load_narrative_config()
113: 	var payoff_rows: Dictionary = cfg.get("ending_payoff_profiles", {})
114: 	var epilogue_rows: Dictionary = cfg.get("epilogue_chains", {})
115: 	assert_typeof(payoff_rows, TYPE_DICTIONARY, "ending_payoff_profiles should be Dictionary")
116: 	assert_typeof(epilogue_rows, TYPE_DICTIONARY, "epilogue_chains should be Dictionary")
117: 
118: 	for ending_id in ["nar_ending_redeem", "nar_ending_fall", "nar_ending_balance"]:
119: 		var payoff: Dictionary = payoff_rows.get(ending_id, {})
120: 		assert_false(payoff.is_empty(), "%s payoff profile should not be empty" % ending_id)
121: 		for field_name in ["title", "summary", "legacy", "fragment_hook"]:
122: 			assert_true(str(payoff.get(field_name, "")).strip_edges() != "", "%s.%s should be non-empty" % [ending_id, field_name])
123: 
124: 		var chain: Array = epilogue_rows.get(ending_id, [])
125: 		assert_typeof(chain, TYPE_ARRAY, "%s epilogue chain should be Array" % ending_id)
126: 		assert_gte(chain.size(), 3, "%s epilogue chain should contain at least 3 steps" % ending_id)
127: 		for i in range(chain.size()):
128: 			assert_true(str(chain[i]).strip_edges() != "", "%s epilogue chain step %d should be non-empty" % [ending_id, i])
129: 
130: 
131: func test_fragment_trigger_profiles_cover_all_mainline_chapters_and_trigger_types() -> void:
132: 	var cfg := _load_narrative_config()

135: 
136: 	for chapter_id in ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]:

3: const GAME_WORLD_SCENE_PATH := "res://scenes/game/game_world.tscn"
4: const RUN_RESULT_PANEL_SCENE_PATH := "res://scenes/ui/run_result_panel.tscn"

6: 
7: func _instantiate_world() -> Node:
8: 	var scene: PackedScene = load(GAME_WORLD_SCENE_PATH)
9: 	assert_not_null(scene, "game_world scene should load")
10: 	if scene == null:
11: 		return null
12: 
13: 	var world: Node = scene.instantiate()
14: 	assert_not_null(world, "game_world scene should instantiate")
15: 	if world == null:
16: 		return null
17: 
18: 	add_child_autofree(world)
19: 	await get_tree().process_frame
20: 	return world
21: 
22: 
23: func _instantiate_run_result_panel() -> Control:
24: 	var scene: PackedScene = load(RUN_RESULT_PANEL_SCENE_PATH)
25: 	assert_not_null(scene, "run_result_panel scene should load")
26: 	if scene == null:
27: 		return null
28: 
29: 	var panel: Control = scene.instantiate() as Control
30: 	assert_not_null(panel, "run_result_panel scene should instantiate")
31: 	if panel == null:
32: 		return null
33: 
34: 	add_child_autofree(panel)
35: 	await get_tree().process_frame
36: 	return panel
37: 
38: 
39: func _set_room_plan(world: Node, room_index: int, chapter_id: String, room_type: String, next_rooms: Array = []) -> void:
40: 	var room_plan_map_var: Variant = world.get("_room_plan_map")
41: 	var room_plan_map: Dictionary = {}
42: 	if room_plan_map_var is Dictionary:
43: 		room_plan_map = (room_plan_map_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
44: 
45: 	room_plan_map[room_index] = {
46: 		"chapter_id": chapter_id,
47: 		"chapter_index": int(chapter_id.trim_prefix("chapter_")),
48: 		"room_type": room_type,
49: 		"show_intro": false,
50: 		"next_rooms": next_rooms,
51: 		"previous_rooms": []
52: 	}
53: 	world.set("_room_plan_map", room_plan_map)
54: 
55: 
56: func test_save_manager_persists_stage5_payoff_fields_on_victory() -> void:
57: 	if SaveManager == null:
58: 		pending("SaveManager singleton not available")
59: 		return
60: 
61: 	SaveManager.reset_meta()
62: 	var result: Dictionary = SaveManager.submit_run_result({
63: 		"outcome": "victory",
64: 		"rooms_cleared": 15,
65: 		"kills": 320,
66: 		"level_reached": 12,
67: 		"gold": 210,
68: 		"ore": 42,
69: 		"alignment": 74.0,
70: 		"route_style": "vanguard",
71: 		"fragment_triggers": [{
72: 			"chapter_id": "chapter_3",
73: 			"trigger_type": "camp",
74: 			"arc_id": "redeem",
75: 			"style": "vanguard",
76: 			"fragment_id": "memory_camp_oracle",
77: 			"fragment_title": "Fragment XXXIII: Quiet Beneath Embers",
78: 			"fragment_text": "When the altar dimmed...",
79: 			"newly_unlocked": true,
80: 			"room_index": 10
81: 		}]
82: 	})
83: 
84: 	assert_eq(str(result.get("ending_id", "")), "nar_ending_redeem", "high alignment victory should resolve to redeem ending")
85: 	assert_eq(str(result.get("route_style", "")), "vanguard", "last run should persist resolved route_style")
86: 	var payoff: Dictionary = result.get("ending_payoff", {})
87: 	assert_false(payoff.is_empty(), "ending payoff should be persisted")
88: 	assert_eq(str(payoff.get("arc_id", "")), "redeem", "ending payoff should include resolved route arc")
89: 	assert_eq(str(payoff.get("style", "")), "vanguard", "ending payoff should include route style")
90: 	var chain: Array = result.get("ending_epilogue_chain", [])
91: 	assert_gte(chain.size(), 3, "ending epilogue chain should be persisted")
92: 	var triggers: Array = result.get("fragment_triggers", [])
93: 	assert_eq(triggers.size(), 1, "fragment trigger log should be persisted")
94: 
95: 
96: func test_game_world_fragment_pacing_and_run_result_panel_show_stage5_details() -> void:
97: 	if SaveManager == null:
98: 		pending("SaveManager singleton not available")
99: 		return
100: 
101: 	SaveManager.reset_meta()
102: 	var world: Node = await _instantiate_world()
103: 	if world == null:
104: 		return
105: 
106: 	_set_room_plan(world, 10, "chapter_3", "safe_camp", [11])
107: 	_set_room_plan(world, 11, "chapter_3", "event", [12])
108: 	_set_room_plan(world, 12, "chapter_3", "boss", [])
109: 	world.set("_alignment", 72.0)
110: 	world.set("_current_route_style", "vanguard")
111: 
112: 	var narrative_system: Node = world.get_node_or_null("NarrativeSystem")
113: 	assert_not_null(narrative_system, "NarrativeSystem should exist in game world")
114: 	if narrative_system == null:
115: 		return
116: 
117: 	narrative_system.call("record_choice", "chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "keep_the_oath", 12.0)
118: 	narrative_system.call("record_choice", "chapter_3", "nar_evt_whispers", "answer_the_choir", 9.0)
119: 
120: 	world.set("_room_index", 10)
121: 	world.set("_current_room_type", "safe_camp")
122: 	world.call("_enter_safe_camp_room")
123: 
124: 	var trigger_log: Array = world.get("_run_fragment_triggers")
125: 	assert_gte(trigger_log.size(), 1, "camp pacing should add a fragment trigger entry")
126: 	var latest_line: String = str(world.call("_get_latest_fragment_trigger_line"))
127: 	assert_string_contains(latest_line, "Memory", "latest fragment trigger line should be human-readable")
128: 
129: 	world.set("_room_index", 11)
130: 	world.set("_current_room_type", "event")
131: 	world.call("_on_event_closed")
132: 	trigger_log = world.get("_run_fragment_triggers")
133: 	assert_gte(trigger_log.size(), 2, "event pacing should append a fragment trigger entry")
134: 
135: 	world.set("_room_index", 12)
136: 	world.set("_current_room_type", "boss")
137: 	world.call("_on_transition_closed")
138: 	trigger_log = world.get("_run_fragment_triggers")
139: 	assert_gte(trigger_log.size(), 3, "transition pacing should append a fragment trigger entry")
140: 
141: 	var run_result: Dictionary = SaveManager.submit_run_result({
142: 		"outcome": "victory",
143: 		"rooms_cleared": 15,
144: 		"kills": 290,
145: 		"level_reached": 11,
146: 		"gold": 180,
147: 		"ore": 36,
148: 		"alignment": float(world.get("_alignment")),
149: 		"route_style": str(world.call("_resolve_run_route_style_for_payoff")),
150: 		"fragment_triggers": trigger_log,
151: 		"narrative_choices": narrative_system.call("get_run_choices"),
152: 		"chapter_effect_timeline": [],
153: 		"chapter_route_styles": {},
154: 		"route_style_timeline": []
155: 	})
156: 
157: 	var panel: Control = await _instantiate_run_result_panel()
158: 	if panel == null:
159: 		return
160: 	panel.call("show_result", run_result)
161: 
162: 	var ending_label: Label = panel.get_node_or_null("CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/EndingStory")
163: 	var unlock_label: Label = panel.get_node_or_null("CenterContainer/PanelContainer/VBoxContainer/Unlocks")
164: 	assert_not_null(ending_label, "EndingStory label should exist")
165: 	assert_not_null(unlock_label, "Unlocks label should exist")
166: 	if ending_label == null or unlock_label == null:
167: 		return
168: 
169: 	assert_string_contains(ending_label.text, "Payoff:", "run result panel should render ending payoff summary")
170: 	assert_string_contains(ending_label.text, "Epilogue Chain:", "run result panel should render epilogue chain")
171: 	assert_string_contains(unlock_label.text, "Fragments:", "run result panel should render fragment trigger list")

130:       "summary": "Power answers quickly when you choose appetite over mercy, but every shortcut tightens the abyss around the camp.",
131:       "camp_focus": "Use camp pauses to convert pressure into offense before corruption overwhelms the route.",
132:       "fragment_hint": "Fallen routes expose arena, threshold and throne-side fragments sooner."
133:     }
134:   },
135:   "camp_reflections": {
136:     "chapter_1": {
137:       "balance": {
138:         "title": "Ashen Embers",
139:         "body": "The first camp still smells of rain and ash. You have not chosen who to become, and the silence keeps asking.",
140:         "fragment_hint": "Search the shrine and survivor events to recover the camp's first missing memories."
141:       },
142:       "redeem": {
143:         "title": "Held Oath",
144:         "body": "The camp sees your restraint and answers with steadier hands; every ration shared here strengthens the vows ahead.",
145:         "fragment_hint": "Grace-aligned choices in chapter_1 reveal the earliest chapel fragments."
146:       },
147:       "fall": {
148:         "title": "Ashen Appetite",
149:         "body": "Your answers come faster when they cost someone else. The camp grows quiet, but your power grows louder.",
150:         "fragment_hint": "Void-leaning choices in chapter_1 uncover relic and afterglow fragments tied to the fall route."
151:       }
152:     },
153:     "chapter_2": {
154:       "balance": {
155:         "title": "Forge Interlude",
156:         "body": "The forge room offers a pause to weigh steel against hunger. Neither can carry the whole war alone.",
157:         "fragment_hint": "Chapter_2 event rooms carry forge and arena memories that shape both middle endings."
158:       },
159:       "redeem": {
160:         "title": "Tempered Faith",
161:         "body": "At the furnace halt, each tempered edge feels like a promise not to let strength outrun purpose.",
162:         "fragment_hint": "Choose tempered routes and defensive chapter effects to preserve redeem momentum into the cathedral."
163:       },
164:       "fall": {
165:         "title": "Greedy Slag",
166:         "body": "The foundry teaches you how easily survival becomes appetite when every spark can be sold for one more blade.",
167:         "fragment_hint": "Arena and salvage choices in chapter_2 accelerate fall-aligned fragment discovery."
168:       }
169:     },
170:     "chapter_3": {
171:       "balance": {
172:         "title": "Aurora Vigil",
173:         "body": "The cathedral frost preserves every doubt. At this camp, balance means carrying both halo and abyss without surrendering to either.",
174:         "fragment_hint": "Chapter_3 whispers and reliquary fragments reveal the road of dusk more clearly than any prayer."
175:       },
176:       "redeem": {
177:         "title": "Frozen Benediction",
178:         "body": "The aurora camp feels almost holy; every careful choice here keeps the choir within reach of forgiveness.",
179:         "fragment_hint": "Redeem momentum in chapter_3 favors cathedral and guardian-style memory fragments."
180:       },
181:       "fall": {
182:         "title": "Whispered Ruin",
183:         "body": "The frost no longer quiets your hunger. Even the choir begins to sound like a door worth breaking.",
184:         "fragment_hint": "Void pressure and whisper bargains in chapter_3 point toward the fall ending."
185:       }
186:     },
187:     "chapter_4": {
188:       "balance": {
189:         "title": "Last Ember",
190:         "body": "No route remains untouched in the final camp. Balance now means choosing what survives the throne, not what stays pure.",
191:         "fragment_hint": "Threshold and route fragments decide which ending still listens when the void opens."
192:       },
193:       "redeem": {
194:         "title": "Grace Before Dawn",
195:         "body": "This final ember is small, but it is enough. The camp waits on your last answer, not your loudest weapon.",
196:         "fragment_hint": "Benediction and threshold choices set the redeem ending arc before the final boss."
197:       },
198:       "fall": {
199:         "title": "Crown Before Collapse",
200:         "body": "The last camp is no refuge now, only a staging ground. The throne ahead already knows your name.",
201:         "fragment_hint": "The final threshold and ruin-side choices complete the fall route memory chain."
202:       }
203:     }
204:   },
205:   "chapter_events": {

637:   },
638:   "memory_fragments": {
639:     "memory_ch1_boss": {
640:       "title": "Fragment I: Chapel Ash",
641:       "text": "In ruined sanctuaries, your wings once shielded thousands."
642:     },
643:     "memory_ch2_boss": {
644:       "title": "Fragment II: Furnace Oath",
645:       "text": "You forged holy steel, then watched it melt in betrayal."
646:     },
647:     "memory_ch3_boss": {
648:       "title": "Fragment III: Frozen Prayer",
649:       "text": "Your final prayer froze midair when the heavens turned away."
650:     },
651:     "memory_ch4_boss": {
652:       "title": "Fragment IV: Broken Crown",
653:       "text": "At the edge of oblivion, you learned that mercy and ruin share one throne."
654:     },
655:     "memory_ch1_route_vanguard": {
656:       "title": "Fragment V: Vanguard Oath",
657:       "text": "You chose the shield wall first, teaching survivors to endure before they could strike."
658:     },
659:     "memory_ch1_route_raider": {
660:       "title": "Fragment VI: Raider Ember",
661:       "text": "You marched ahead of the line, seizing relic fuel before despair could claim the camp."
662:     },
663:     "memory_ch2_route_vanguard": {
664:       "title": "Fragment VII: Forge Vigil",
665:       "text": "At the furnace gates, your watch never broke; every blade was tempered under your vow."
666:     },
667:     "memory_ch2_route_raider": {
668:       "title": "Fragment VIII: Ash Requisition",
669:       "text": "You stripped the foundry bare in one night and armed the weak with stolen fire."
670:     },
671:     "memory_ch3_route_vanguard": {
672:       "title": "Fragment IX: Cathedral Bulwark",
673:       "text": "In frozen halls, your stance held the corridor while the last pilgrims escaped."
674:     },
675:     "memory_ch3_route_raider": {
676:       "title": "Fragment X: Whisper Bargain",
677:       "text": "You listened to the ice and took its price, trading warmth for power that never sleeps."
678:     },
679:     "memory_ch4_route_vanguard": {
680:       "title": "Fragment XI: Dusk Bastion",
681:       "text": "At the final breach you held the broken gate, buying one last dawn for the camp behind you."
682:     },
683:     "memory_ch4_route_raider": {
684:       "title": "Fragment XII: Crown of Ash",
685:       "text": "You struck first at the abyssal throne and left with spoils that burned even in silence."
686:     },
687:     "memory_ch2_event_forge": {
688:       "title": "Fragment XIII: Furnace Ledger",
689:       "text": "Every ingot had a name; every blade you raised was a promise you refused to forget."
690:     },
691:     "memory_ch3_event_sanctum": {
692:       "title": "Fragment XIV: Silent Choir",
693:       "text": "The frozen sanctum sang without voices, and you learned to read its hymns in fractured light."
694:     },
695:     "memory_ch4_event_void": {
696:       "title": "Fragment XV: Empty Coronation",
697:       "text": "When the void offered a crown, you answered with steel and wrote your oath into the dark."
698:     },
699:     "memory_meta_campfire": {
700:       "title": "Fragment XVI: Campfire Testament",
701:       "text": "Between runs, embers carried your old vows; each return sharpened the path you chose to keep."
702:     },
703:     "memory_ch4_route_vanguard_ii": {
704:       "title": "Fragment XVII: Last Bulwark",
705:       "text": "When the abyss breached the final ward, you planted your banner and held until dawn split the smoke."
706:     },
707:     "memory_ch4_route_raider_ii": {
708:       "title": "Fragment XVIII: Spoils of Dusk",
709:       "text": "You returned from the shattered throne with cursed relics and a silence no priest could cleanse."
710:     },
711:     "memory_ch2_event_forge_ii": {
712:       "title": "Fragment XIX: Tempered Debt",
713:       "text": "Each strike at the anvil paid an old debt; each spark was a vow to those you failed to protect."
714:     },
715:     "memory_ch3_event_sanctum_ii": {
716:       "title": "Fragment XX: Frostbound Psalm",
717:       "text": "In the frozen nave, hymns traced your blade and taught you where mercy ends and duty begins."
718:     },
719:     "memory_ch4_event_void_ii": {
720:       "title": "Fragment XXI: Throne Without Name",
721:       "text": "The void called you by your oldest name, and you answered with steel before the echo could root."
722:     },
723:     "memory_meta_reliquary": {
724:       "title": "Fragment XXII: Reliquary Oath",
725:       "text": "Back at camp, the reliquary glowed with stolen starlight, reminding you that every run rewrites your covenant."
726:     },
727:     "memory_ch1_event_shrine": {
728:       "title": "Fragment XXIII: Shrine Dust",
729:       "text": "The ruined shrine kept a trace of incense in its stones, and for one heartbeat you remembered the choir that once answered your prayer."
730:     },
731:     "memory_ch1_event_survivor": {
732:       "title": "Fragment XXIV: Borrowed Rations",
733:       "text": "You learned that a single loaf shared in darkness can bind a camp more tightly than any decree shouted in daylight."
734:     },
735:     "memory_ch1_afterglow": {
736:       "title": "Fragment XXV: Afterglow Debt",
737:       "text": "The old light did not absolve you; it only showed how many promises were still unpaid beneath the ash."
738:     },
739:     "memory_ch2_event_arena": {
740:       "title": "Fragment XXVI: Arena Brand",
741:       "text": "Every circle of scorched iron bore witness to the bargains heroes made when victory started to feel like appetite."
742:     },
743:     "memory_ch3_event_whispers": {
744:       "title": "Fragment XXVII: Icebound Names",
745:       "text": "In the cathedral frost, names of the fallen drifted like breath, and each one struck with more weight than steel."
746:     },
747:     "memory_ch4_event_threshold": {
748:       "title": "Fragment XXVIII: Last Threshold",
749:       "text": "Before the final gate, grace and ruin stood so close that only the steadiness of your steps kept them apart."
750:     },
751:     "memory_route_redeem": {
752:       "title": "Fragment XXIX: Road of Grace",
753:       "text": "Redemption was never a single choice, but a road paved by refusing power each time it begged to be easy."
754:     },
755:     "memory_route_fall": {
756:       "title": "Fragment XXX: Road of Ruin",
757:       "text": "Every cruel shortcut carved a straighter line to the throne, until the throne itself began to look like mercy."
758:     },
759:     "memory_route_balance": {
760:       "title": "Fragment XXXI: Road of Dusk",
761:       "text": "To walk between hymn and curse meant carrying both, and letting neither decide who would rise from the dust."
762:     },
763:     "memory_camp_blacksmith": {
764:       "title": "Fragment XXXII: Hammer Between Worlds",
765:       "text": "At the camp forge, each repaired edge reminded you that survival is built as much in the quiet between battles as in the strike itself."
766:     },

768:       "title": "Fragment XXXIII: Quiet Beneath Embers",
769:       "text": "When the altar dimmed and the camp fell silent, the memories that remained were the ones no ending could take from you."
770:     }

<content>1: extends Node

3: var _run_choices: Array[Dictionary] = []
4: var _chapter_event_history: Dictionary = {}
5: 
6: 
7: func _ready() -> void:
8:     _run_choices.clear()
9:     _chapter_event_history.clear()
10: 
11: 
12: func reset_run_choices() -> void:
13:     _run_choices.clear()
14:     _chapter_event_history.clear()
15: 
16: 
17: func record_choice(chapter_id: String, segment_id: String, choice_id: String, alignment_delta: float) -> void:
18:     _run_choices.append({
19:         "chapter_id": chapter_id,
20:         "segment_id": segment_id,
21:         "choice_id": choice_id,

26: func get_run_choices() -> Array[Dictionary]:
27:     var result: Array[Dictionary] = []
28:     for item: Variant in _run_choices:
29:         if item is Dictionary:
30:             result.append((item as Dictionary).duplicate(true))
31:     return result
32: 
33: 
34: func get_chapter_event(chapter_index: int, alignment: float = 0.0, route_style: String = "neutral", route_weight_mult: float = 1.0) -> Dictionary:
35:     var chapter_id: String = "chapter_%d" % chapter_index
36:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
37:     var event_rows: Variant = config.get("chapter_events", {})
38:     if not (event_rows is Dictionary):
39:         return {}
40: 
41:     var chapter_events_var: Variant = (event_rows as Dictionary).get(chapter_id, [])
42:     if not (chapter_events_var is Array):
43:         return {}
44:     var chapter_events: Array = chapter_events_var
45:     if chapter_events.is_empty():
46:         return {}
47: 
48:     var unlocked_endings: Array[String] = []
49:     if SaveManager != null and SaveManager.has_method("get_unlocked_endings"):
50:         unlocked_endings = SaveManager.get_unlocked_endings()
51: 
52:     var weighted_events: Array[Dictionary] = []
53:     var total_weight: float = 0.0
54: 
55:     for item: Variant in chapter_events:
56:         if not (item is Dictionary):
57:             continue
58:         var row: Dictionary = (item as Dictionary)
59:         var weight: float = _calc_event_weight(row, chapter_id, alignment, unlocked_endings, route_style, route_weight_mult)
60:         if weight <= 0.0:
61:             continue
62:         weighted_events.append({
63:             "event": row.duplicate(true),
64:             "weight": weight
65:         })
66:         total_weight += weight
67: 
68:     if weighted_events.is_empty() or total_weight <= 0.0:
69:         return {}
70: 
71:     var roll: float = randf() * total_weight
72:     var cursor: float = 0.0
73:     for item: Dictionary in weighted_events:
74:         cursor += float(item.get("weight", 0.0))
75:         if roll <= cursor:
76:             var picked_event: Dictionary = item.get("event", {})
77:             _record_event_history(chapter_id, str(picked_event.get("id", "")))
78:             return picked_event
79: 
80:     var fallback: Dictionary = weighted_events[weighted_events.size() - 1].get("event", {})
81:     _record_event_history(chapter_id, str(fallback.get("id", "")))
82:     return fallback
83: 
84: 
85: func get_fragment_data(fragment_id: String) -> Dictionary:
86:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
87:     var rows: Variant = config.get("memory_fragments", {})
88:     if rows is Dictionary:

90:         if item is Dictionary:
91:             return item

97:     var arc_rows_var: Variant = config.get("route_arc_profiles", {})

109:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)

113: func get_camp_reflection(chapter_id: String, alignment: float = 0.0, route_style: String = "neutral", unlocked_fragments: Array[String] = []) -> Dictionary:
114:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
115:     var reflection_rows_var: Variant = config.get("camp_reflections", {})
116:     if not (reflection_rows_var is Dictionary):
117:         return {}

120:     if not (chapter_row_var is Dictionary):
121:         return {}
122: 
123:     var arc_id: String = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
124:     var row_var: Variant = (chapter_row_var as Dictionary).get(arc_id, {})
125:     if not (row_var is Dictionary):

127:

130:     row["style"] = route_style
131:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
132:     row["fragment_progress"] = _build_fragment_progress_text(unlocked_fragments)
133:     row["recent_choice_summary"] = get_recent_choice_summary(chapter_id)
134:     return row
135: 
136: 
137: func get_recent_choice_summary(chapter_id: String = "", limit: int = 3) -> String:
138:     var rows: Array[String] = []
139:     var safe_limit: int = maxi(1, limit)
140:     for i in range(_run_choices.size() - 1, -1, -1):
141:         var row_var: Variant = _run_choices[i]
142:         if not (row_var is Dictionary):
143:             continue
144:         var row: Dictionary = row_var
145:         var row_chapter: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", ""))
146:         if chapter_id != "" and row_chapter != chapter_id:
147:             continue
148:         var choice_id: String = str(row.get("choice_id", "")).replace("_", " ")
149:         if choice_id == "":
150:             continue
151:         rows.append(choice_id.capitalize())
152:         if rows.size() >= safe_limit:
153:             break
154: 
155:     rows.reverse()
156:     if rows.is_empty():
157:         return "No recent vows recorded yet."
158:     return "Recent vows: %s" % " -> ".join(PackedStringArray(rows))
159: 
160: 
161: func get_ending_payoff(ending_id: String, alignment: float = 0.0, route_style: String = "neutral") -> Dictionary:
162:     if ending_id == "":
163:         return {}
164: 
165:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
166:     var payoff_rows_var: Variant = config.get("ending_payoff_profiles", {})
167:     if not (payoff_rows_var is Dictionary):

172:         return {}
173:

175:     row["ending_id"] = ending_id

182: func get_epilogue_chain(ending_id: String) -> Array[String]:
183:     if ending_id == "":
184:         return []
185: 
186:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
187:     var chain_rows_var: Variant = config.get("epilogue_chains", {})
188:     if not (chain_rows_var is Dictionary):
189:         return []
190: 
191:     var row_var: Variant = (chain_rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, [])
192:     var rows: Array[String] = []
193:     if row_var is Array:
194:         for item: Variant in row_var:
195:             var text: String = str(item).strip_edges()
196:             if text != "":
197:                 rows.append(text)
198:     return rows
199: 
200: 
201: func get_fragment_trigger_payload(chapter_id: String, trigger_type: String, alignment: float = 0.0, route_style: String = "neutral") -> Dictionary:
202:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
203:     var trigger_rows_var: Variant = config.get("fragment_trigger_profiles", {})
204:     if not (trigger_rows_var is Dictionary):
205:         return {}
206: 
207:     var chapter_row_var: Variant = (trigger_rows_var as Dictionary).get(chapter_id, {})
208:     if not (chapter_row_var is Dictionary):
209:         return {}
210: 
211:     var trigger_row_var: Variant = (chapter_row_var as Dictionary).get(trigger_type, {})
212:     if not (trigger_row_var is Dictionary):
213:         return {}
214: 
215:     var arc_id: String = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
216:     var fragment_id: String = str((trigger_row_var as Dictionary).get(arc_id, "")).strip_edges()
217:     if fragment_id == "":
218:         return {}
219: 
220:     var fragment_data: Dictionary = get_fragment_data(fragment_id)
221:     return {
222:         "chapter_id": chapter_id,
223:         "trigger_type": trigger_type,
224:         "arc_id": arc_id,
225:         "style": route_style,
226:         "fragment_id": fragment_id,
227:         "fragment_title": str(fragment_data.get("title", fragment_id)),
228:         "fragment_text": str(fragment_data.get("text", ""))
229:     }
230: 
231: 
232: func get_epilogue_branch_summary(ending_id: String, newly_unlocked: bool, route_style: String = "neutral") -> Dictionary:
233:     if ending_id == "":
234:         return {}
235: 
236:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
237:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("epilogue_branch_profiles", {})
238:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
239:         return {}
240: 
241:     var ending_row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
242:     if not (ending_row_var is Dictionary):
243:         return {}
244: 
245:     var branch_key: String = "first_unlock" if newly_unlocked else "repeat_unlock"
246:     var branch_row_var: Variant = (ending_row_var as Dictionary).get(branch_key, {})
247:     if not (branch_row_var is Dictionary):
248:         return {}
249: 
250:     var row: Dictionary = (branch_row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
251:     row["ending_id"] = ending_id
252:     row["branch_key"] = branch_key
253:     row["archive_hook"] = str((ending_row_var as Dictionary).get("archive_hook", ""))
254:     row["style"] = route_style
255:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
256:     return row
257: 
258: 
259: func get_fragment_recap_summary(fragment_triggers: Array[Dictionary], alignment: float = 0.0, route_style: String = "neutral") -> Dictionary:
260:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
261:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("fragment_recap_profiles", {})
262:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
263:         return {}
264: 
265:     var arc_id: String = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
266:     var row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(arc_id, {})
267:     if not (row_var is Dictionary):
268:         return {}
269: 
270:     var trigger_count: int = 0
271:     var newly_unlocked_count: int = 0
272:     var trigger_types: Array[String] = []
273:     for item: Dictionary in fragment_triggers:
274:         trigger_count += 1
275:         if bool(item.get("newly_unlocked", false)):
276:             newly_unlocked_count += 1
277:         var trigger_type: String = str(item.get("trigger_type", "")).strip_edges()
278:         if trigger_type != "" and not trigger_types.has(trigger_type):
279:             trigger_types.append(trigger_type)
280: 
281:     var row: Dictionary = (row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
282:     row["arc_id"] = arc_id
283:     row["style"] = route_style
284:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
285:     row["trigger_count"] = trigger_count
286:     row["new_unlock_count"] = newly_unlocked_count
287:     row["trigger_types"] = trigger_types
288:     return row
289: 
290: 
291: func get_hidden_layer_hook(alignment: float = 0.0, route_style: String = "neutral", unlocked_endings: Array[String] = []) -> Dictionary:
292:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
293:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("hidden_layer_hooks", {})
294:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
295:         return {}
296: 
297:     var arc_id: String = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
298:     var row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(arc_id, {})
299:     if not (row_var is Dictionary):
300:         return {}
301: 
302:     var row: Dictionary = (row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
303:     row["arc_id"] = arc_id
304:     row["style"] = route_style
305:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
306:     row["unlocked_endings"] = unlocked_endings.duplicate()
307:     row["ready"] = unlocked_endings.has("nar_ending_%s" % arc_id)
308:     return row
309: 
310: 
311: func is_registered_narrative_id(segment_id: String) -> bool:
312:     var index_data: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_index", {})
313:     var rows: Variant = index_data.get("segments", [])
314:     if not (rows is Array):
315:         return false
316: 
317:     for item: Variant in rows:
318:         if not (item is Dictionary):
319:             continue
320:         if str((item as Dictionary).get("id", "")) == segment_id:
321:             return true
322:     return false
323: 
324: 
325: func _calc_event_weight(event_row: Dictionary, chapter_id: String, alignment: float, unlocked_endings: Array[String], route_style: String, route_weight_mult: float) -> float:
326:     if not _is_event_allowed_by_endings(event_row, unlocked_endings):
327:         return 0.0
328: 
329:     var weight: float = maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_base", 1.0)))
330:     if alignment >= 30.0:
331:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_holy", 1.0)))
332:     elif alignment <= -30.0:
333:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_void", 1.0)))
334:     else:
335:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_balance", 1.0)))
336: 
337:     if unlocked_endings.has("nar_ending_redeem"):
338:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_ending_redeem", 1.0)))
339:     if unlocked_endings.has("nar_ending_fall"):
340:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_ending_fall", 1.0)))
341:     if unlocked_endings.has("nar_ending_balance"):
342:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_ending_balance", 1.0)))
343: 
344:     var style_key: String = "weight_if_route_%s" % route_style
345:     weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get(style_key, 1.0)))
346:     weight *= maxf(0.0, route_weight_mult)
347: 
348:     var event_id: String = str(event_row.get("id", ""))
349:     weight *= _get_recent_event_factor(chapter_id, event_id)
350:     return weight
351: 
352: 
353: func _is_event_allowed_by_endings(event_row: Dictionary, unlocked_endings: Array[String]) -> bool:
354:     var requires_var: Variant = event_row.get("requires_endings_any", [])
355:     if requires_var is Array and not (requires_var as Array).is_empty():
356:         var allowed: bool = false
357:         for item: Variant in requires_var:
358:             if unlocked_endings.has(str(item)):
359:                 allowed = true
360:                 break
361:         if not allowed:
362:             return false
363: 
364:     var forbid_var: Variant = event_row.get("forbid_endings_any", [])
365:     if forbid_var is Array and not (forbid_var as Array).is_empty():
366:         for item: Variant in forbid_var:
367:             if unlocked_endings.has(str(item)):
368:                 return false
369: 
370:     return true
371: 
372: 
373: func _get_recent_event_factor(chapter_id: String, event_id: String) -> float:
374:     if event_id == "":
375:         return 1.0
376: 
377:     var history_var: Variant = _chapter_event_history.get(chapter_id, [])
378:     if not (history_var is Array):
379:         return 1.0
380:     var history: Array = history_var
381:     if history.is_empty():
382:         return 1.0
383: 
384:     var last_event_id: String = str(history[history.size() - 1])
385:     if last_event_id == event_id:
386:         return 0.15
387:     if history.has(event_id):
388:         return 0.45
389:     return 1.0
390: 
391: 
392: func _record_event_history(chapter_id: String, event_id: String) -> void:
393:     if event_id == "":
394:         return
395: 
396:     var history_var: Variant = _chapter_event_history.get(chapter_id, [])
397:     var history: Array = []
398:     if history_var is Array:
399:         history = (history_var as Array).duplicate()
400: 
401:     history.append(event_id)
402:     while history.size() > 5:
403:         history.remove_at(0)
404: 
405:     _chapter_event_history[chapter_id] = history
406: 
407: 
408: func _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment: float) -> String:
409:     if alignment >= 60.0:
410:         return "redeem"
411:     if alignment <= -60.0:
412:         return "fall"
413:     return "balance"
414: 
415: 
416: func _get_route_style_echo(route_style: String) -> String:
417:     match route_style:
418:         "vanguard":
419:             return "Vanguard routes favor safer pressure and disciplined pacing."
420:         "raider":
421:             return "Raider routes trade stability for burst rewards and sharper pressure."
422:         _:
423:             return "Neutral routes keep both ending paths open while you shape the run."
424: 
425: 
426: func _build_fragment_progress_text(unlocked_fragments: Array[String]) -> String:
427:     var index_data: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_index", {})
428:     var fragment_meta: Dictionary = index_data.get("memory_fragments", {})
429:     var total: int = maxi(1, int(fragment_meta.get("total", 0)))
430:     return "Fragment progress: %d / %d" % [unlocked_fragments.size(), total]

(End of file - total 430 lines)
</content>

166: 
167: func _unhandled_input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
168:     if not _active:
169:         return
170: 
171:     if _timeline_grouped_view and event is InputEventKey:
172:         var key_event: InputEventKey = event
173:         if key_event.pressed and not key_event.echo:
174:             if key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_Q:
175:                 _shift_grouped_anchor(-1)
176:                 return
177:             if key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_E:
178:                 _shift_grouped_anchor(1)
179:                 return
180:             if key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_3 or key_event.physical_keycode == KEY_KP_3:
181:                 _toggle_grouped_anchor_scope()
182:                 return
183: 
184:     if event.is_action_pressed("narrative_choice_1"):
185:         _cycle_timeline_filter()
186:         return
187: 
188:     if event.is_action_pressed("narrative_choice_2"):
189:         _toggle_timeline_view()
190:         return
191: 
192:     if event.is_action_pressed("interact") or event.is_action_pressed("pause"):
193:         _request_back()
194: 
195: 
196: func _on_back_button_pressed() -> void:
197:     _request_back()
198: 
199: 
200: func _request_back() -> void:
201:     if not _active:
202:         return
203:     _active = false
204:     visible = false
205:     back_to_menu_requested.emit()
206: 
207: 
208: func _on_timeline_filter_button_pressed() -> void:
209:     _cycle_timeline_filter()
210: 
211: 
212: func _on_timeline_view_button_pressed() -> void:
213:     _toggle_timeline_view()
214: 
215: 
216: func _on_timeline_anchor_button_pressed() -> void:
217:     _shift_grouped_anchor(1)
218: 
219: 
220: func _on_timeline_scope_button_pressed() -> void:
221:     _toggle_grouped_anchor_scope()
222: 
223: 
224: func _cycle_timeline_filter() -> void:
225:     _timeline_filter_index = (_timeline_filter_index + 1) % TIMELINE_FILTER_ORDER.size()
226:     _refresh_timeline_view()
227: 
228: 
229: func _toggle_timeline_view() -> void:
230:     _timeline_grouped_view = not _timeline_grouped_view
231:     _refresh_timeline_view()
232: 
233: 
234: func _toggle_grouped_anchor_scope() -> void:
235:     if not _timeline_grouped_view:
236:         return
237:     _grouped_anchor_only_scope = not _grouped_anchor_only_scope
238:     _refresh_timeline_view()
239: 
240: 
241: func _refresh_timeline_view() -> void:
242:     var mode: String = TIMELINE_FILTER_ORDER[_timeline_filter_index]
243:     _rebuild_grouped_chapter_order(mode)
244: 
245:     if _timeline_grouped_view:
246:         _effects_timeline_label.text = _build_grouped_timeline_summary(_timeline_rows, mode)
247:     else:
248:         _effects_timeline_label.text = _build_chapter_effect_timeline_summary(_timeline_rows, mode)
249: 
250:     _apply_timeline_filter_theme(mode)
251:     _apply_anchor_faction_theme()
252: 
253:     if _timeline_filter_button != null:
254:         var tag: String = _get_timeline_mode_tag(mode)
255:         _timeline_filter_button.text = "%s Timeline Filter: %s (click / [1])" % [tag, mode.to_upper()]
256: 
257:     if _timeline_view_button != null:
258:         var view_text: String = "Timeline View: %s (click / [2])" % ("GROUPED" if _timeline_grouped_view else "FLAT")
259:         if _timeline_grouped_view:
260:             var chapter_hint: String = _chapter_anchor_title(_get_active_grouped_chapter_id())
261:             if chapter_hint == "":
262:                 chapter_hint = "none"
263:             view_text += " | Anchor: %s (Q/E)" % chapter_hint
264:         _timeline_view_button.text = view_text
265: 
266:     if _timeline_anchor_button != null:
267:         var faction_tag: String = _get_ending_faction_tag(_current_ending_id)
268:         var anchor_hint: String = _chapter_anchor_title(_get_active_grouped_chapter_id())
269:         if anchor_hint == "":
270:             anchor_hint = "none"
271:         _timeline_anchor_button.disabled = (not _timeline_grouped_view) or _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty()
272:         _timeline_anchor_button.text = "%s Anchor Next: %s (click / E)" % [faction_tag, anchor_hint]
273: 
274:     if _timeline_scope_button != null:
275:         _timeline_scope_button.disabled = (not _timeline_grouped_view) or _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty()
276:         var scope_text: String = "ANCHOR ONLY" if _grouped_anchor_only_scope else "ALL CHAPTERS"
277:         _timeline_scope_button.text = "Scope: %s (click / [3])" % scope_text
278: 
279:     if _hint_label != null:
280:         if _timeline_grouped_view:
281:             _hint_label.text = "[1] Filter | [2] View | [3] Scope | Q/E anchor | Esc to return"
282:         else:
283:             _hint_label.text = "[1] Switch filter | [2] Switch view | E / Esc to return"
284: 
285: 
286: func _get_ending_title(ending_id: String) -> String:
287:     var configured: Dictionary = _get_ending_row(ending_id)
288:     if not configured.is_empty():
289:         return str(configured.get("title", "Ending"))
290: 
291:     match ending_id:
292:         "nar_ending_redeem":
293:             return "Ending: REDEEM"
294:         "nar_ending_fall":
295:             return "Ending: FALL"
296:         "nar_ending_balance":
297:             return "Ending: BALANCE"
298:         _:
299:             return "Ending: %s" % ending_id
300: 
301: 
302: func _get_ending_story(ending_id: String) -> String:
303:     var configured: Dictionary = _get_ending_row(ending_id)
304:     if not configured.is_empty():
305:         return str(configured.get("story", "A new fate is recorded."))
306: 
307:     match ending_id:
308:         "nar_ending_redeem":
309:             return "You rise with broken wings healed by grace. The abyss closes, but your oath remains."
310:         "nar_ending_fall":
311:             return "You wear the void as a crown. Salvation is denied, and power becomes your final prayer."
312:         "nar_ending_balance":
313:             return "Neither halo nor abyss claims you. You walk the narrow dusk, guarding both worlds."
314:         _:
315:             return "A new fate is recorded."
316: 
317: 
318: func _get_ending_row(ending_id: String) -> Dictionary:
319:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
320:     var ending_rows: Variant = config.get("endings", {})
321:     if ending_rows is Dictionary:
322:         var row: Variant = (ending_rows as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
323:         if row is Dictionary:
324:             return row
325:     return {}
326: 
327: 
328: func _build_choices_summary(raw_choices: Variant) -> String:
329:     if not (raw_choices is Array):
330:         return "Narrative Choices: none"
331: 
332:     var choices: Array = raw_choices
333:     if choices.is_empty():
334:         return "Narrative Choices: none"
335: 
336:     var lines: Array[String] = ["Narrative Choices:"]
337:     var display_limit: int = mini(6, choices.size())
338:     for i in range(display_limit):
339:         var item: Variant = choices[i]
340:         if not (item is Dictionary):
341:             continue
342:         var row: Dictionary = item
343:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter"))
344:         var segment_id: String = str(row.get("segment_id", "segment"))
345:         var choice_id: String = str(row.get("choice_id", "choice"))
346:         var alignment_delta: float = float(row.get("alignment_delta", 0.0))
347:         lines.append("- %s / %s -> %s (%+.0f)" % [chapter_id, segment_id, choice_id, alignment_delta])
348: 
349:     if choices.size() > display_limit:
350:         lines.append("... +%d more" % (choices.size() - display_limit))
351: 
352:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
353: 
354: 
355: func _build_route_style_summary(raw_styles: Variant, raw_timeline: Variant) -> String:
356:     var styles: Dictionary = {}
357:     if raw_styles is Dictionary:
358:         styles = raw_styles
359: 
360:     var lines: Array[String] = ["Route Style Evolution:"]
361:     var chapter_parts: Array[String] = []
362:     for idx in range(1, 5):
363:         var chapter_id: String = "chapter_%d" % idx
364:         var style_id: String = str(styles.get(chapter_id, "neutral"))
365:         chapter_parts.append("CH%d:%s" % [idx, _route_style_label_for_id(style_id)])
366:     lines.append("  " + " | ".join(PackedStringArray(chapter_parts)))
367: 
368:     if raw_timeline is Array and not (raw_timeline as Array).is_empty():
369:         var timeline: Array = raw_timeline
370:         lines.append("Locks:")
371:         var limit: int = mini(6, timeline.size())
372:         for i in range(limit):
373:             var row_var: Variant = timeline[i]
374:             if not (row_var is Dictionary):
375:                 continue
376:             var row: Dictionary = row_var
377:             lines.append("- R%d %s -> %s (slot %d)" % [
378:                 int(row.get("room_index", 0)),
379:                 str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter")),
380:                 _route_style_label_for_id(str(row.get("style_id", "neutral"))),
381:                 int(row.get("selected_slot", 0)) + 1
382:             ])
383:         if timeline.size() > limit:
384:             lines.append("... +%d more" % (timeline.size() - limit))
385:     else:
386:         lines.append("Locks: none (all chapters remained NEUTRAL)")
387: 
388:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
389: 
390: 
391: func _route_style_label_for_id(style_id: String) -> String:
392:     match style_id:
393:         "vanguard":
394:             return "VANGUARD"
395:         "raider":
396:             return "RAIDER"
397:         _:
398:             return "NEUTRAL"
399: 
400: 
401: func _build_chapter_effect_timeline_summary(raw_timeline: Variant, mode: String) -> String:
402:     if not (raw_timeline is Array):
403:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
404: 
405:     var timeline: Array = raw_timeline
406:     if timeline.is_empty():
407:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
408: 
409:     var counts: Dictionary = _count_timeline_modes(timeline)
410:     var lines: Array[String] = [
411:         _build_timeline_mode_header(mode),
412:         "Segments -> BOON:%d  CURSE:%d  MIXED:%d" % [
413:             int(counts.get("boon", 0)),
414:             int(counts.get("curse", 0)),
415:             int(counts.get("mixed", 0))
416:         ]
417:     ]
418:     var display_limit: int = 8
419:     var shown: int = 0
420:     var matched_total: int = 0
421:     for i in range(timeline.size()):
422:         var item: Variant = timeline[i]
423:         if not (item is Dictionary):
424:             continue
425: 
426:         var row: Dictionary = item
427:         if not _timeline_row_matches_mode(row, mode):
428:             continue
429:         matched_total += 1
430: 
431:         var room_index: int = int(row.get("room_index", 0))
432:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter"))
433:         var icon: String = str(row.get("icon", "[~]"))
434:         var title: String = str(row.get("title", "Chapter Effect"))
435:         var duration_rooms: int = int(row.get("duration_rooms", 1))
436:         var desc: String = str(row.get("desc", ""))
437: 
438:         var body: String = "- R%d %s %s %s (%dR)" % [room_index, chapter_id, icon, title, duration_rooms]
439:         if desc != "":
440:             body += " | %s" % desc
441:         lines.append(body)
442:         shown += 1
443:         if shown >= display_limit:
444:             break
445: 
446:     if shown == 0:
447:         lines.append("- none under current filter")
448:     elif matched_total > shown:
449:         lines.append("... +%d more" % (matched_total - shown))
450: 
451:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
452: 
453: 
454: func _build_grouped_timeline_summary(raw_timeline: Variant, mode: String) -> String:
455:     if not (raw_timeline is Array):
456:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
457: 
458:     var timeline: Array = raw_timeline
459:     if timeline.is_empty():
460:         return "Chapter Effect Timeline (%s): none" % mode.to_upper()
461: 
462:     var counts: Dictionary = _count_timeline_modes(timeline)
463:     var grouped: Dictionary = {}
464:     var filtered_rows: Array = []
465: 
466:     for item: Variant in timeline:
467:         if not (item is Dictionary):
468:             continue
469:         var row: Dictionary = item
470:         if not _timeline_row_matches_mode(row, mode):
471:             continue
472:         filtered_rows.append(row)
473:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter_unknown"))
474:         if not grouped.has(chapter_id):
475:             grouped[chapter_id] = []
476:         (grouped[chapter_id] as Array).append(row)
477: 
478:     var lines: Array[String] = [
479:         _build_timeline_mode_header(mode),
480:         "Segments -> BOON:%d  CURSE:%d  MIXED:%d" % [
481:             int(counts.get("boon", 0)),
482:             int(counts.get("curse", 0)),
483:             int(counts.get("mixed", 0))
484:         ],
485:         "View: Grouped by chapter (collapsed preview)"
486:     ]
487: 
488:     if filtered_rows.is_empty():
489:         lines.append("- none under current filter")
490:         return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
491: 
492:     var chapter_order: Array[String] = _grouped_chapter_order
493:     if chapter_order.is_empty():
494:         chapter_order = ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]
495:     var anchor_id: String = _get_active_grouped_chapter_id()
496:     if _grouped_anchor_only_scope and anchor_id != "":
497:         chapter_order = [anchor_id]
498:     var faction_tag: String = _get_ending_faction_tag(_current_ending_id)
499: 
500:     var total_lines_limit: int = 12
501:     var emitted_rows: int = 0
502:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in chapter_order:
503:         var chapter_id: String = str(chapter_id_var)
504:         if not grouped.has(chapter_id):
505:             continue
506:         var chapter_rows: Array = grouped[chapter_id]
507:         if chapter_rows.is_empty():
508:             continue
509: 
510:         var is_anchor: bool = chapter_id == anchor_id
511:         lines.append("")
512:         lines.append("%s%s [%s] (%d)" % ["> " if is_anchor else "  ", faction_tag, _chapter_anchor_title(chapter_id), chapter_rows.size()])
513: 
514:         var chapter_limit: int = mini(4 if is_anchor else 1, chapter_rows.size())
515:         for i in range(chapter_limit):
516:             var row: Dictionary = chapter_rows[i]
517:             lines.append(_format_timeline_row(row, "    - "))
518:             emitted_rows += 1
519:             if emitted_rows >= total_lines_limit:
520:                 break
521: 
522:         if chapter_rows.size() > chapter_limit:
523:             lines.append("    ... +%d more" % (chapter_rows.size() - chapter_limit))
524: 
525:         if emitted_rows >= total_lines_limit:
526:             lines.append("... timeline preview truncated")
527:             break
528: 
529:     return "\n".join(PackedStringArray(lines))
530: 
531: 
532: func _format_timeline_row(row: Dictionary, prefix: String) -> String:
533:     var room_index: int = int(row.get("room_index", 0))
534:     var icon: String = str(row.get("icon", "[~]"))
535:     var title: String = str(row.get("title", "Chapter Effect"))
536:     var duration_rooms: int = int(row.get("duration_rooms", 1))
537:     var desc: String = str(row.get("desc", ""))
538: 
539:     var body: String = "%sR%d %s %s (%dR)" % [prefix, room_index, icon, title, duration_rooms]
540:     if desc != "":
541:         body += " | %s" % desc
542:     return body
543: 
544: 
545: func _build_timeline_mode_header(mode: String) -> String:
546:     var tag: String = _get_timeline_mode_tag(mode)
547:     match mode:
548:         "boon":
549:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Blessing Route" % tag
550:         "curse":
551:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Burden Route" % tag
552:         "mixed":
553:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Hybrid Route" % tag
554:         _:
555:             return "%s Chapter Effect Timeline: Full Replay" % tag
556: 
557: 
558: func _count_timeline_modes(timeline: Array) -> Dictionary:
559:     var counts: Dictionary = {
560:         "boon": 0,
561:         "curse": 0,
562:         "mixed": 0
563:     }
564:     for item: Variant in timeline:
565:         if not (item is Dictionary):
566:             continue
567:         var mode: String = _resolve_timeline_row_mode(item)
568:         counts[mode] = int(counts.get(mode, 0)) + 1
569:     return counts
570: 
571: 
572: func _rebuild_grouped_chapter_order(mode: String) -> void:
573:     var previous_anchor_id: String = _get_active_grouped_chapter_id()
574: 
575:     var preferred: Array[String] = ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]
576:     var dynamic: Array[String] = []
577:     for item: Variant in _timeline_rows:
578:         if not (item is Dictionary):
579:             continue
580:         var row: Dictionary = item
581:         if not _timeline_row_matches_mode(row, mode):
582:             continue
583:         var chapter_id: String = str(row.get("chapter_id", "chapter_unknown"))
584:         if chapter_id == "":
585:             chapter_id = "chapter_unknown"
586:         if not dynamic.has(chapter_id):
587:             dynamic.append(chapter_id)
588: 
589:     _grouped_chapter_order.clear()
590:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in preferred:
591:         var chapter_id: String = str(chapter_id_var)
592:         if dynamic.has(chapter_id):
593:             _grouped_chapter_order.append(chapter_id)
594: 
595:     var overflow: Array[String] = []
596:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in dynamic:
597:         var chapter_id: String = str(chapter_id_var)
598:         if not _grouped_chapter_order.has(chapter_id):
599:             overflow.append(chapter_id)
600:     overflow.sort()
601:     for chapter_id_var: Variant in overflow:
602:         _grouped_chapter_order.append(str(chapter_id_var))
603: 
604:     if _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty():
605:         _grouped_anchor_index = 0
606:         return
607: 
608:     if previous_anchor_id != "" and _grouped_chapter_order.has(previous_anchor_id):
609:         _grouped_anchor_index = _grouped_chapter_order.find(previous_anchor_id)
610:     else:
611:         _grouped_anchor_index = clampi(_grouped_anchor_index, 0, _grouped_chapter_order.size() - 1)
612: 
613: 
614: func _shift_grouped_anchor(step: int) -> void:
615:     if not _timeline_grouped_view or _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty():
616:         return
617:     _grouped_anchor_index = posmod(_grouped_anchor_index + step, _grouped_chapter_order.size())
618:     _refresh_timeline_view()
619: 
620: 
621: func _get_active_grouped_chapter_id() -> String:
622:     if _grouped_chapter_order.is_empty():
623:         return ""
624:     var safe_index: int = clampi(_grouped_anchor_index, 0, _grouped_chapter_order.size() - 1)
625:     return _grouped_chapter_order[safe_index]
626: 
627: 
628: func _chapter_anchor_title(chapter_id: String) -> String:
629:     if chapter_id.begins_with("chapter_"):
630:         var suffix: String = chapter_id.trim_prefix("chapter_")
631:         if suffix.is_valid_int():
632:             return "CH%s" % suffix
633:     if chapter_id == "":
634:         return ""
635:     return chapter_id.to_upper()
636: 
637: 
638: func _resolve_timeline_row_mode(row: Dictionary) -> String:
639:     var score: float = _timeline_row_score(row)
640:     if score >= 0.25:
641:         return "boon"
642:     if score <= -0.25:
643:         return "curse"
644:     return "mixed"
645: 
646: 
647: func _timeline_row_score(row: Dictionary) -> float:
648:     if row.has("score"):
649:         return float(row.get("score", 0.0))
650: 
651:     var icon: String = str(row.get("icon", "[~]"))
652:     if icon == "[+]":
653:         return 1.0
654:     if icon == "[-]":
655:         return -1.0
656:     return 0.0
657: 
658: 
659: func _timeline_row_matches_mode(row: Dictionary, mode: String) -> bool:
660:     if mode == "all":
661:         return true
662: 
663:     var score: float = _timeline_row_score(row)
664: 
665:     if mode == "boon":
666:         return score >= 0.25
667:     if mode == "curse":
668:         return score <= -0.25
669:     if mode == "mixed":
670:         return score > -0.25 and score < 0.25
671:     return true
672: 
673: 
674: func _get_timeline_mode_tag(mode: String) -> String:
675:     var row: Dictionary = _get_timeline_theme(mode)
676:     return str(row.get("tag", "[ALL]"))
677: 
678: 
679: func _apply_timeline_filter_theme(mode: String) -> void:
680:     var row: Dictionary = _get_timeline_theme(mode)
681:     var tint: Color = row.get("tint", TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME["all"]["tint"])
682:     if _effects_timeline_label != null:
683:         _effects_timeline_label.modulate = tint
684:     if _timeline_filter_button != null:
685:         _timeline_filter_button.modulate = tint
686:     if _timeline_view_button != null:
687:         _timeline_view_button.modulate = tint
688:     if _timeline_scope_button != null:
689:         _timeline_scope_button.modulate = tint
690: 
691: 
692: func _apply_anchor_faction_theme() -> void:
693:     var theme: Dictionary = _get_ending_faction_theme(_current_ending_id)
694:     var tint: Color = theme.get("tint", ENDING_FACTION_THEME["default"]["tint"])
695:     if _timeline_anchor_button != null:
696:         _timeline_anchor_button.modulate = tint
697: 
698: 
699: func _get_timeline_theme(mode: String) -> Dictionary:
700:     if TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME.has(mode):
701:         return TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME[mode]
702:     return TIMELINE_FILTER_THEME["all"]
703: 
704: 
705: func _get_ending_faction_theme(ending_id: String) -> Dictionary:
706:     if ENDING_FACTION_THEME.has(ending_id):
707:         return ENDING_FACTION_THEME[ending_id]
708:     return ENDING_FACTION_THEME["default"]
709: 
710: 
711: func _get_ending_faction_tag(ending_id: String) -> String:
712:     var row: Dictionary = _get_ending_faction_theme(ending_id)
713:     return str(row.get("tag", "[ARCHIVE]"))

(End of file - total 713 lines)
</content>

1372: def _validate_achievements(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
1373:     rows = data.get("achievements")
1374:     if not isinstance(rows, list) or not rows:
1375:         _add_error(errors, "achievements.json achievements must be non-empty array")
1376:         return
1377: 
1378:     seen: set[str] = set()
1379:     prefixes = ("clear_floor_", "alignment_ge_", "alignment_le_", "kills_ge_", "reach_level_")
1380:     for i, row in enumerate(rows):
1381:         if not isinstance(row, dict):
1382:             _add_error(errors, f"achievements.json achievements[{i}] must be object")
1383:             continue
1384:         ach_id = row.get("id")
1385:         condition = row.get("condition")
1386:         if not isinstance(ach_id, str) or not ach_id:
1387:             _add_error(errors, f"achievements.json achievements[{i}].id invalid")
1388:             continue
1389:         if ach_id in seen:
1390:             _add_error(errors, f"achievements.json duplicate id '{ach_id}'")
1391:         seen.add(ach_id)
1392:         if not isinstance(condition, str) or not condition:
1393:             _add_error(errors, f"achievements.json achievements[{i}].condition invalid")
1394:             continue
1395:         if condition != "victory_once" and not condition.startswith(prefixes):
1396:             _add_error(errors, f"achievements.json achievements[{i}] unsupported condition '{condition}'")
1397: 
1398: 
1399: def _validate_meta_upgrades(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
1400:     rows = data.get("upgrades")
1401:     if not isinstance(rows, list) or not rows:
1402:         _add_error(errors, "meta_upgrades.json upgrades must be non-empty array")
1403:         return
1404: 
1405:     seen: set[str] = set()
1406:     for i, row in enumerate(rows):
1407:         if not isinstance(row, dict):
1408:             _add_error(errors, f"meta_upgrades.json upgrades[{i}] must be object")
1409:             continue
1410:         upgrade_id = row.get("id")
1411:         if not isinstance(upgrade_id, str) or not upgrade_id:
1412:             _add_error(errors, f"meta_upgrades.json upgrades[{i}].id invalid")
1413:             continue
1414:         if upgrade_id in seen:
1415:             _add_error(errors, f"meta_upgrades.json duplicate id '{upgrade_id}'")
1416:         seen.add(upgrade_id)
1417: 
1418:         if not isinstance(row.get("effect"), str) or not row["effect"]:
1419:             _add_error(errors, f"meta_upgrades.json {upgrade_id}.effect invalid")
1420:         if not isinstance(row.get("max_level"), int) or row["max_level"] < 1:
1421:             _add_error(errors, f"meta_upgrades.json {upgrade_id}.max_level must be int >= 1")
1422:         if not _is_number(row.get("value_per_level")):
1423:             _add_error(errors, f"meta_upgrades.json {upgrade_id}.value_per_level must be numeric")
1424:         if not isinstance(row.get("base_cost"), int) or row["base_cost"] < 0:
1425:             _add_error(errors, f"meta_upgrades.json {upgrade_id}.base_cost must be int >= 0")
1426:         if not isinstance(row.get("cost_step"), int) or row["cost_step"] < 0:
1427:             _add_error(errors, f"meta_upgrades.json {upgrade_id}.cost_step must be int >= 0")
1428: 
1429:

<content>228:         "fragment_text": str(fragment_data.get("text", ""))

230: 
231: 
232: func get_epilogue_branch_summary(ending_id: String, newly_unlocked: bool, route_style: String = "neutral") -> Dictionary:
233:     if ending_id == "":
234:         return {}
235: 
236:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
237:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("epilogue_branch_profiles", {})
238:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
239:         return {}
240: 
241:     var ending_row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(ending_id, {})
242:     if not (ending_row_var is Dictionary):
243:         return {}
244: 
245:     var branch_key: String = "first_unlock" if newly_unlocked else "repeat_unlock"
246:     var branch_row_var: Variant = (ending_row_var as Dictionary).get(branch_key, {})
247:     if not (branch_row_var is Dictionary):
248:         return {}
249: 
250:     var row: Dictionary = (branch_row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
251:     row["ending_id"] = ending_id
252:     row["branch_key"] = branch_key
253:     row["archive_hook"] = str((ending_row_var as Dictionary).get("archive_hook", ""))
254:     row["style"] = route_style
255:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
256:     return row
257: 
258: 
259: func get_fragment_recap_summary(fragment_triggers: Array[Dictionary], alignment: float = 0.0, route_style: String = "neutral") -> Dictionary:
260:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
261:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("fragment_recap_profiles", {})
262:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
263:         return {}
264: 
265:     var arc_id: String = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
266:     var row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(arc_id, {})
267:     if not (row_var is Dictionary):
268:         return {}
269: 
270:     var trigger_count: int = 0
271:     var newly_unlocked_count: int = 0
272:     var trigger_types: Array[String] = []
273:     for item: Dictionary in fragment_triggers:
274:         trigger_count += 1
275:         if bool(item.get("newly_unlocked", false)):
276:             newly_unlocked_count += 1
277:         var trigger_type: String = str(item.get("trigger_type", "")).strip_edges()
278:         if trigger_type != "" and not trigger_types.has(trigger_type):
279:             trigger_types.append(trigger_type)
280: 
281:     var row: Dictionary = (row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
282:     row["arc_id"] = arc_id
283:     row["style"] = route_style
284:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
285:     row["trigger_count"] = trigger_count
286:     row["new_unlock_count"] = newly_unlocked_count
287:     row["trigger_types"] = trigger_types
288:     return row
289: 
290: 
291: func get_hidden_layer_hook(alignment: float = 0.0, route_style: String = "neutral", unlocked_endings: Array[String] = []) -> Dictionary:
292:     var config: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_content", {})
293:     var rows_var: Variant = config.get("hidden_layer_hooks", {})
294:     if not (rows_var is Dictionary):
295:         return {}
296: 
297:     var arc_id: String = _resolve_route_arc_id(alignment)
298:     var row_var: Variant = (rows_var as Dictionary).get(arc_id, {})
299:     if not (row_var is Dictionary):
300:         return {}
301: 
302:     var row: Dictionary = (row_var as Dictionary).duplicate(true)
303:     row["arc_id"] = arc_id
304:     row["style"] = route_style
305:     row["style_echo"] = _get_route_style_echo(route_style)
306:     row["unlocked_endings"] = unlocked_endings.duplicate()
307:     row["ready"] = unlocked_endings.has("nar_ending_%s" % arc_id)
308:     return row
309: 
310: 
311: func is_registered_narrative_id(segment_id: String) -> bool:
312:     var index_data: Dictionary = ConfigManager.get_config("narrative_index", {})
313:     var rows: Variant = index_data.get("segments", [])
314:     if not (rows is Array):
315:         return false
316: 
317:     for item: Variant in rows:
318:         if not (item is Dictionary):
319:             continue
320:         if str((item as Dictionary).get("id", "")) == segment_id:
321:             return true
322:     return false
323: 
324: 
325: func _calc_event_weight(event_row: Dictionary, chapter_id: String, alignment: float, unlocked_endings: Array[String], route_style: String, route_weight_mult: float) -> float:
326:     if not _is_event_allowed_by_endings(event_row, unlocked_endings):
327:         return 0.0
328: 
329:     var weight: float = maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_base", 1.0)))
330:     if alignment >= 30.0:
331:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_holy", 1.0)))
332:     elif alignment <= -30.0:
333:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_void", 1.0)))
334:     else:
335:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_balance", 1.0)))
336: 
337:     if unlocked_endings.has("nar_ending_redeem"):
338:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_ending_redeem", 1.0)))
339:     if unlocked_endings.has("nar_ending_fall"):
340:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_ending_fall", 1.0)))
341:     if unlocked_endings.has("nar_ending_balance"):
342:         weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get("weight_if_ending_balance", 1.0)))
343: 
344:     var style_key: String = "weight_if_route_%s" % route_style
345:     weight *= maxf(0.0, float(event_row.get(style_key, 1.0)))
346:     weight *= maxf(0.0, route_weight_mult)
347: 

(Showing lines 228-347 of 430. Use offset=348 to continue.)
</content>

1073: func _finish_run(outcome: String) -> void:
1074:     if _run_finished:
1075:         return
1076:     _run_finished = true
1077:     _reset_pause_state()
1078: 
1079:     GameManager.set_state(GameManager.GameState.GAME_OVER)
1080:     _room_active = false

1086:     if progression != null and progression.get("current_level") != null:
1087:         level_reached = int(progression.current_level)
1088: 
1089:     var run_result: Dictionary = SaveManager.submit_run_result({
1090:         "outcome": outcome,
1091:         "rooms_cleared": _run_rooms_cleared,
1092:         "kills": _run_kills,
1093:         "level_reached": level_reached,
1094:         "gold": _gold,

1097:         "route_style": _resolve_run_route_style_for_payoff(),
1098:         "fragment_triggers": _run_fragment_triggers.duplicate(true),
1099:         "narrative_choices": _narrative_system.get_run_choices() if _narrative_system != null and _narrative_system.has_method("get_run_choices") else [],
1100:         "chapter_effect_timeline": _chapter_effect_timeline.duplicate(true),
1101:         "chapter_route_styles": _chapter_route_styles.duplicate(true),
1102:         "route_style_timeline": _route_style_timeline.duplicate(true)
1103:     })
1104: 
1105:     _room_status_label.text = "Run Ended: %s | Meta +%d" % [
1106:         outcome.to_upper(),
1107:         int(run_result.get("meta_reward", 0))
1108:     ]
1109: 
1110:     if _run_result_panel != null and _run_result_panel.has_method("show_result"):
1111:         _run_result_panel.show_result(run_result)
1112:     else:
1113:         call_deferred("_return_to_main_menu")

1150:     EventBus.game_paused.emit(false)

1152:     if _pause_panel != null and _pause_panel.has_method("close_panel"):
1153:         _pause_panel.close_panel()
1154: 
1155:     if not _run_finished:
1156:         GameManager.set_state(GameManager.GameState.PLAYING)
1157: 
1158: 
1159: func _on_pause_resume_requested() -> void:
1160:     _close_pause_panel()
1161: 
1162: 
1163: func _on_pause_retreat_requested() -> void:
1164:     _reset_pause_state()
1165:     _finish_run("retreat")
1166: 
1167: 
1168: func _on_pause_quit_to_menu_requested() -> void:
1169:     _reset_pause_state()
1170:     GameManager.set_state(GameManager.GameState.MENU)
1171:     SceneManager.go_to_main_menu()
1172: 
1173: 
1174: func _begin_chapter_transition(chapter: int) -> void:
1175:     _chapter_transition_pending = true
1176:     var intro_text: String = _get_chapter_progression_text(_room_index, "transition_intro", "Boss down! Chapter %d cleared." % chapter)
1177:     _room_status_label.text = "%s Resolve chapter transition..." % intro_text
1178:     var mainline_node: String = _get_chapter_mainline_node(_room_index, _current_room_type)
1179:     if mainline_node != "":
1180:         _room_status_label.text += " | Mainline: %s" % mainline_node
1181:     var recap_text: String = _build_chapter_history_recap(_room_index)
1182:     if recap_text != "":
1183:         _room_status_label.text += " | %s" % recap_text
1184:     if _chapter_transition_panel != null and _chapter_transition_panel.has_method("show_transition"):
1185:         _chapter_transition_panel.show_transition(
1186:             chapter,
1187:             _alignment,
1188:             _get_route_arc_line(),
1189:             _get_fragment_progress_line(),
1190:             _get_recent_choice_line(_get_chapter_id_for_room(_room_index))
1191:         )
1192: 
1193: 
1194: func _on_transition_choice_committed(chapter_id: String, choice_id: String, alignment_delta: float) -> void:
1195:     _alignment = clampf(_alignment + alignment_delta, -100.0, 100.0)
1196:     EventBus.route_changed.emit(_alignment)
1197:     EventBus.narrative_choice.emit(chapter_id, "chapter_transition", choice_id)
1198:     var transition_segment_id: String = _get_transition_segment_id(chapter_id)
1199:     if _narrative_system != null and _narrative_system.has_method("is_registered_narrative_id"):
1200:         if not _narrative_system.is_registered_narrative_id(transition_segment_id):
1201:             push_warning("Missing narrative index id: %s" % transition_segment_id)
1202:     if _narrative_system != null and _narrative_system.has_method("record_choice"):
1203:         _narrative_system.record_choice(chapter_id, transition_segment_id, choice_id, alignment_delta)
1204:     _apply_transition_blessing(choice_id)
1205:     _room_status_label.text = "Transition choice: %s (%+.0f). Press E to continue" % [
1206:         choice_id,
1207:         alignment_delta
1208:     ]
1209: 
1210: 
1211: func _on_transition_closed() -> void:
1212:     _chapter_transition_pending = false
1213:     var resolved_text: String = _get_chapter_progression_text(_room_index, "transition_resolved", "Chapter transition resolved.")
1214:     _room_status_label.text = "%s %s" % [resolved_text, _get_next_route_hint_text()]
1215:     var checkpoint_label: String = _get_room_checkpoint_label(_room_index)
1216:     if checkpoint_label != "":
1217:         _room_status_label.text += " | Checkpoint: %s" % checkpoint_label
1218:     var mainline_node: String = _get_chapter_mainline_node(_room_index, _current_room_type)
1219:     if mainline_node != "":
1220:         _room_status_label.text += " | Mainline: %s" % mainline_node
1221:     var recap_text: String = _build_chapter_history_recap(_room_index)
1222:     if recap_text != "":
1223:         _room_status_label.text += " | %s" % recap_text
1224:     var fragment_payload: Dictionary = _trigger_fragment_from_pacing("transition")
1225:     var fragment_line: String = _get_fragment_trigger_line(fragment_payload)
1226:     if fragment_line != "":
1227:         _room_status_label.text += " | %s" % fragment_line
1228: 
1229: 
1230: func _on_event_choice_committed(event_id: String, choice_id: String, choice_data: Dictionary) -> void:
1231:     var chapter_id: String = _get_chapter_id_for_room(_room_index)
1232:     _apply_event_choice_effects(choice_data)
1233:     EventBus.narrative_choice.emit(chapter_id, event_id, choice_id)
1234:     if _narrative_system != null and _narrative_system.has_method("record_choice"):
1235:         _narrative_system.record_choice(chapter_id, event_id, choice_id, float(choice_data.get("alignment_delta", 0.0)))
1236: 
1237:     var effect_var: Variant = choice_data.get("chapter_effect", {})
1238:     if effect_var is Dictionary and not (effect_var as Dictionary).is_empty():
1239:         _room_status_label.text = "Event committed: %s | New chapter effect queued: %s" % [
1240:             choice_id,
1241:             str((effect_var as Dictionary).get("title", "effect"))
1242:         ]
1243: 
1244: 
1245: func _on_event_closed() -> void:

1260: 
1261: func _apply_event_choice_effects(choice_data: Dictionary) -> void:
1262:     _gold = maxi(0, _gold + int(choice_data.get("gold", 0)))
1263:     _ore = maxi(0, _ore + int(choice_data.get("ore", 0)))
1264:     EventBus.gold_changed.emit(_gold)
1265:     EventBus.ore_changed.emit(_ore)
1266: 
1267:     var alignment_delta: float = float(choice_data.get("alignment_delta", 0.0))
1268:     if not is_zero_approx(alignment_delta):
1269:         _alignment = clampf(_alignment + alignment_delta, -100.0, 100.0)
1270:         EventBus.route_changed.emit(_alignment)
1271: 
1272:     _set_frostbite(_frostbite + float(choice_data.get("frostbite_delta", 0.0)))
1273:     _set_void_corruption(_void_corruption + float(choice_data.get("void_delta", 0.0)))
1274: 
1275:     var blessing: String = str(choice_data.get("blessing", ""))
1276:     if blessing != "":
1277:         _apply_transition_blessing(blessing)
1278: 
1279:     var chapter_effect_var: Variant = choice_data.get("chapter_effect", {})
